Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.WhiskeredBifunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.AlternativeDefinitions.MonoidalCategoriesTensored.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.AlternativeDefinitions.MonoidalCategoriesReordered.

Section MonoidalCategoriesReordered0.

  Definition lunitor0_nattrans {C : category} (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C) : UU
    := ∑ lu : leftunitor_data T I, leftunitor_nat lu.

  Definition lunitor0 {C : category} (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C) : UU
    := ∑ lu : lunitor0_nattrans T I, ∑ lui : leftunitorinv_data T I, leftunitor_iso_law (pr1 lu) lui.

  Definition runitor0_nattrans {C : category} (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C) : UU
    := ∑ ru : rightunitor_data T I, rightunitor_nat ru.
  Definition runitor0 {C : category} (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C) : UU
    := ∑ ru : runitor0_nattrans T I, ∑ rui : rightunitorinv_data T I, rightunitor_iso_law (pr1 ru) rui.


  Definition associator0_nattrans {C : category} (T : bifunctor C C C) : UU
    := ∑ ass : associator_data T,
        associator_nat_leftwhisker ass × associator_nat_rightwhisker ass × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass.
  Definition associator0 {C : category} (T : bifunctor C C C) : UU
    := ∑ ass : associator0_nattrans T, ∑ assi : associatorinv_data T, associator_iso_law (pr1 ass) assi.

  Definition monstruct0 (C : category) : UU
    := ∑ T : bifunctor C C C, ∑ I : C, ∑ lu : lunitor0 T I, ∑ ru : runitor0 T I, ∑ ass : associator0 T,
                triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass) × pentagon_identity (pr11 ass).

  Definition moncats0 : UU := ∑ C : category, monstruct0 C.

End MonoidalCategoriesReordered0.

Section EquivalenceMonoidalCategoriesReordered0WithMonstructs.

  Definition moncats : UU := ∑ C : category, monoidal_struct C.

  
moncats ≃ moncats0

  
moncats ≃ moncats0

    
∏ x : category, monoidal_struct x ≃ monstruct0 x

    
C: category
monoidal_struct C ≃ monstruct0 C

    
C: category
(∑ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
 pentagontriangle M × unitorsassociator_inverses M)
≃ (∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C) (lu : lunitor0 T I)
   (ru : runitor0 T I) (ass : associator0 T),
   triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
   × pentagon_identity (pr11 ass))

    
C: category
(∑ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
 pentagontriangle M × unitorsassociator_inverses M)
→ ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C) (lu : lunitor0 T I)
  (ru : runitor0 T I) (ass : associator0 T),
  triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
  × pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
C: category
(∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C) (lu : lunitor0 T I)
 (ru : runitor0 T I) (ass : associator0 T),
 triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
 × pentagon_identity (pr11 ass))
→ ∑ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
  pentagontriangle M × unitorsassociator_inverses M
C: category
∏
x : ∑ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
    pentagontriangle M × unitorsassociator_inverses M,
?g (?f x) = x
C: category
∏
y : ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C)
    (lu : lunitor0 T I) (ru : runitor0 T I)
    (ass : associator0 T),
    triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
    × pentagon_identity (pr11 ass), ?f (?g y) = y

(∑ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,

→ ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C) (lu : lunitor0 T I)

  × pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)

M: ∑ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
pentagontriangle M × unitorsassociator_inverses M
∑ (I : C) (lu : lunitor0 (pr111 M) I)

(ass : associator0 (pr111 M)),
triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
× pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)

M: ∑ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
pentagontriangle M × unitorsassociator_inverses M

(ru : runitor0 (pr111 M) (pr211 M))
(ass : associator0 (pr111 M)),
triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
× pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)

C: category
M: ∑ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
pentagontriangle M × unitorsassociator_inverses M
triangle_identity
  (pr11 ((?pr1,, ?pr2),, ?pr10,, ?pr20))
  (pr11 ((?pr11,, ?pr21),, ?pr12,, ?pr22))
  (pr11 ((?pr13,, ?pr14,, ?pr15,, ?pr23),,
         ?pr16,, ?pr24))
C: category
M: ∑ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
pentagontriangle M × unitorsassociator_inverses M
(λ _ : triangle_identity
         (pr11 ((?pr1,, ?pr2),, ?pr10,, ?pr20))
         (pr11 ((?pr11,, ?pr21),, ?pr12,, ?pr22))
         (pr11 ((?pr13,, ?pr14,, ?pr15,, ?pr23),,
                ?pr16,, ?pr24)),
 pentagon_identity
   (pr11 ((?pr13,, ?pr14,, ?pr15,, ?pr23),,
          ?pr16,, ?pr24))) ?pr17

      
C: category
M: ∑ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
pentagontriangle M × unitorsassociator_inverses M
leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)
 intro x ; apply (pr1 (pr121 M) x).
      
C: category
M: ∑ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
pentagontriangle M × unitorsassociator_inverses M
(λ lu : leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M),
 leftunitor_nat lu)
  ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr1 M)) x)
   :
   leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M))
 intros x y f ; apply (pr2 (pr121 M) x y f).

M: ∑ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,

   (pr1
      (((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr1 M)) x)
        :
        leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
       ((λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
         (pr212 (pr1 M)) x y f)

        (λ lu : leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M),
         leftunitor_nat lu)
          ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr1 M)) x)
           :
           leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M))))) lui)
  ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr2 M)) x)
   :
   leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M))
 intro x ; apply (pr2 (pr122 M) x).

M: ∑ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
pentagontriangle M × unitorsassociator_inverses M
(λ _ : associator_nat_rightwhisker
         ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
          :
          associator_data (pr111 M)),
 associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
   ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
    :
    associator_data (pr111 M)))
  ((λ (x x' y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
    (pr122 (pr222 (pr1 M))) x x' y z f)
   :
   associator_nat_rightwhisker
     ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
      :
      associator_data (pr111 M)))
 intro ; intros ; apply (pr2 (pr222 (pr221 M))).

M: ∑ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,

C: category
M: ∑ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
pentagontriangle M × unitorsassociator_inverses M
(λ assi : associatorinv_data (pr111 M),
 associator_iso_law
   (pr1
      (((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
        :
        associator_data (pr111 M)),,
       ((λ (x y z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
         (pr122 (pr221 M)) x y z z' h)
        :
        associator_nat_leftwhisker
          ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
           :
           associator_data (pr111 M))),,
       ((λ (x x' y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
         (pr122 (pr222 (pr1 M))) x x' y z f)
        :
        associator_nat_rightwhisker
          ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
           :
           associator_data (pr111 M))),,
       ((λ (x y y' z : C) (g : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧),
         (pr222 (pr222 (pr1 M))) x y y' z g)
        :
        (λ _ : associator_nat_rightwhisker
                 ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                  :
                  associator_data (pr111 M)),
         associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
           ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
            :
            associator_data (pr111 M)))
          ((λ (x x' y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
            (pr122 (pr222 (pr1 M))) x x' y z f)
           :
           associator_nat_rightwhisker
             ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
              :
              associator_data (pr111 M)))))) assi)
  ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr22 M)) x y z)
   :
   associatorinv_data (pr111 M))
 intro ; intros ; apply ((pr22 (pr222 M))).
      
C: category
M: ∑ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
pentagontriangle M × unitorsassociator_inverses M
triangle_identity
  (pr11 ((((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr1 M)) x)
           :
           leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
          ((λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
            (pr212 (pr1 M)) x y f)
           :
           (λ lu : leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M),
            leftunitor_nat lu)
             ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr1 M)) x)
              :
              leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)))),,
         ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr2 M)) x)
          :
          leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
         ((λ x : C, (pr212 (pr2 M)) x)
          :
          (λ lui : leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M)
                     (pr211 M),
           leftunitor_iso_law
             (pr1
                (((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr1 M)) x)
                  :
                  leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
                 ((λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                   (pr212 (pr1 M)) x y f)
                  :
                  (λ lu : leftunitor_data (pr111 M)
                            (pr211 M),
                   leftunitor_nat lu)
                    ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr1 M)) x)
                     :
                     leftunitor_data (pr111 M)
                       (pr211 M))))) lui)
            ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr2 M)) x)
             :
             leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)))))
  (pr11 ((((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr21 M)) x)
           :
           rightunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
          ((λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
            (pr212 (pr21 M)) x y f)
           :
           (λ ru : rightunitor_data (pr111 M)
                     (pr211 M), rightunitor_nat ru)
             ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr21 M)) x)
              :
              rightunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)))),,
         ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr22 M)) x)
          :
          rightunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
         ((λ x : C, (pr212 (pr22 M)) x)
          :
          (λ rui : rightunitorinv_data (pr111 M)
                     (pr211 M),
           rightunitor_iso_law
             (pr1
                (((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr21 M)) x)
                  :
                  rightunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
                 ((λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                   (pr212 (pr21 M)) x y f)
                  :
                  (λ ru : rightunitor_data (pr111 M)
                            (pr211 M),
                   rightunitor_nat ru)
                    ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr21 M)) x)
                     :
                     rightunitor_data (pr111 M)
                       (pr211 M))))) rui)
            ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr22 M)) x)
             :
             rightunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)))))
  (pr11 ((((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
           :
           associator_data (pr111 M)),,
          ((λ (x y z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
            (pr122 (pr221 M)) x y z z' h)
           :
           associator_nat_leftwhisker
             ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
              :
              associator_data (pr111 M))),,
          ((λ (x x' y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
            (pr122 (pr222 (pr1 M))) x x' y z f)
           :
           associator_nat_rightwhisker
             ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
              :
              associator_data (pr111 M))),,
          ((λ (x y y' z : C) (g : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧),
            (pr222 (pr222 (pr1 M))) x y y' z g)
           :
           (λ _ : associator_nat_rightwhisker
                    ((λ x y z : C,
                      (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                     :
                     associator_data (pr111 M)),
            associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
              ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
               :
               associator_data (pr111 M)))
             ((λ (x x' y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
               (pr122 (pr222 (pr1 M))) x x' y z f)
              :
              associator_nat_rightwhisker
                ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                 :
                 associator_data (pr111 M))))),,
         ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr22 M)) x y z)
          :
          associatorinv_data (pr111 M)),,
         ((λ x y z : C, (pr222 (pr22 M)) x y z)
          :
          (λ assi : associatorinv_data (pr111 M),
           associator_iso_law
             (pr1
                (((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                  :
                  associator_data (pr111 M)),,
                 ((λ (x y z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                   (pr122 (pr221 M)) x y z z' h)
                  :
                  associator_nat_leftwhisker
                    ((λ x y z : C,
                      (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                     :
                     associator_data (pr111 M))),,
                 ((λ (x x' y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
                   (pr122 (pr222 (pr1 M))) x x' y z f)
                  :
                  associator_nat_rightwhisker
                    ((λ x y z : C,
                      (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                     :
                     associator_data (pr111 M))),,
                 ((λ (x y y' z : C) (g : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧),
                   (pr222 (pr222 (pr1 M))) x y y' z g)
                  :
                  (λ _ : associator_nat_rightwhisker
                           ((...)
                            :
                            associator_data ...),
                   associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                     ((λ ..., ...)
                      :
                      associator_data (pr111 M)))
                    ((λ (x x' y z : C)
                      (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
                      (pr122 (pr222 ...)) x x' y z f)
                     :
                     associator_nat_rightwhisker
                       ((λ ..., ...)
                        :
                        associator_data (pr111 M))))))
             assi)
            ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr22 M)) x y z)
             :
             associatorinv_data (pr111 M)))))
 intro ; intros ; apply (pr112 M).
      
C: category
M: ∑ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
pentagontriangle M × unitorsassociator_inverses M
(λ _ : triangle_identity
         (pr11 ((((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr1 M)) x)
                  :
                  leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
                 ((λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                   (pr212 (pr1 M)) x y f)
                  :
                  (λ lu : leftunitor_data (pr111 M)
                            (pr211 M),
                   leftunitor_nat lu)
                    ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr1 M)) x)
                     :
                     leftunitor_data (pr111 M)
                       (pr211 M)))),,
                ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr2 M)) x)
                 :
                 leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M)
                   (pr211 M)),,
                ((λ x : C, (pr212 (pr2 M)) x)
                 :
                 (λ lui : leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M)
                            (pr211 M),
                  leftunitor_iso_law
                    (pr1
                       (((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr1 M)) x)
                         :
                         leftunitor_data (pr111 M)
                           (pr211 M)),,
                        ((λ (x y : C)
                          (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                          (pr212 (pr1 M)) x y f)
                         :
                         (λ lu : leftunitor_data
                                   (pr111 M) (pr211 M),
                          leftunitor_nat lu)
                           ((λ x : C, ... x)
                            :
                            leftunitor_data (pr111 M)
                              (pr211 M))))) lui)
                   ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr2 M)) x)
                    :
                    leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M)
                      (pr211 M)))))
         (pr11 ((((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr21 M)) x)
                  :
                  rightunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
                 ((λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                   (pr212 (pr21 M)) x y f)
                  :
                  (λ ru : rightunitor_data (pr111 M)
                            (pr211 M),
                   rightunitor_nat ru)
                    ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr21 M)) x)
                     :
                     rightunitor_data (pr111 M)
                       (pr211 M)))),,
                ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr22 M)) x)
                 :
                 rightunitorinv_data (pr111 M)
                   (pr211 M)),,
                ((λ x : C, (pr212 (pr22 M)) x)
                 :
                 (λ rui : rightunitorinv_data
                            (pr111 M) (pr211 M),
                  rightunitor_iso_law
                    (pr1
                       (((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr21 M)) x)
                         :
                         rightunitor_data (pr111 M)
                           (pr211 M)),,
                        ((λ (x y : C)
                          (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                          (pr212 (pr21 M)) x y f)
                         :
                         (λ ru : rightunitor_data
                                   (pr111 M) (pr211 M),
                          rightunitor_nat ru)
                           ((λ x : C, ... x)
                            :
                            rightunitor_data (pr111 M)
                              (pr211 M))))) rui)
                   ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr22 M)) x)
                    :
                    rightunitorinv_data (pr111 M)
                      (pr211 M)))))
         (pr11 ((((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                  :
                  associator_data (pr111 M)),,
                 ((λ (x y z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                   (pr122 (pr221 M)) x y z z' h)
                  :
                  associator_nat_leftwhisker
                    ((λ x y z : C,
                      (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                     :
                     associator_data (pr111 M))),,
                 ((λ (x x' y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
                   (pr122 (pr222 (pr1 M))) x x' y z f)
                  :
                  associator_nat_rightwhisker
                    ((λ x y z : C,
                      (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                     :
                     associator_data (pr111 M))),,
                 ((λ (x y y' z : C) (g : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧),
                   (pr222 (pr222 (pr1 M))) x y y' z g)
                  :
                  (λ _ : associator_nat_rightwhisker
                           ((λ x y z : C,
                             (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                            :
                            associator_data (pr111 M)),
                   associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                     ((λ x y z : C,
                       (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                      :
                      associator_data (pr111 M)))
                    ((λ (x x' y z : C)
                      (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
                      (pr122 (pr222 (pr1 M))) x x' y z
                        f)
                     :
                     associator_nat_rightwhisker
                       ((λ x y z : C,
                         (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                        :
                        associator_data (pr111 M))))),,
                ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr22 M)) x y z)
                 :
                 associatorinv_data (pr111 M)),,
                ((λ x y z : C, (pr222 (pr22 M)) x y z)
                 :
                 (λ assi : associatorinv_data
                             (pr111 M),
                  associator_iso_law
                    (pr1
                       (((λ x y z : C,
                          (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                         :
                         associator_data (pr111 M)),,
                        ((λ (x y z z' : C)
                          (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                          (pr122 (pr221 M)) x y z z' h)
                         :
                         associator_nat_leftwhisker
                           ((λ ..., ...)
                            :
                            associator_data (pr111 M))),,
                        ((λ (x x' y z : C)
                          (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
                          (pr122 ...) x x' y z f)
                         :
                         associator_nat_rightwhisker
                           ((...)
                            :
                            associator_data ...)),,
                        ((λ (x y y' z : C)
                          (g : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧),
                          (pr222 ...) x y y' z g)
                         :
                         (λ _ : ...,
                          associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                            ...)
                           ((...)
                            :
                            associator_nat_rightwhisker
                              ...)))) assi)
                   ((λ x y z : C,
                     (pr122 (pr22 M)) x y z)
                    :
                    associatorinv_data (pr111 M))))),
 pentagon_identity
   (pr11 ((((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
            :
            associator_data (pr111 M)),,
           ((λ (x y z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
             (pr122 (pr221 M)) x y z z' h)
            :
            associator_nat_leftwhisker
              ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
               :
               associator_data (pr111 M))),,
           ((λ (x x' y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
             (pr122 (pr222 (pr1 M))) x x' y z f)
            :
            associator_nat_rightwhisker
              ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
               :
               associator_data (pr111 M))),,
           ((λ (x y y' z : C) (g : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧),
             (pr222 (pr222 (pr1 M))) x y y' z g)
            :
            (λ _ : associator_nat_rightwhisker
                     ((λ x y z : C,
                       (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                      :
                      associator_data (pr111 M)),
             associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
               ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                :
                associator_data (pr111 M)))
              ((λ (x x' y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
                (pr122 (pr222 (pr1 M))) x x' y z f)
               :
               associator_nat_rightwhisker
                 ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                  :
                  associator_data (pr111 M))))),,
          ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr22 M)) x y z)
           :
           associatorinv_data (pr111 M)),,
          ((λ x y z : C, (pr222 (pr22 M)) x y z)
           :
           (λ assi : associatorinv_data (pr111 M),
            associator_iso_law
              (pr1
                 (((λ x y z : C,
                    (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                   :
                   associator_data (pr111 M)),,
                  ((λ (x y z z' : C)
                    (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                    (pr122 (pr221 M)) x y z z' h)
                   :
                   associator_nat_leftwhisker
                     ((λ x y z : C, ... x y z)
                      :
                      associator_data (pr111 M))),,
                  ((λ (x x' y z : C)
                    (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
                    (pr122 (pr222 ...)) x x' y z f)
                   :
                   associator_nat_rightwhisker
                     ((λ ..., ...)
                      :
                      associator_data (pr111 M))),,
                  ((λ (x y y' z : C)
                    (g : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧),
                    (pr222 (pr222 ...)) x y y' z g)
                   :
                   (λ _ : associator_nat_rightwhisker
                            ...,
                    associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                      (...))
                     ((λ ... ..., ...)
                      :
                      associator_nat_rightwhisker
                        (...))))) assi)
             ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr22 M)) x y z)
              :
              associatorinv_data (pr111 M))))))
  ((λ x y : C, (pr112 M) x y)
   :
   triangle_identity
     (pr11 ((((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr1 M)) x)
              :
              leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
             ((λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
               (pr212 (pr1 M)) x y f)
              :
              (λ lu : leftunitor_data (pr111 M)
                        (pr211 M), leftunitor_nat lu)
                ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr1 M)) x)
                 :
                 leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)))),,
            ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr2 M)) x)
             :
             leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
            ((λ x : C, (pr212 (pr2 M)) x)
             :
             (λ lui : leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M)
                        (pr211 M),
              leftunitor_iso_law
                (pr1
                   (((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr1 M)) x)
                     :
                     leftunitor_data (pr111 M)
                       (pr211 M)),,
                    ((λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                      (pr212 (pr1 M)) x y f)
                     :
                     (λ lu : leftunitor_data (pr111 M)
                               (pr211 M),
                      leftunitor_nat lu)
                       ((λ x : C, (pr112 ...) x)
                        :
                        leftunitor_data (pr111 M)
                          (pr211 M))))) lui)
               ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr2 M)) x)
                :
                leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)))))
     (pr11 ((((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr21 M)) x)
              :
              rightunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
             ((λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
               (pr212 (pr21 M)) x y f)
              :
              (λ ru : rightunitor_data (pr111 M)
                        (pr211 M), rightunitor_nat ru)
                ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr21 M)) x)
                 :
                 rightunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)))),,
            ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr22 M)) x)
             :
             rightunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
            ((λ x : C, (pr212 (pr22 M)) x)
             :
             (λ rui : rightunitorinv_data (pr111 M)
                        (pr211 M),
              rightunitor_iso_law
                (pr1
                   (((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr21 M)) x)
                     :
                     rightunitor_data (pr111 M)
                       (pr211 M)),,
                    ((λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                      (pr212 (pr21 M)) x y f)
                     :
                     (λ ru : rightunitor_data
                               (pr111 M) (pr211 M),
                      rightunitor_nat ru)
                       ((λ x : C, (pr112 ...) x)
                        :
                        rightunitor_data (pr111 M)
                          (pr211 M))))) rui)
               ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr22 M)) x)
                :
                rightunitorinv_data (pr111 M)
                  (pr211 M)))))
     (pr11 ((((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
              :
              associator_data (pr111 M)),,
             ((λ (x y z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
               (pr122 (pr221 M)) x y z z' h)
              :
              associator_nat_leftwhisker
                ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                 :
                 associator_data (pr111 M))),,
             ((λ (x x' y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
               (pr122 (pr222 (pr1 M))) x x' y z f)
              :
              associator_nat_rightwhisker
                ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                 :
                 associator_data (pr111 M))),,
             ((λ (x y y' z : C) (g : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧),
               (pr222 (pr222 (pr1 M))) x y y' z g)
              :
              (λ _ : associator_nat_rightwhisker
                       ((λ x y z : C,
                         (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                        :
                        associator_data (pr111 M)),
               associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                 ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                  :
                  associator_data (pr111 M)))
                ((λ (x x' y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
                  (pr122 (pr222 (pr1 M))) x x' y z f)
                 :
                 associator_nat_rightwhisker
                   ((λ x y z : C,
                     (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                    :
                    associator_data (pr111 M))))),,
            ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr22 M)) x y z)
             :
             associatorinv_data (pr111 M)),,
            ((λ x y z : C, (pr222 (pr22 M)) x y z)
             :
             (λ assi : associatorinv_data (pr111 M),
              associator_iso_law
                (pr1
                   (((λ x y z : C,
                      (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y z)
                     :
                     associator_data (pr111 M)),,
                    ((λ (x y z z' : C)
                      (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                      (pr122 (pr221 M)) x y z z' h)
                     :
                     associator_nat_leftwhisker
                       ((λ x y z : C, ... x y z)
                        :
                        associator_data (pr111 M))),,
                    ((λ (x x' y z : C)
                      (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
                      (pr122 (pr222 ...)) x x' y z f)
                     :
                     associator_nat_rightwhisker
                       ((λ ..., ...)
                        :
                        associator_data (pr111 M))),,
                    ((λ (x y y' z : C)
                      (g : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧),
                      (pr222 (pr222 ...)) x y y' z g)
                     :
                     (λ _ : associator_nat_rightwhisker
                              ...,
                      associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                        (...))
                       ((λ ... ..., ...)
                        :
                        associator_nat_rightwhisker
                          (...))))) assi)
               ((λ x y z : C, (pr122 (pr22 M)) x y z)
                :
                associatorinv_data (pr111 M))))))
 intro ; intros ; apply (pr212 M).
    
C: category
(∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C) (lu : lunitor0 T I)
 (ru : runitor0 T I) (ass : associator0 T),
 triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
 × pentagon_identity (pr11 ass))
→ ∑ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
  pentagontriangle M × unitorsassociator_inverses M
 
C: category
M: ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C)
(lu : lunitor0 T I) (ru : runitor0 T I)
(ass : associator0 T),
triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
× pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
∑ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
pentagontriangle M × unitorsassociator_inverses M

      
C: category
M: ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C)
(lu : lunitor0 T I) (ru : runitor0 T I)
(ass : associator0 T),
triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
× pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
tensor_unit_unitors_associator C
C: category
M: ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C)
(lu : lunitor0 T I) (ru : runitor0 T I)
(ass : associator0 T),
triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
× pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
(λ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
 pentagontriangle M × unitorsassociator_inverses M)
  ?pr1

      
C: category
M: ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C)
(lu : lunitor0 T I) (ru : runitor0 T I)
(ass : associator0 T),
triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
× pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
tensor_unit_unitors_associator C
 
C: category
M: ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C)
(lu : lunitor0 T I) (ru : runitor0 T I)
(ass : associator0 T),
triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
× pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
laxleftunitor (pr1 M,, pr12 M)
× laxrightunitor (pr1 M,, pr12 M)
  × laxassociator (pr1 M,, pr12 M)

        repeat split ; apply (pr22 M).
      
C: category
M: ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C)
(lu : lunitor0 T I) (ru : runitor0 T I)
(ass : associator0 T),
triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
× pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
(λ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
 pentagontriangle M × unitorsassociator_inverses M)
  ((pr1 M,, pr12 M),,
   (let X := pr122 M in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
   (let X := pr222 M in
    let X0 := pr1 X in let X1 := pr1 X0 in X1),,
   (let X := pr222 M in
    let X0 := pr2 X in
    let X1 := pr1 X0 in let X2 := pr1 X1 in X2))
 
C: category
M: ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C)
(lu : lunitor0 T I) (ru : runitor0 T I)
(ass : associator0 T),
triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
× pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
pentagontriangle
  ((pr1 M,, pr12 M),,
   pr112 (pr2 M),, pr112 (pr22 M),, pr112 (pr222 M))
× unitorsassociator_inverses
    ((pr1 M,, pr12 M),,
     pr112 (pr2 M),, pr112 (pr22 M),, pr112 (pr222 M))

        
C: category
M: ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C)
(lu : lunitor0 T I) (ru : runitor0 T I)
(ass : associator0 T),
triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
× pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
triangle_identity
  (tensor_unit_unitors_associator_laxleftunitor
     ((pr1 M,, pr12 M),,
      pr112 (pr2 M),, pr112 (pr22 M),, pr112 (pr222 M)))
  (tensor_unit_unitors_associator_laxrightunitor
     ((pr1 M,, pr12 M),,
      pr112 (pr2 M),, pr112 (pr22 M),, pr112 (pr222 M)))
  (tensor_unit_unitors_associator_laxassociator
     ((pr1 M,, pr12 M),,
      pr112 (pr2 M),, pr112 (pr22 M),, pr112 (pr222 M)))
C: category
M: ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C)
(lu : lunitor0 T I) (ru : runitor0 T I)
(ass : associator0 T),
triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
× pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
pentagon_identity
  (tensor_unit_unitors_associator_laxassociator
     ((pr1 M,, pr12 M),,
      pr112 (pr2 M),, pr112 (pr22 M),, pr112 (pr222 M)))
C: category
M: ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C)
(lu : lunitor0 T I) (ru : runitor0 T I)
(ass : associator0 T),
triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
× pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
lax_monoidal_leftunitor_inverse
  ((pr1 M,, pr12 M),,
   pr112 (pr2 M),, pr112 (pr22 M),, pr112 (pr222 M))
C: category
M: ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C)
(lu : lunitor0 T I) (ru : runitor0 T I)
(ass : associator0 T),
triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
× pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
lax_monoidal_rightunitor_inverse
  ((pr1 M,, pr12 M),,
   pr112 (pr2 M),, pr112 (pr22 M),, pr112 (pr222 M))
C: category
M: ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C)
(lu : lunitor0 T I) (ru : runitor0 T I)
(ass : associator0 T),
triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
× pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
lax_monoidal_associator_inverse
  ((pr1 M,, pr12 M),,
   pr112 (pr2 M),, pr112 (pr22 M),, pr112 (pr222 M))

        
C: category
M: ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C)
(lu : lunitor0 T I) (ru : runitor0 T I)
(ass : associator0 T),
triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
× pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
triangle_identity
  (tensor_unit_unitors_associator_laxleftunitor
     ((pr1 M,, pr12 M),,
      pr112 (pr2 M),, pr112 (pr22 M),, pr112 (pr222 M)))
  (tensor_unit_unitors_associator_laxrightunitor
     ((pr1 M,, pr12 M),,
      pr112 (pr2 M),, pr112 (pr22 M),, pr112 (pr222 M)))
  (tensor_unit_unitors_associator_laxassociator
     ((pr1 M,, pr12 M),,
      pr112 (pr2 M),, pr112 (pr22 M),, pr112 (pr222 M)))
 apply (pr22 (pr222 M)).
        
C: category
M: ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C)
(lu : lunitor0 T I) (ru : runitor0 T I)
(ass : associator0 T),
triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
× pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
pentagon_identity
  (tensor_unit_unitors_associator_laxassociator
     ((pr1 M,, pr12 M),,
      pr112 (pr2 M),, pr112 (pr22 M),, pr112 (pr222 M)))
 apply (pr22 (pr222 M)).
        
C: category
M: ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C)
(lu : lunitor0 T I) (ru : runitor0 T I)
(ass : associator0 T),
triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
× pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
lax_monoidal_leftunitor_inverse
  ((pr1 M,, pr12 M),,
   pr112 (pr2 M),, pr112 (pr22 M),, pr112 (pr222 M))
 apply ((pr122 M)).
        
C: category
M: ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C)
(lu : lunitor0 T I) (ru : runitor0 T I)
(ass : associator0 T),
triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
× pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
lax_monoidal_rightunitor_inverse
  ((pr1 M,, pr12 M),,
   pr112 (pr2 M),, pr112 (pr22 M),, pr112 (pr222 M))
 apply (pr1 (pr222 M)).
        
C: category
M: ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C)
(lu : lunitor0 T I) (ru : runitor0 T I)
(ass : associator0 T),
triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
× pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
lax_monoidal_associator_inverse
  ((pr1 M,, pr12 M),,
   pr112 (pr2 M),, pr112 (pr22 M),, pr112 (pr222 M))
 apply (pr12 (pr222 M)).
    
C: category
∏
x : ∑ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
    pentagontriangle M × unitorsassociator_inverses M,
(λ M : ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C)
       (lu : lunitor0 T I) (ru : runitor0 T I)
       (ass : associator0 T),
       triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru)
         (pr11 ass) × pentagon_identity (pr11 ass),
 ((pr1 M,, pr12 M),,
  (let X := pr122 M in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
  (let X := pr222 M in
   let X0 := pr1 X in let X1 := pr1 X0 in X1),,
  (let X := pr222 M in
   let X0 := pr2 X in
   let X1 := pr1 X0 in let X2 := pr1 X1 in X2)),,
 (((let X := pr122 (pr222 M) in X),,
   (let X := pr222 (pr222 M) in X)),,
  (let X := pr212 (pr2 M) in X),,
  (let X := pr212 (pr22 M) in X),,
  (let X := pr212 (pr222 M) in X)
  :
  (λ M0 : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
   pentagontriangle M0 × unitorsassociator_inverses M0)
    ((pr1 M,, pr12 M),,
     (let X := pr122 M in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
     (let X := pr222 M in
      let X0 := pr1 X in let X1 := pr1 X0 in X1),,
     (let X := pr222 M in
      let X0 := pr2 X in
      let X1 := pr1 X0 in let X2 := pr1 X1 in X2))))
  ((λ M : ∑ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
          pentagontriangle M
          × unitorsassociator_inverses M,
    pr111 M,,
    pr211 M,,
    ((((λ x0 : C, (pr112 (pr1 M)) x0)
       :
       leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
      ((λ (x0 y : C) (f : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
        (pr212 (pr1 M)) x0 y f)
       :
       (λ lu : leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M),
        leftunitor_nat lu)
         ((λ x0 : C, (pr112 (pr1 M)) x0)
          :
          leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)))),,
     ((λ x0 : C, (pr112 (pr2 M)) x0)
      :
      leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
     ((λ x0 : C, (pr212 (pr2 M)) x0)
      :
      (λ lui : leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M),
       leftunitor_iso_law
         (pr1
            (((λ ..., ...)
              :
              leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
             ((λ ... ..., ...) : (...) (...)))) lui)
        ((λ x0 : C, (pr112 (pr2 M)) x0)
         :
         leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)))),,
    ((((λ x0 : C, (pr112 (pr21 M)) x0)
       :
       rightunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
      ((λ (x0 y : C) (f : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
        (pr212 (pr21 M)) x0 y f)
       :
       (λ ru : rightunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M),
        rightunitor_nat ru)
         ((λ x0 : C, (pr112 (pr21 M)) x0)
          :
          rightunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)))),,
     ((λ x0 : C, (pr112 (pr22 M)) x0)
      :
      rightunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
     ((λ x0 : C, (pr212 (pr22 M)) x0)
      :
      (λ rui : rightunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M),
       rightunitor_iso_law
         (pr1
            (((...) : rightunitor_data ... ...),,
             ((...) : ... ...))) rui)
        ((λ x0 : C, (pr112 (pr22 M)) x0)
         :
         rightunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)))),,
    ((((λ x0 y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x0 y z)
       :
       associator_data (pr111 M)),,
      ((λ (x0 y z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
        (pr122 (pr221 M)) x0 y z z' h)
       :
       associator_nat_leftwhisker
         ((λ x0 y z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x0 y z)
          :
          associator_data (pr111 M))),,
      ((λ (x0 x' y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
        (pr122 (pr222 (pr1 M))) x0 x' y z f)
       :
       associator_nat_rightwhisker
         ((λ x0 y z : C, (pr122 ...) x0 y z)
          :
          associator_data (pr111 M))),,
      ((λ (x0 y y' z : C) (g : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧),
        (pr222 (pr222 (pr1 M))) x0 y y' z g)
       :
       (λ _ : associator_nat_rightwhisker (... : ...),
        associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
          ((...) : associator_data ...))
         ((λ (x0 x' y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
           (pr122 ...) x0 x' y z f)
          :
          associator_nat_rightwhisker
            ((...) : associator_data ...)))),,
     ((λ x0 y z : C, (pr122 (pr22 M)) x0 y z)
      :
      associatorinv_data (pr111 M)),,
     ((λ x0 y z : C, (pr222 (pr22 M)) x0 y z)
      :
      (λ assi : associatorinv_data (pr111 M),
       associator_iso_law
         (pr1 ((... : ...),, (...),, ...,, ...)) assi)
        ((λ x0 y z : C, (pr122 (pr22 M)) x0 y z)
         :
         associatorinv_data (pr111 M)))),,
    ((λ x0 y : C, (pr112 M) x0 y)
     :
     triangle_identity
       (pr11 ((((λ x0 : C, (pr112 ...) x0)
                :
                leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
               ((λ (x0 y : C) (f : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
                 (pr212 ...) x0 y f)
                :
                (λ lu : ..., leftunitor_nat lu)
                  ((...) : leftunitor_data ... ...))),,
              ((λ x0 : C, (pr112 (...)) x0)
               :
               leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
              ((λ x0 : C, (pr212 (...)) x0)
               :
               (λ lui : leftunitorinv_data ... ...,
                leftunitor_iso_law (...) lui)
                 ((λ ..., ...)
                  :
                  leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M)
                    (pr211 M)))))
       (pr11 ((((λ x0 : C, (pr112 ...) x0)
                :
                rightunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
               ((λ (x0 y : C) (f : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
                 (pr212 ...) x0 y f)
                :
                (λ ru : ..., rightunitor_nat ru)
                  ((...) : rightunitor_data ... ...))),,
              ((λ x0 : C, (pr112 (pr22 M)) x0)
               :
               rightunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
              ((λ x0 : C, (pr212 (pr22 M)) x0)
               :
               (λ rui : rightunitorinv_data ... ...,
                rightunitor_iso_law (...) rui)
                 ((λ ..., ...)
                  :
                  rightunitorinv_data (pr111 M)
                    (pr211 M)))))
       (pr11 ((((λ x0 y z : C, (pr122 ...) x0 y z)
                :
                associator_data (pr111 M)),,
               ((λ (x0 y z z' : C) (h : ...),
                 ... x0 y z z' h)
                :
                associator_nat_leftwhisker (... : ...)),,
               ((λ ... ..., ...)
                :
                associator_nat_rightwhisker (...)),,
               ((λ ... ..., ...) : (...) (...))),,
              ((λ x0 y z : C, (pr122 (pr22 M)) x0 y z)
               :
               associatorinv_data (pr111 M)),,
              ((λ x0 y z : C, (pr222 (pr22 M)) x0 y z)
               :
               (λ assi : associatorinv_data ...,
                associator_iso_law (...) assi)
                 ((λ ..., ...)
                  :
                  associatorinv_data (pr111 M)))))),,
    ((λ w x0 y z : C, (pr212 M) w x0 y z)
     :
     (λ _ : triangle_identity
              (pr11 (((... : ...),, (... : ...)),,
                     ((...)
                      :
                      leftunitorinv_data ... ...),,
                     ((...) : ... ...)))
              (pr11 (((... : ...),, (... : ...)),,
                     ((...)
                      :
                      rightunitorinv_data ... ...),,
                     ((...) : ... ...)))
              (pr11 (((... : ...),, (...),, ...,, ...),,
                     ((...) : associatorinv_data ...),,
                     ((...) : ... ...))),
      pentagon_identity
        (pr11 ((((...) : associator_data ...),,
                (... : ...),, (...),, (...)),,
               ((λ ..., ...)
                :
                associatorinv_data (pr111 M)),,
               ((λ ..., ...) : (...) (...)))))
       ((λ x0 y : C, (pr112 M) x0 y)
        :
        triangle_identity
          (pr11 ((((...) : leftunitor_data ... ...),,
                  ((...) : ... ...)),,
                 ((λ ..., ...)
                  :
                  leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M)
                    (pr211 M)),,
                 ((λ ..., ...) : (...) (...))))
          (pr11 ((((...) : rightunitor_data ... ...),,
                  ((...) : ... ...)),,
                 ((λ ..., ...)
                  :
                  rightunitorinv_data (pr111 M)
                    (pr211 M)),,
                 ((λ ..., ...) : (...) (...))))
          (pr11 ((((...) : associator_data ...),,
                  (... : ...),, (...),, (...)),,
                 ((λ ..., ...)
                  :
                  associatorinv_data (pr111 M)),,
                 ((λ ..., ...) : (...) (...))))))) x) =
x
 apply idpath.
    
C: category
∏
y : ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C)
    (lu : lunitor0 T I) (ru : runitor0 T I)
    (ass : associator0 T),
    triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
    × pentagon_identity (pr11 ass),
(λ M : ∑ M : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
       pentagontriangle M
       × unitorsassociator_inverses M,
 pr111 M,,
 pr211 M,,
 ((((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr1 M)) x)
    :
    leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
   ((λ (x y0 : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y0 ⟧),
     (pr212 (pr1 M)) x y0 f)
    :
    (λ lu : leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M),
     leftunitor_nat lu)
      ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr1 M)) x)
       :
       leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)))),,
  ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr2 M)) x)
   :
   leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
  ((λ x : C, (pr212 (pr2 M)) x)
   :
   (λ lui : leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M),
    leftunitor_iso_law
      (pr1
         (((λ x : C, (pr112 ...) x)
           :
           leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
          ((λ (x y0 : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y0 ⟧),
            (pr212 ...) x y0 f)
           :
           (λ lu : ..., leftunitor_nat lu)
             ((...) : leftunitor_data ... ...)))) lui)
     ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr2 M)) x)
      :
      leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)))),,
 ((((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr21 M)) x)
    :
    rightunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
   ((λ (x y0 : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y0 ⟧),
     (pr212 (pr21 M)) x y0 f)
    :
    (λ ru : rightunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M),
     rightunitor_nat ru)
      ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr21 M)) x)
       :
       rightunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)))),,
  ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr22 M)) x)
   :
   rightunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
  ((λ x : C, (pr212 (pr22 M)) x)
   :
   (λ rui : rightunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M),
    rightunitor_iso_law
      (pr1
         (((λ x : C, ... x)
           :
           rightunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
          ((λ (x y0 : C) (f : ...), ... x y0 f)
           :
           (λ ..., ...) (... : ...)))) rui)
     ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr22 M)) x)
      :
      rightunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)))),,
 ((((λ x y0 z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y0 z)
    :
    associator_data (pr111 M)),,
   ((λ (x y0 z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
     (pr122 (pr221 M)) x y0 z z' h)
    :
    associator_nat_leftwhisker
      ((λ x y0 z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y0 z)
       :
       associator_data (pr111 M))),,
   ((λ (x x' y0 z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
     (pr122 (pr222 (pr1 M))) x x' y0 z f)
    :
    associator_nat_rightwhisker
      ((λ x y0 z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y0 z)
       :
       associator_data (pr111 M))),,
   ((λ (x y0 y' z : C) (g : C ⟦ y0, y' ⟧),
     (pr222 (pr222 (pr1 M))) x y0 y' z g)
    :
    (λ _ : associator_nat_rightwhisker
             ((λ ..., ...) : associator_data (pr111 M)),
     associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
       ((λ x y0 z : C, ... x y0 z)
        :
        associator_data (pr111 M)))
      ((λ (x x' y0 z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
        (pr122 (pr222 (...))) x x' y0 z f)
       :
       associator_nat_rightwhisker
         ((λ x y0 z : C, ... x y0 z)
          :
          associator_data (pr111 M))))),,
  ((λ x y0 z : C, (pr122 (pr22 M)) x y0 z)
   :
   associatorinv_data (pr111 M)),,
  ((λ x y0 z : C, (pr222 (pr22 M)) x y0 z)
   :
   (λ assi : associatorinv_data (pr111 M),
    associator_iso_law
      (pr1
         (((λ ..., ...) : associator_data (pr111 M)),,
          ((...) : associator_nat_leftwhisker ...),,
          (... : ...),, (... : ...))) assi)
     ((λ x y0 z : C, (pr122 (pr22 M)) x y0 z)
      :
      associatorinv_data (pr111 M)))),,
 ((λ x y0 : C, (pr112 M) x y0)
  :
  triangle_identity
    (pr11 ((((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr1 M)) x)
             :
             leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
            ((λ (x y0 : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y0 ⟧),
              (pr212 (pr1 M)) x y0 f)
             :
             (λ lu : leftunitor_data (pr111 M)
                       (pr211 M), leftunitor_nat lu)
               ((λ x : C, ... x)
                :
                leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)))),,
           ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr2 M)) x)
            :
            leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
           ((λ x : C, (pr212 (pr2 M)) x)
            :
            (λ lui : leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M)
                       (pr211 M),
             leftunitor_iso_law (pr1 (...)) lui)
              ((λ x : C, (pr112 ...) x)
               :
               leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)))))
    (pr11 ((((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr21 M)) x)
             :
             rightunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
            ((λ (x y0 : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y0 ⟧),
              (pr212 (pr21 M)) x y0 f)
             :
             (λ ru : rightunitor_data (pr111 M)
                       (pr211 M), rightunitor_nat ru)
               ((λ x : C, ... x)
                :
                rightunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)))),,
           ((λ x : C, (pr112 (pr22 M)) x)
            :
            rightunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
           ((λ x : C, (pr212 (pr22 M)) x)
            :
            (λ rui : rightunitorinv_data (pr111 M)
                       (pr211 M),
             rightunitor_iso_law (pr1 (...)) rui)
              ((λ x : C, (pr112 ...) x)
               :
               rightunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)))))
    (pr11 ((((λ x y0 z : C, (pr122 (pr21 M)) x y0 z)
             :
             associator_data (pr111 M)),,
            ((λ (x y0 z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
              (pr122 (pr221 M)) x y0 z z' h)
             :
             associator_nat_leftwhisker
               ((λ ..., ...)
                :
                associator_data (pr111 M))),,
            ((λ (x x' y0 z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
              (pr122 ...) x x' y0 z f)
             :
             associator_nat_rightwhisker
               ((...) : associator_data ...)),,
            ((λ (x y0 y' z : C) (g : C ⟦ y0, y' ⟧),
              (pr222 ...) x y0 y' z g)
             :
             (λ _ : ...,
              associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ...)
               ((...)
                :
                associator_nat_rightwhisker ...))),,
           ((λ x y0 z : C, (pr122 (pr22 M)) x y0 z)
            :
            associatorinv_data (pr111 M)),,
           ((λ x y0 z : C, (pr222 (pr22 M)) x y0 z)
            :
            (λ assi : associatorinv_data (pr111 M),
             associator_iso_law (pr1 (...)) assi)
              ((λ x y0 z : C, (pr122 ...) x y0 z)
               :
               associatorinv_data (pr111 M)))))),,
 ((λ w x y0 z : C, (pr212 M) w x y0 z)
  :
  (λ _ : triangle_identity
           (pr11 ((((λ ..., ...)
                    :
                    leftunitor_data (pr111 M)
                      (pr211 M)),,
                   ((λ ... ..., ...) : (...) (...))),,
                  ((λ x : C, ... x)
                   :
                   leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M)
                     (pr211 M)),,
                  ((λ x : C, ... x)
                   :
                   (λ ..., ...) (... : ...))))
           (pr11 ((((λ ..., ...)
                    :
                    rightunitor_data (pr111 M)
                      (pr211 M)),,
                   ((λ ... ..., ...) : (...) (...))),,
                  ((λ x : C, ... x)
                   :
                   rightunitorinv_data (pr111 M)
                     (pr211 M)),,
                  ((λ x : C, ... x)
                   :
                   (λ ..., ...) (... : ...))))
           (pr11 ((((λ ..., ...)
                    :
                    associator_data (pr111 M)),,
                   ((...)
                    :
                    associator_nat_leftwhisker ...),,
                   (... : ...),, (... : ...)),,
                  ((λ x y0 z : C, ... x y0 z)
                   :
                   associatorinv_data (pr111 M)),,
                  ((λ x y0 z : C, ... x y0 z)
                   :
                   (λ ..., ...) (... : ...)))),
   pentagon_identity
     (pr11 ((((λ x y0 z : C, ... x y0 z)
              :
              associator_data (pr111 M)),,
             ((λ ... ..., ...)
              :
              associator_nat_leftwhisker (...)),,
             ((...) : associator_nat_rightwhisker ...),,
             ((...) : ... ...)),,
            ((λ x y0 z : C, (pr122 ...) x y0 z)
             :
             associatorinv_data (pr111 M)),,
            ((λ x y0 z : C, (pr222 ...) x y0 z)
             :
             (λ assi : ...,
              associator_iso_law ... assi)
               ((...) : associatorinv_data ...)))))
    ((λ x y0 : C, (pr112 M) x y0)
     :
     triangle_identity
       (pr11 ((((λ x : C, ... x)
                :
                leftunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
               ((λ (x y0 : C) (f : ...), ... x y0 f)
                :
                (λ ..., ...) (... : ...))),,
              ((λ x : C, (pr112 ...) x)
               :
               leftunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
              ((λ x : C, (pr212 ...) x)
               :
               (λ lui : ...,
                leftunitor_iso_law ... lui)
                 ((...) : leftunitorinv_data ... ...))))
       (pr11 ((((λ x : C, ... x)
                :
                rightunitor_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
               ((λ (x y0 : C) (f : ...), ... x y0 f)
                :
                (λ ..., ...) (... : ...))),,
              ((λ x : C, (pr112 ...) x)
               :
               rightunitorinv_data (pr111 M) (pr211 M)),,
              ((λ x : C, (pr212 ...) x)
               :
               (λ rui : ...,
                rightunitor_iso_law ... rui)
                 ((...) : rightunitorinv_data ... ...))))
       (pr11 ((((λ x y0 z : C, ... x y0 z)
                :
                associator_data (pr111 M)),,
               ((λ ... ..., ...)
                :
                associator_nat_leftwhisker (...)),,
               ((...)
                :
                associator_nat_rightwhisker ...),,
               ((...) : ... ...)),,
              ((λ x y0 z : C, (pr122 ...) x y0 z)
               :
               associatorinv_data (pr111 M)),,
              ((λ x y0 z : C, (pr222 ...) x y0 z)
               :
               (λ assi : ...,
                associator_iso_law ... assi)
                 ((...) : associatorinv_data ...)))))))
  ((λ M : ∑ (T : bifunctor C C C) (I : C)
          (lu : lunitor0 T I) (ru : runitor0 T I)
          (ass : associator0 T),
          triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru)
            (pr11 ass) × pentagon_identity (pr11 ass),
    ((pr1 M,, pr12 M),,
     (let X := pr122 M in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
     (let X := pr222 M in
      let X0 := pr1 X in let X1 := pr1 X0 in X1),,
     (let X := pr222 M in
      let X0 := pr2 X in
      let X1 := pr1 X0 in let X2 := pr1 X1 in X2)),,
    (((let X := pr122 (pr222 M) in X),,
      (let X := pr222 (pr222 M) in X)),,
     (let X := pr212 (pr2 M) in X),,
     (let X := pr212 (pr22 M) in X),,
     (let X := pr212 (pr222 M) in X)
     :
     (λ M0 : tensor_unit_unitors_associator C,
      pentagontriangle M0
      × unitorsassociator_inverses M0)
       ((pr1 M,, pr12 M),,
        (let X := pr122 M in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
        (let X := pr222 M in
         let X0 := pr1 X in let X1 := pr1 X0 in X1),,
        (let X := pr222 M in
         let X0 := pr2 X in
         let X1 := pr1 X0 in let X2 := pr1 X1 in X2))))
     y) = y
 apply idpath.
  Defined.

End EquivalenceMonoidalCategoriesReordered0WithMonstructs.

Section EquivalenceMonoidalCategoriesReordered0WithUncurried.

  
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lunitor0 T I
≃ left_unitor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I

  
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lunitor0 T I
≃ left_unitor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lunitor0_nattrans T I
≃ I_pretensor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I
  ⟹ functor_identity C
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
∏ x : lunitor0_nattrans T I,
(λ x0 : lunitor0_nattrans T I,
 ∑ lui : leftunitorinv_data T I,
 leftunitor_iso_law (pr1 x0) lui) x
≃ (λ y : I_pretensor
           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I
         ⟹ functor_identity C, is_nat_z_iso y) (?f x)

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lunitor0_nattrans T I
≃ I_pretensor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I
  ⟹ functor_identity C

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
leftunitor_data T I
≃ nat_trans_data
    (I_pretensor
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
    (functor_identity C)
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
∏ x : leftunitor_data T I,
leftunitor_nat x
≃ is_nat_trans
    (I_pretensor
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
    (functor_identity C) (?f x)

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
leftunitor_data T I
≃ nat_trans_data
    (I_pretensor
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
    (functor_identity C)
 apply idweq.
      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
∏ x : leftunitor_data T I,
leftunitor_nat x
≃ is_nat_trans
    (I_pretensor
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
    (functor_identity C)
    (idweq
       (nat_trans_data
          (I_pretensor
             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
          (functor_identity C)) x)
 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: leftunitor_data T I
leftunitor_nat lu
≃ is_nat_trans
    (I_pretensor
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
    (functor_identity C)
    (idweq
       (nat_trans_data
          (I_pretensor
             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
          (functor_identity C)) lu)

          (* show we get natural transformation *)
          
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: leftunitor_data T I
lunat: leftunitor_nat lu
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (I_pretensor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
     I) f
· idweq
    (nat_trans_data
       (I_pretensor
          (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
       (functor_identity C)) lu y =
idweq
  (nat_trans_data
     (I_pretensor
        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
     (functor_identity C)) lu x
· # (functor_identity C) f

     I) f

       (functor_identity C)) lu y = ?b
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C

?b =

  (nat_trans_data

C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: leftunitor_data T I
lunat: leftunitor_nat lu
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (I_pretensor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
     I) f
· idweq
    (nat_trans_data
       (I_pretensor
          (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
       (functor_identity C)) lu y = ?b
 apply maponpaths_2 ; apply when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering.

T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: leftunitor_data T I
lunat: leftunitor_nat lu
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T I (pr2 (I,, x))
  (pr2 (I,, y)) (pr2 (make_dirprod (id I) f))
· idweq
    (nat_trans_data
       (I_pretensor
          (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
       (functor_identity C)) lu y =
idweq
  (nat_trans_data
     (I_pretensor
        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
     (functor_identity C)) lu x
· # (functor_identity C) f

          apply (lunat x y f).

  (I_pretensor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)

          (* show we get the naturality law of the unitor *)
          
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: leftunitor_data T I
lunattrans: is_nat_trans
  (I_pretensor
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T) I) (functor_identity C)
  (idweq
     (nat_trans_data
        (I_pretensor
           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
              T) I) (functor_identity C))
     lu)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T I x y f · lu y =
lu x · f

T: bifunctor C C C

lu: leftunitor_data T I

  (I_pretensor

     lu)
