# (I_pretensor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
     I) f
· idweq
    (nat_trans_data
       (I_pretensor
          (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
       (functor_identity C)) lu y

          
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: leftunitor_data T I
lunattrans: is_nat_trans
  (I_pretensor
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T) I) (functor_identity C)
  (idweq
     (nat_trans_data
        (I_pretensor
           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
              T) I) (functor_identity C))
     lu)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T I x y f =
# (I_pretensor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
     I) f

          apply (! when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering _ _ _).

        
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: leftunitor_data T I
∏ x : leftunitor_nat lu,
(λ lunattrans : is_nat_trans
                  (I_pretensor
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T) I) (functor_identity C)
                  (idweq
                     (nat_trans_data
                        (I_pretensor
                           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                              T) I)
                        (functor_identity C)) lu),
 (λ (x0 y : C) (f : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
  maponpaths_2 compose
    (! when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering T I f)
    (idweq
       (nat_trans_data
          (I_pretensor
             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
          (functor_identity C)) lu y) @
  lunattrans x0 y f)
 :
 leftunitor_nat lu)
  ((λ lunat : leftunitor_nat lu,
    (λ (x0 y : C) (f : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
     maponpaths_2 compose
       (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering T I
          (pr2 (make_dirprod (id I) f)))
       (idweq
          (nat_trans_data
             (I_pretensor
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                I) (functor_identity C)) lu y) @
     lunat x0 y f)
    :
    is_nat_trans
      (I_pretensor
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
      (functor_identity C)
      (idweq
         (nat_trans_data
            (I_pretensor
               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
               I) (functor_identity C)) lu)) x) = x
 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: leftunitor_data T I
x: leftunitor_nat lu
(λ lunattrans : is_nat_trans
                  (I_pretensor
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T) I) (functor_identity C)
                  (idweq
                     (nat_trans_data
                        (I_pretensor
                           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                              T) I)
                        (functor_identity C)) lu),
 (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
  maponpaths_2 compose
    (! when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering T I f)
    (idweq
       (nat_trans_data
          (I_pretensor
             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
          (functor_identity C)) lu y) @
  lunattrans x y f)
 :
 leftunitor_nat lu)
  ((λ lunat : leftunitor_nat lu,
    (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     maponpaths_2 compose
       (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering T I
          (pr2 (make_dirprod (id I) f)))
       (idweq
          (nat_trans_data
             (I_pretensor
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                I) (functor_identity C)) lu y) @
     lunat x y f)
    :
    is_nat_trans
      (I_pretensor
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
      (functor_identity C)
      (idweq
         (nat_trans_data
            (I_pretensor
               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
               I) (functor_identity C)) lu)) x) = x

          (* Show that (lefunitor_nat lu) is a prop. *)
          repeat (apply impred_isaprop ; intro) ; apply homset_property.

        
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: leftunitor_data T I
∏
y : is_nat_trans
      (I_pretensor
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
      (functor_identity C)
      (idweq
         (nat_trans_data
            (I_pretensor
               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
               I) (functor_identity C)) lu),
(λ lunat : leftunitor_nat lu,
 (λ (x y0 : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y0 ⟧),
  maponpaths_2 compose
    (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering T I
       (pr2 (make_dirprod (id I) f)))
    (idweq
       (nat_trans_data
          (I_pretensor
             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
          (functor_identity C)) lu y0) @ lunat x y0 f)
 :
 is_nat_trans
   (I_pretensor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
      I) (functor_identity C)
   (idweq
      (nat_trans_data
         (I_pretensor
            (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
         (functor_identity C)) lu))
  ((λ lunattrans : is_nat_trans
                     (I_pretensor
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T) I) (functor_identity C)
                     (idweq
                        (nat_trans_data
                           (I_pretensor
                              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                 T) I)
                           (functor_identity C)) lu),
    (λ (x y0 : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y0 ⟧),
     maponpaths_2 compose
       (! when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering T I f)
       (idweq
          (nat_trans_data
             (I_pretensor
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                I) (functor_identity C)) lu y0) @
     lunattrans x y0 f)
    :
    leftunitor_nat lu) y) = y
 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: leftunitor_data T I
y: is_nat_trans
  (I_pretensor
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
  (functor_identity C)
  (idweq
     (nat_trans_data
        (I_pretensor
           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
           I) (functor_identity C)) lu)
(λ lunat : leftunitor_nat lu,
 (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
  maponpaths_2 compose
    (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering T I
       (pr2 (make_dirprod (id I) f)))
    (idweq
       (nat_trans_data
          (I_pretensor
             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
          (functor_identity C)) lu y) @ lunat x y f)
 :
 is_nat_trans
   (I_pretensor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
      I) (functor_identity C)
   (idweq
      (nat_trans_data
         (I_pretensor
            (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
         (functor_identity C)) lu))
  ((λ lunattrans : is_nat_trans
                     (I_pretensor
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T) I) (functor_identity C)
                     (idweq
                        (nat_trans_data
                           (I_pretensor
                              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                 T) I)
                           (functor_identity C)) lu),
    (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     maponpaths_2 compose
       (! when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering T I f)
       (idweq
          (nat_trans_data
             (I_pretensor
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                I) (functor_identity C)) lu y) @
     lunattrans x y f)
    :
    leftunitor_nat lu) y) = y

          
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: leftunitor_data T I
y: is_nat_trans
  (I_pretensor
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
  (functor_identity C)
  (idweq
     (nat_trans_data
        (I_pretensor
           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
           I) (functor_identity C)) lu)
has_homsets C

          apply homset_property.
    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
∏ x : lunitor0_nattrans T I,
(λ x0 : lunitor0_nattrans T I,
 ∑ lui : leftunitorinv_data T I,
 leftunitor_iso_law (pr1 x0) lui) x
≃ (λ y : I_pretensor
           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I
         ⟹ functor_identity C, is_nat_z_iso y)
    (weqtotal2
       (idweq
          (nat_trans_data
             (I_pretensor
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                I) (functor_identity C)))
       (λ lu : leftunitor_data T I,
        weq_iso
          (λ lunat : leftunitor_nat lu,
           (λ (x0 y : C) (f : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
            maponpaths_2 compose
              (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering T
                 I (pr2 (make_dirprod (id I) f)))
              (idweq
                 (nat_trans_data
                    (I_pretensor
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T) I) (functor_identity C))
                 lu y) @ lunat x0 y f)
           :
           is_nat_trans
             (I_pretensor
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                I) (functor_identity C)
             (idweq
                (nat_trans_data
                   (I_pretensor
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T) I) (functor_identity C))
                lu))
          (λ lunattrans : is_nat_trans
                            (I_pretensor
                               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                  T) I)
                            (functor_identity C)
                            (idweq
                               (nat_trans_data
                                  (I_pretensor
                                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                        T) I)
                                  (functor_identity C))
                               lu),
           (λ (x0 y : C) (f : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
            maponpaths_2 compose
              (! when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering
                   T I f)
              (idweq
                 (nat_trans_data
                    (I_pretensor
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T) I) (functor_identity C))
                 lu y) @ lunattrans x0 y f)
           :
           leftunitor_nat lu)
          (λ x0 : leftunitor_nat lu,
           let X :=
             λ (P : C → UU)
             (H : ∏ t : C, isaprop (P t))
             (x1 x' : ∏ t : C, P t),
             pr1 (impred_isaprop P H x1 x') in
           X
             (λ t : C,
              ∏ (y : C) (f : C ⟦ t, y ⟧),
              leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T I t y f
              · lu y = lu t · f)
             (λ t : C,
              impred_isaprop
                (λ t0 : C,
                 ∏ f : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                 leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T I t t0
                   f · lu t0 = lu t · f)
                (λ t0 : C,
                 impred_isaprop
                   (λ t1 : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                    leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T I t
                      t0 t1 · lu t0 = lu t · t1)
                   (λ t1 : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                    C (bifunctor_on_objects T I t) t0
                      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T I
                         t t0 t1 · lu t0) (lu t · t1))))
             (λ (x1 y : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, y ⟧),
              maponpaths_2 compose
                (! when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering
                     T I f)
                (idweq
                   (nat_trans_data
                      (I_pretensor
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T) I) (functor_identity C))
                   lu y) @
              maponpaths_2 compose
                (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering
                   T I (pr2 (make_dirprod (id I) f)))
                (idweq
                   (nat_trans_data
                      (I_pretensor
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T) I) (functor_identity C))
                   lu y) @ x0 x1 y f) x0)
          (λ y : is_nat_trans
                   (I_pretensor
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T) I) (functor_identity C)
                   (idweq
                      (nat_trans_data
                         (I_pretensor
                            (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                               T) I)
                         (functor_identity C)) lu),
           let X :=
             λ (C C' : precategory_data)
             (hs : has_homsets C')
             (F F' : functor_data C C')
             (t : nat_trans_data F F')
             (x0 x' : is_nat_trans F F' t),
             pr1
               (isaprop_is_nat_trans C C' hs F F' t x0
                  x') in
           X C C C
             (I_pretensor
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                I) (functor_identity C)
             (idweq
                (nat_trans_data
                   (I_pretensor
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T) I) (functor_identity C))
                lu)
             (λ (x0 y0 : C) (f : C ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
              maponpaths_2 compose
                (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering
                   T I (pr2 (make_dirprod (id I) f)))
                (idweq
                   (nat_trans_data
                      (I_pretensor
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T) I) (functor_identity C))
                   lu y0) @
              maponpaths_2 compose
                (! when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering
                     T I f)
                (idweq
                   (nat_trans_data
                      (I_pretensor
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T) I) (functor_identity C))
                   lu y0) @ y x0 y0 f) y)) x)

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lunat: lunitor0_nattrans T I
(λ x : lunitor0_nattrans T I,
 ∑ lui : leftunitorinv_data T I,
 leftunitor_iso_law (pr1 x) lui) lunat
≃ (λ y : I_pretensor
           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I
         ⟹ functor_identity C, is_nat_z_iso y)
    (weqtotal2
       (idweq
          (nat_trans_data
             (I_pretensor
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                I) (functor_identity C)))
       (λ lu : leftunitor_data T I,
        weq_iso
          (λ lunat : leftunitor_nat lu,
           (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
            maponpaths_2 compose
              (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering T
                 I (pr2 (make_dirprod (id I) f)))
              (idweq
                 (nat_trans_data
                    (I_pretensor
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T) I) (functor_identity C))
                 lu y) @ lunat x y f)
           :
           is_nat_trans
             (I_pretensor
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                I) (functor_identity C)
             (idweq
                (nat_trans_data
                   (I_pretensor
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T) I) (functor_identity C))
                lu))
          (λ lunattrans : is_nat_trans
                            (I_pretensor
                               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                  T) I)
                            (functor_identity C)
                            (idweq
                               (nat_trans_data
                                  (I_pretensor
                                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                        T) I)
                                  (functor_identity C))
                               lu),
           (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
            maponpaths_2 compose
              (! when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering
                   T I f)
              (idweq
                 (nat_trans_data
                    (I_pretensor
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T) I) (functor_identity C))
                 lu y) @ lunattrans x y f)
           :
           leftunitor_nat lu)
          (λ x : leftunitor_nat lu,
           let X :=
             λ (P : C → UU)
             (H : ∏ t : C, isaprop (P t))
             (x0 x' : ∏ t : C, P t),
             pr1 (impred_isaprop P H x0 x') in
           X
             (λ t : C,
              ∏ (y : C) (f : C ⟦ t, y ⟧),
              leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T I t y f
              · lu y = lu t · f)
             (λ t : C,
              impred_isaprop
                (λ t0 : C,
                 ∏ f : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                 leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T I t t0
                   f · lu t0 = lu t · f)
                (λ t0 : C,
                 impred_isaprop
                   (λ t1 : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                    leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T I t
                      t0 t1 · lu t0 = lu t · t1)
                   (λ t1 : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                    C (bifunctor_on_objects T I t) t0
                      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T I
                         t t0 t1 · lu t0) (lu t · t1))))
             (λ (x0 y : C) (f : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
              maponpaths_2 compose
                (! when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering
                     T I f)
                (idweq
                   (nat_trans_data
                      (I_pretensor
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T) I) (functor_identity C))
                   lu y) @
              maponpaths_2 compose
                (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering
                   T I (pr2 (make_dirprod (id I) f)))
                (idweq
                   (nat_trans_data
                      (I_pretensor
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T) I) (functor_identity C))
                   lu y) @ x x0 y f) x)
          (λ y : is_nat_trans
                   (I_pretensor
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T) I) (functor_identity C)
                   (idweq
                      (nat_trans_data
                         (I_pretensor
                            (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                               T) I)
                         (functor_identity C)) lu),
           let X :=
             λ (C C' : precategory_data)
             (hs : has_homsets C')
             (F F' : functor_data C C')
             (t : nat_trans_data F F')
             (x x' : is_nat_trans F F' t),
             pr1
               (isaprop_is_nat_trans C C' hs F F' t x
                  x') in
           X C C C
             (I_pretensor
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                I) (functor_identity C)
             (idweq
                (nat_trans_data
                   (I_pretensor
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T) I) (functor_identity C))
                lu)
             (λ (x y0 : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y0 ⟧),
              maponpaths_2 compose
                (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering
                   T I (pr2 (make_dirprod (id I) f)))
                (idweq
                   (nat_trans_data
                      (I_pretensor
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T) I) (functor_identity C))
                   lu y0) @
              maponpaths_2 compose
                (! when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering
                     T I f)
                (idweq
                   (nat_trans_data
                      (I_pretensor
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T) I) (functor_identity C))
                   lu y0) @ y x y0 f) y)) lunat)

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lunat: lunitor0_nattrans T I
(∑ lui : leftunitorinv_data T I,
 leftunitor_iso_law (pr1 lunat) lui)
≃ is_nat_z_iso (pr1 lunat)

    use (weqtotaltoforall (X := C) (λ x,  C ⟦ x, bifunctor_on_objects T I x ⟧)).
  Defined.

  
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
runitor0 T I
≃ right_unitor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
    I

  
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
runitor0 T I
≃ right_unitor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
    I

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
runitor0_nattrans T I
≃ I_posttensor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
    I ⟹ functor_identity C
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
∏ x : runitor0_nattrans T I,
(λ x0 : runitor0_nattrans T I,
 ∑ rui : rightunitorinv_data T I,
 rightunitor_iso_law (pr1 x0) rui) x
≃ (λ y : I_posttensor
           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I
         ⟹ functor_identity C, is_nat_z_iso y) (?f x)

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
runitor0_nattrans T I
≃ I_posttensor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
    I ⟹ functor_identity C

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
rightunitor_data T I
≃ nat_trans_data
    (I_posttensor
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
    (functor_identity C)
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
∏ x : rightunitor_data T I,
rightunitor_nat x
≃ is_nat_trans
    (I_posttensor
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
    (functor_identity C) (?f x)

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
rightunitor_data T I
≃ nat_trans_data
    (I_posttensor
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
    (functor_identity C)
 apply idweq.
      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
∏ x : rightunitor_data T I,
rightunitor_nat x
≃ is_nat_trans
    (I_posttensor
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
    (functor_identity C)
    (idweq
       (nat_trans_data
          (I_posttensor
             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
          (functor_identity C)) x)
 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: rightunitor_data T I
rightunitor_nat lu
≃ is_nat_trans
    (I_posttensor
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
    (functor_identity C)
    (idweq
       (nat_trans_data
          (I_posttensor
             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
          (functor_identity C)) lu)

T: bifunctor C C C
I: C

rightunitor_nat lu
→ is_nat_trans
    (I_posttensor
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
    (functor_identity C)
    (idweq
       (nat_trans_data
          (I_posttensor
             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
          (functor_identity C)) lu)
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: rightunitor_data T I
is_nat_trans
  (I_posttensor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
     I) (functor_identity C)
  (idweq
     (nat_trans_data
        (I_posttensor
           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
        (functor_identity C)) lu) → rightunitor_nat lu
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: rightunitor_data T I
∏ x : rightunitor_nat lu, ?g (?f x) = x
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: rightunitor_data T I
∏
y : is_nat_trans
      (I_posttensor
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
      (functor_identity C)
      (idweq
         (nat_trans_data
            (I_posttensor
               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
               I) (functor_identity C)) lu),
?f (?g y) = y

→ is_nat_trans

  (I_posttensor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
     I) (functor_identity C)

        (functor_identity C)) lu)

          (* show we get natural transformation *)
          
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: rightunitor_data T I
runat: rightunitor_nat lu
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (I_posttensor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
     I) f
· idweq
    (nat_trans_data
       (I_posttensor
          (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
       (functor_identity C)) lu y =
idweq
  (nat_trans_data
     (I_posttensor
        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
     (functor_identity C)) lu x
· # (functor_identity C) f

          
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: rightunitor_data T I
runat: rightunitor_nat lu
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (I_posttensor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
     I) f
· idweq
    (nat_trans_data
       (I_posttensor
          (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
       (functor_identity C)) lu y = ?b
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: rightunitor_data T I
runat: rightunitor_nat lu
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
idweq
  (nat_trans_data
     (I_posttensor
        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
     (functor_identity C)) lu x
· # (functor_identity C) f
 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: rightunitor_data T I
runat: rightunitor_nat lu
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (I_posttensor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
     I) f
· idweq
    (nat_trans_data
       (I_posttensor
          (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
       (functor_identity C)) lu y = ?b
 apply maponpaths_2 ; apply when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering. 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: rightunitor_data T I
runat: rightunitor_nat lu
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T I (pr1 (x,, I))
  (pr1 (y,, I)) (pr1 (make_dirprod f (id I)))
· idweq
    (nat_trans_data
       (I_posttensor
          (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
       (functor_identity C)) lu y =
idweq
  (nat_trans_data
     (I_posttensor
        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
     (functor_identity C)) lu x
· # (functor_identity C) f

          apply (runat x y f).

T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: rightunitor_data T I
is_nat_trans
  (I_posttensor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
     I) (functor_identity C)
  (idweq
     (nat_trans_data
        (I_posttensor
           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
        (functor_identity C)) lu) → rightunitor_nat lu

  (I_posttensor

              T) I) (functor_identity C))
     lu)
rightunitor_nat lu

          (* show we get the naturality law of the unitor *)
          
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: rightunitor_data T I
runattrans: is_nat_trans
  (I_posttensor
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T) I) (functor_identity C)
  (idweq
     (nat_trans_data
        (I_posttensor
           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
              T) I) (functor_identity C))
     lu)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T I x y f · lu y =
lu x · f

          
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: rightunitor_data T I
runattrans: is_nat_trans
  (I_posttensor
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T) I) (functor_identity C)
  (idweq
     (nat_trans_data
        (I_posttensor
           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
              T) I) (functor_identity C))
     lu)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T I x y f · lu y =
# (I_posttensor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
     I) f
· idweq
    (nat_trans_data
       (I_posttensor
          (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
       (functor_identity C)) lu y

          
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: rightunitor_data T I
runattrans: is_nat_trans
  (I_posttensor
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T) I) (functor_identity C)
  (idweq
     (nat_trans_data
        (I_posttensor
           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
              T) I) (functor_identity C))
     lu)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T I x y f =
# (I_posttensor (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
     I) f

          apply (! when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering _ _ _).

        
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: rightunitor_data T I
∏ x : rightunitor_nat lu,
(λ runattrans : is_nat_trans
                  (I_posttensor
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T) I) (functor_identity C)
                  (idweq
                     (nat_trans_data
                        (I_posttensor
                           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                              T) I)
                        (functor_identity C)) lu),
 (λ (x0 y : C) (f : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
  maponpaths_2 compose
    (! when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering T I f)
    (idweq
       (nat_trans_data
          (I_posttensor
             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
          (functor_identity C)) lu y) @
  runattrans x0 y f)
 :
 rightunitor_nat lu)
  ((λ runat : rightunitor_nat lu,
    (λ (x0 y : C) (f : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
     maponpaths_2 compose
       (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering T I
          (pr1 (make_dirprod f (id I))))
       (idweq
          (nat_trans_data
             (I_posttensor
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                I) (functor_identity C)) lu y) @
     runat x0 y f)
    :
    is_nat_trans
      (I_posttensor
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
      (functor_identity C)
      (idweq
         (nat_trans_data
            (I_posttensor
               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
               I) (functor_identity C)) lu)) x) = x
 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: rightunitor_data T I
x: rightunitor_nat lu
(λ runattrans : is_nat_trans
                  (I_posttensor
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T) I) (functor_identity C)
                  (idweq
                     (nat_trans_data
                        (I_posttensor
                           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                              T) I)
                        (functor_identity C)) lu),
 (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
  maponpaths_2 compose
    (! when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering T I f)
    (idweq
       (nat_trans_data
          (I_posttensor
             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
          (functor_identity C)) lu y) @
  runattrans x y f)
 :
 rightunitor_nat lu)
  ((λ runat : rightunitor_nat lu,
    (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     maponpaths_2 compose
       (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering T I
          (pr1 (make_dirprod f (id I))))
       (idweq
          (nat_trans_data
             (I_posttensor
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                I) (functor_identity C)) lu y) @
     runat x y f)
    :
    is_nat_trans
      (I_posttensor
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
      (functor_identity C)
      (idweq
         (nat_trans_data
            (I_posttensor
               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
               I) (functor_identity C)) lu)) x) = x

          (* Show that (rightunitor_nat lu) is a prop. *)
          repeat (apply impred_isaprop ; intro) ; apply homset_property.

        
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: rightunitor_data T I
∏
y : is_nat_trans
      (I_posttensor
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
      (functor_identity C)
      (idweq
         (nat_trans_data
            (I_posttensor
               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
               I) (functor_identity C)) lu),
(λ runat : rightunitor_nat lu,
 (λ (x y0 : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y0 ⟧),
  maponpaths_2 compose
    (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering T I
       (pr1 (make_dirprod f (id I))))
    (idweq
       (nat_trans_data
          (I_posttensor
             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
          (functor_identity C)) lu y0) @ runat x y0 f)
 :
 is_nat_trans
   (I_posttensor
      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
   (functor_identity C)
   (idweq
      (nat_trans_data
         (I_posttensor
            (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
         (functor_identity C)) lu))
  ((λ runattrans : is_nat_trans
                     (I_posttensor
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T) I) (functor_identity C)
                     (idweq
                        (nat_trans_data
                           (I_posttensor
                              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                 T) I)
                           (functor_identity C)) lu),
    (λ (x y0 : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y0 ⟧),
     maponpaths_2 compose
       (! when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering T I f)
       (idweq
          (nat_trans_data
             (I_posttensor
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                I) (functor_identity C)) lu y0) @
     runattrans x y0 f)
    :
    rightunitor_nat lu) y) = y
 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: rightunitor_data T I
y: is_nat_trans
  (I_posttensor
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
  (functor_identity C)
  (idweq
     (nat_trans_data
        (I_posttensor
           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
           I) (functor_identity C)) lu)
(λ runat : rightunitor_nat lu,
 (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
  maponpaths_2 compose
    (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering T I
       (pr1 (make_dirprod f (id I))))
    (idweq
       (nat_trans_data
          (I_posttensor
             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
          (functor_identity C)) lu y) @ runat x y f)
 :
 is_nat_trans
   (I_posttensor
      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
   (functor_identity C)
   (idweq
      (nat_trans_data
         (I_posttensor
            (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
         (functor_identity C)) lu))
  ((λ runattrans : is_nat_trans
                     (I_posttensor
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T) I) (functor_identity C)
                     (idweq
                        (nat_trans_data
                           (I_posttensor
                              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                 T) I)
                           (functor_identity C)) lu),
    (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     maponpaths_2 compose
       (! when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering T I f)
       (idweq
          (nat_trans_data
             (I_posttensor
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                I) (functor_identity C)) lu y) @
     runattrans x y f)
    :
    rightunitor_nat lu) y) = y

          
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: rightunitor_data T I
y: is_nat_trans
  (I_posttensor
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I)
  (functor_identity C)
  (idweq
     (nat_trans_data
        (I_posttensor
           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
           I) (functor_identity C)) lu)
has_homsets C

          apply homset_property.
    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
∏ x : runitor0_nattrans T I,
(λ x0 : runitor0_nattrans T I,
 ∑ rui : rightunitorinv_data T I,
 rightunitor_iso_law (pr1 x0) rui) x
≃ (λ y : I_posttensor
           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I
         ⟹ functor_identity C, is_nat_z_iso y)
    (weqtotal2
       (idweq
          (nat_trans_data
             (I_posttensor
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                I) (functor_identity C)))
       (λ lu : rightunitor_data T I,
        weq_iso
          (λ runat : rightunitor_nat lu,
           (λ (x0 y : C) (f : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
            maponpaths_2 compose
              (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering
                 T I (pr1 (make_dirprod f (id I))))
              (idweq
                 (nat_trans_data
                    (I_posttensor
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T) I) (functor_identity C))
                 lu y) @ runat x0 y f)
           :
           is_nat_trans
             (I_posttensor
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                I) (functor_identity C)
             (idweq
                (nat_trans_data
                   (I_posttensor
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T) I) (functor_identity C))
                lu))
          (λ runattrans : is_nat_trans
                            (I_posttensor
                               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                  T) I)
                            (functor_identity C)
                            (idweq
                               (nat_trans_data
                                  (I_posttensor
                                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                        T) I)
                                  (functor_identity C))
                               lu),
           (λ (x0 y : C) (f : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
            maponpaths_2 compose
              (! when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering
                   T I f)
              (idweq
                 (nat_trans_data
                    (I_posttensor
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T) I) (functor_identity C))
                 lu y) @ runattrans x0 y f)
           :
           rightunitor_nat lu)
          (λ x0 : rightunitor_nat lu,
           let X :=
             λ (P : C → UU)
             (H : ∏ t : C, isaprop (P t))
             (x1 x' : ∏ t : C, P t),
             pr1 (impred_isaprop P H x1 x') in
           X
             (λ t : C,
              ∏ (y : C) (f : C ⟦ t, y ⟧),
              rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T I t y f
              · lu y = lu t · f)
             (λ t : C,
              impred_isaprop
                (λ t0 : C,
                 ∏ f : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                 rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T I t t0
                   f · lu t0 = lu t · f)
                (λ t0 : C,
                 impred_isaprop
                   (λ t1 : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                    rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T I t
                      t0 t1 · lu t0 = lu t · t1)
                   (λ t1 : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                    C (bifunctor_on_objects T t I) t0
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         I t t0 t1 · lu t0)
                      (lu t · t1))))
             (λ (x1 y : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, y ⟧),
              maponpaths_2 compose
                (! when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering
                     T I f)
                (idweq
                   (nat_trans_data
                      (I_posttensor
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T) I) (functor_identity C))
                   lu y) @
              maponpaths_2 compose
                (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering
                   T I (pr1 (make_dirprod f (id I))))
                (idweq
                   (nat_trans_data
                      (I_posttensor
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T) I) (functor_identity C))
                   lu y) @ x0 x1 y f) x0)
          (λ y : is_nat_trans
                   (I_posttensor
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T) I) (functor_identity C)
                   (idweq
                      (nat_trans_data
                         (I_posttensor
                            (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                               T) I)
                         (functor_identity C)) lu),
           let X :=
             λ (C C' : precategory_data)
             (hs : has_homsets C')
             (F F' : functor_data C C')
             (t : nat_trans_data F F')
             (x0 x' : is_nat_trans F F' t),
             pr1
               (isaprop_is_nat_trans C C' hs F F' t x0
                  x') in
           X C C C
             (I_posttensor
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                I) (functor_identity C)
             (idweq
                (nat_trans_data
                   (I_posttensor
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T) I) (functor_identity C))
                lu)
             (λ (x0 y0 : C) (f : C ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
              maponpaths_2 compose
                (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering
                   T I (pr1 (make_dirprod f (id I))))
                (idweq
                   (nat_trans_data
                      (I_posttensor
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T) I) (functor_identity C))
                   lu y0) @
              maponpaths_2 compose
                (! when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering
                     T I f)
                (idweq
                   (nat_trans_data
                      (I_posttensor
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T) I) (functor_identity C))
                   lu y0) @ y x0 y0 f) y)) x)

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
x: runitor0_nattrans T I
(λ x : runitor0_nattrans T I,
 ∑ rui : rightunitorinv_data T I,
 rightunitor_iso_law (pr1 x) rui) x
≃ (λ y : I_posttensor
           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) I
         ⟹ functor_identity C, is_nat_z_iso y)
    (weqtotal2
       (idweq
          (nat_trans_data
             (I_posttensor
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                I) (functor_identity C)))
       (λ lu : rightunitor_data T I,
        weq_iso
          (λ runat : rightunitor_nat lu,
           (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
            maponpaths_2 compose
              (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering
                 T I (pr1 (make_dirprod f (id I))))
              (idweq
                 (nat_trans_data
                    (I_posttensor
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T) I) (functor_identity C))
                 lu y) @ runat x y f)
           :
           is_nat_trans
             (I_posttensor
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                I) (functor_identity C)
             (idweq
                (nat_trans_data
                   (I_posttensor
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T) I) (functor_identity C))
                lu))
          (λ runattrans : is_nat_trans
                            (I_posttensor
                               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                  T) I)
                            (functor_identity C)
                            (idweq
                               (nat_trans_data
                                  (I_posttensor
                                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                        T) I)
                                  (functor_identity C))
                               lu),
           (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
            maponpaths_2 compose
              (! when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering
                   T I f)
              (idweq
                 (nat_trans_data
                    (I_posttensor
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T) I) (functor_identity C))
                 lu y) @ runattrans x y f)
           :
           rightunitor_nat lu)
          (λ x : rightunitor_nat lu,
           let X :=
             λ (P : C → UU)
             (H : ∏ t : C, isaprop (P t))
             (x0 x' : ∏ t : C, P t),
             pr1 (impred_isaprop P H x0 x') in
           X
             (λ t : C,
              ∏ (y : C) (f : C ⟦ t, y ⟧),
              rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T I t y f
              · lu y = lu t · f)
             (λ t : C,
              impred_isaprop
                (λ t0 : C,
                 ∏ f : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                 rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T I t t0
                   f · lu t0 = lu t · f)
                (λ t0 : C,
                 impred_isaprop
                   (λ t1 : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                    rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T I t
                      t0 t1 · lu t0 = lu t · t1)
                   (λ t1 : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                    C (bifunctor_on_objects T t I) t0
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         I t t0 t1 · lu t0)
                      (lu t · t1))))
             (λ (x0 y : C) (f : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
              maponpaths_2 compose
                (! when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering
                     T I f)
                (idweq
                   (nat_trans_data
                      (I_posttensor
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T) I) (functor_identity C))
                   lu y) @
              maponpaths_2 compose
                (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering
                   T I (pr1 (make_dirprod f (id I))))
                (idweq
                   (nat_trans_data
                      (I_posttensor
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T) I) (functor_identity C))
                   lu y) @ x x0 y f) x)
          (λ y : is_nat_trans
                   (I_posttensor
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T) I) (functor_identity C)
                   (idweq
                      (nat_trans_data
                         (I_posttensor
                            (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                               T) I)
                         (functor_identity C)) lu),
           let X :=
             λ (C C' : precategory_data)
             (hs : has_homsets C')
             (F F' : functor_data C C')
             (t : nat_trans_data F F')
             (x x' : is_nat_trans F F' t),
             pr1
               (isaprop_is_nat_trans C C' hs F F' t x
                  x') in
           X C C C
             (I_posttensor
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                I) (functor_identity C)
             (idweq
                (nat_trans_data
                   (I_posttensor
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T) I) (functor_identity C))
                lu)
             (λ (x y0 : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y0 ⟧),
              maponpaths_2 compose
                (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering
                   T I (pr1 (make_dirprod f (id I))))
                (idweq
                   (nat_trans_data
                      (I_posttensor
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T) I) (functor_identity C))
                   lu y0) @
              maponpaths_2 compose
                (! when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering
                     T I f)
                (idweq
                   (nat_trans_data
                      (I_posttensor
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T) I) (functor_identity C))
                   lu y0) @ y x y0 f) y)) x)

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
x: runitor0_nattrans T I
(∑ rui : rightunitorinv_data T I,
 rightunitor_iso_law (pr1 x) rui)
≃ is_nat_z_iso (pr1 x)

    use (weqtotaltoforall (X := C) (λ x,  C ⟦ x , bifunctor_on_objects T x I ⟧)).
  Defined.

  
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
associator_nat_leftwhisker ass

  
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
associator_nat_leftwhisker ass

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
ass x y z1
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h) =
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h · ass x y z2

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
 ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz)) 
  ((x, y), z1)
· # (assoc_right
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
    ((id x #, id y) #, h) =
# (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
  ((id x #, id y) #, h)
· (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
    ((x, y), z2)
ass x y z1
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h) =
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h · ass x y z2

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· functoronmorphisms1 T 
    (id x) (functoronmorphisms1 T (id y) h) =
functoronmorphisms1 T
  (functoronmorphisms1 T (id x) (id y)) h
· ass x y z2
ass x y z1
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h) =
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h · ass x y z2

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
ass x y z1
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h) =
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h · ass x y z2

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
ass x y z1
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h) =
ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h))
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h · 
ass x y z2 =
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h · 
ass x y z2

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
ass x y z1
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h) =
ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h))

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
ass x y z1
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h) = ?b
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
?b =
ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h))

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
?b =
ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h))
 apply maponpaths ; apply maponpaths_2 ; apply when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering. 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
ass x y z1
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h) =
ass x y z1
· (functoronmorphisms1 T (id x)
     (id bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h))

T: bifunctor C C C

  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
ass x y z1
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h) = ?b
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
?b =
ass x y z1
· (functoronmorphisms1 T 
     (id x) (id bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h))

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
?b =
ass x y z1
· (functoronmorphisms1 T (id x)
     (id bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h))
 apply maponpaths ; apply maponpaths_2 ; use (! bifunctor_distributes_over_id _ _ _ _) ; apply T. 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
ass x y z1
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h) =
ass x y z1
· (id bifunctor_on_objects T x
        (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h))

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h) =
id bifunctor_on_objects T x
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y (id y)
     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)

  (assoc_left

        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))

   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h) = ?b

T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =

  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
?b =
id bifunctor_on_objects T x
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y (id y)
     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)

  (assoc_left

        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat

   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)

  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
?b =
id bifunctor_on_objects T x
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y (id y)
     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)
 do 2 apply maponpaths ; apply maponpaths_2 ; apply when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering. 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h) =
id bifunctor_on_objects T x
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
    (functoronmorphisms1 T (id y) (id z1)
     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)

t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1)

· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x

   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x

       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)

          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =

  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h) = ?b

T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
?b =
id bifunctor_on_objects T x
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
    (functoronmorphisms1 T (id y) (id z1)
     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
?b =
id bifunctor_on_objects T x
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
    (functoronmorphisms1 T (id y) (id z1)
     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)

        do 2 apply maponpaths ; apply maponpaths_2 ; use (! bifunctor_distributes_over_id _ _ _ _) ; apply T. 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h) =
id bifunctor_on_objects T x
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
    (id bifunctor_on_objects T y z1
     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h) = ?b

  (assoc_left

     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x

    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)

   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)

    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)

     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)
 do 2 apply maponpaths ; apply (! id_left _).

    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T

   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))

    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2

  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h) =

    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)

T: bifunctor C C C
