  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h · ass x y z2 =
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h · ass x y z2


    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h · ass x y z2 =
?b
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
?b =
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h · 
ass x y z2

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h · ass x y z2 =
?b

ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y)) = 
?y'

t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x

   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)

  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)

    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h

  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)

C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
?b = ?y'
 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y)) = 
?b

        
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y) = ?t2

T: bifunctor C C C

  (assoc_left

        T))

h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =

  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y) = ?b
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =

  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
?b = ?t2
 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y) = ?b
 apply maponpaths ; apply bifunctor_leftid. 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
· id bifunctor_on_objects T x y = ?t2

· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2

· id bifunctor_on_objects T x y = ?b

C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
· id bifunctor_on_objects T x y = ?b
 apply id_right. 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x) = ?t2

        apply bifunctor_rightid.
      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (id bifunctor_on_objects T x y) = ?y'

      apply bifunctor_rightid.
    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
id bifunctor_on_objects T (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
     z1
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h · ass x y z2 =
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h · ass x y z2

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
id bifunctor_on_objects T (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
     z1
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h · ass x y z2 =
?b
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
?b =
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h · 
ass x y z2
 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
id bifunctor_on_objects T (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
     z1
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h · ass x y z2 =
?b
 apply assoc'. 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y, z1, z2: C
h: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y), z1) 
    ((x, y), z2) ((id x #, id y) #, h): ass x y z1
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1) x x 
     (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z1)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z2)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1 y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z1 z2 h)) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z1
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x x (id x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h
· ass x y z2
id bifunctor_on_objects T (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
     z1
· (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h · ass x y z2) =
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z1 z2 h · ass x y z2

    apply id_left.
  Qed.

  
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
associator_nat_rightwhisker ass

  
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C

  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))

C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ass x1 y z
· rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f)
· ass x2 y z

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
 ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz)) 
  ((x1, y), z)
· # (assoc_right
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
    ((f #, id y) #, id z) =
# (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
  ((f #, id y) #, id z)
· (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
    ((x2, y), z)
ass x1 y z
· rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f)
· ass x2 y z

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· functoronmorphisms1 T f
    (functoronmorphisms1 T (id y) (id z)) =
functoronmorphisms1 T
  (functoronmorphisms1 T f (id y)) 
  (id z) · ass x2 y z
ass x1 y z
· rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f)
· ass x2 y z

T: bifunctor C C C

  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat

        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
ass x1 y z
· rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f)
· ass x2 y z

        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z (id z)))

  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z

  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)

x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)

· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
ass x1 y z
· rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f =
ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f

       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)

C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
ass x1 y z
· rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f = ?b
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
?b =
ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z (id z)))

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
?b =
ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z (id z)))
 apply maponpaths ; apply maponpaths_2 ; apply when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering. 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
ass x1 y z
· rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f =
ass x1 y z
· (functoronmorphisms1 T f
     (id bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z (id z)))

  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat

  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))

   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
ass x1 y z
· rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f = ?b
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z

  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)

   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
?b =
ass x1 y z
· (functoronmorphisms1 T f
     (id bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z (id z)))

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
?b =
ass x1 y z
· (functoronmorphisms1 T f
     (id bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z (id z)))

        
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
?y =
functoronmorphisms1 T f
  (id bifunctor_on_objects T y z)

        apply (! when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering _ _ _).
      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
ass x1 y z
· rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f =
ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z (id z)))

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y (id y)
     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z (id z))


      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =

  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f = ?b

  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)

     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z (id z))

  (assoc_left

     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat

   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))

t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z

  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y (id y)
     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z (id z))

C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =

  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
    (functoronmorphisms1 T (id y) (id z)
     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z (id z))

  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)

   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z

  (assoc_left

        T))

   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))

    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f

  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)

· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T

  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
    (functoronmorphisms1 T (id y) (id z)
     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z (id z))

  (assoc_left

   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2

       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)

          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =

  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z

rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
    (functoronmorphisms1 T (id y) (id z)
     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z (id z))

        do 2 apply maponpaths ; apply maponpaths_2 ; use (! bifunctor_distributes_over_id _ _ _ _) ; apply T.

T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
    (id bifunctor_on_objects T y z
     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z (id z))

     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
?b =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
    (id bifunctor_on_objects T y z
     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z (id z))
 do 2 apply maponpaths ; apply (! id_left _). 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z (id z))

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f = ?b

  (assoc_left

    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z

       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)

            (id z))) =

  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)

   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z

  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z (id z))

· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T

C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
?t1 =
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
  (id bifunctor_on_objects T y z)

        apply (! bifunctor_leftid _ _ _).
      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
· id bifunctor_on_objects T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)

      apply  (! id_right _).
    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z (id z)
· ass x2 y z =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f)
· ass x2 y z

  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat

  (assoc_right

        T))

   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z (id z)
· ass x2 y z = ?b
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
?b =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f)
· ass x2 y z

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z (id z)
· ass x2 y z = ?b

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y)) =
?y'

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y) = ?t2

  (assoc_left

        T))

        T))

   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C

t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)

          (id y)

· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z

· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y) = ?b
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
?b = ?t2
 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y) = ?b
 apply maponpaths ; apply bifunctor_leftid. 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
· id bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y = ?t2

      apply id_right.
    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f)
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z (id z)
· ass x2 y z =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f)
· ass x2 y z

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f)
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z (id z)
· ass x2 y z = ?b
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
?b =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f)
· ass x2 y z
 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f)
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z (id z)
· ass x2 y z = ?b

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z (id z) = ?t2

      apply bifunctor_leftid.
    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f)
· id bifunctor_on_objects T
       (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z · ass x2 y z =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f)
· ass x2 y z

T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T

  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f)
· id bifunctor_on_objects T
       (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z · ass x2 y z =
?b
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
?b =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f)
· ass x2 y z
 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f)
· id bifunctor_on_objects T
       (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z · ass x2 y z =
?b
 apply assoc'. 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f)
· (id bifunctor_on_objects T
        (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z · ass x2 y z) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f)
· ass x2 y z

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x1, x2, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x1, y), z) 
    ((x2, y), z) ((f #, id y) #, id z): ass x1 y z
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y y
          (id y)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z z
            (id z))) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x1 y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y x1 x2 f
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x2 y y (id y))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z z 
    (id z) · ass x2 y z
id bifunctor_on_objects T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T x2 y) z · ass x2 y z =
ass x2 y z

    apply id_left.
  Qed.

  (assoc_left

        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass
