C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y1, y2, z: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
ass x y1 z
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y1 z)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y2 z)
    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y1 y2 g) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y1)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y2)
  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y1 y2 g)
· ass x y2 z

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y1, y2, z: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y1), z) 
    ((x, y2), z) ((id x #, g) #, id z): (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
 ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz)) 
  ((x, y1), z)
· # (assoc_right
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
    ((id x #, g) #, id z) =
# (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
  ((id x #, g) #, id z)
· (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
    ((x, y2), z)
ass x y1 z
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y1 z)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y2 z)
    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y1 y2 g) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y1)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y2)
  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y1 y2 g)
· ass x y2 z

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y1, y2, z: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y1), z) 
    ((x, y2), z) ((id x #, g) #, id z): ass x y1 z
· functoronmorphisms1 T 
    (id x) (functoronmorphisms1 T g (id z)) =
functoronmorphisms1 T
  (functoronmorphisms1 T (id x) g) 
  (id z) · ass x y2 z
ass x y1 z
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y1 z)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T y2 z)
    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y1 y2 g) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y1)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y2)
  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y1 y2 g)
· ass x y2 z

  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,

x, y1, y2, z: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y1), z) 
    ((x, y2), z) ((id x #, g) #, id z): ass x y1 z
· functoronmorphisms1 T 
    (id x) (functoronmorphisms1 T g (id z)) =

  (id z) · ass x y2 z

    (bifunctor_on_objects T y2 z)
    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y1 y2 g) =
ass x y1 z
· functoronmorphisms1 T (id x)
    (functoronmorphisms1 T g (id z))

x, y1, y2, z: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y1), z) 
    ((x, y2), z) ((id x #, g) #, id z): ass x y1 z

  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y1, y2, z: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y1), z) 
    ((x, y2), z) ((id x #, g) #, id z): ass x y1 z
· functoronmorphisms1 T 
    (id x) (functoronmorphisms1 T g (id z)) =
functoronmorphisms1 T
  (functoronmorphisms1 T (id x) g) 
  (id z) · ass x y2 z
?b =
ass x y1 z
· functoronmorphisms1 T (id x)
    (functoronmorphisms1 T g (id z))
 do 2 apply maponpaths ; apply (! when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering _ _ _).

  (assoc_left

x, y1, y2, z: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y1), z) 
    ((x, y2), z) ((id x #, g) #, id z): ass x y1 z
· functoronmorphisms1 T 
    (id x) (functoronmorphisms1 T g (id z)) =
functoronmorphisms1 T

· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x

    (bifunctor_on_objects T y2 z)

C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y1, y2, z: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y1), z) 
    ((x, y2), z) ((id x #, g) #, id z): ass x y1 z
· functoronmorphisms1 T 
    (id x) (functoronmorphisms1 T g (id z)) =
functoronmorphisms1 T
  (functoronmorphisms1 T (id x) g) 
  (id z) · ass x y2 z
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y1 z)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T y2 z)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y1 y2 g) =
functoronmorphisms1 T (id x)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z y1 y2 g)

      apply (! when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering _ _ _).

    ((x, y2), z) ((id x #, g) #, id z): ass x y1 z
· functoronmorphisms1 T 
    (id x) (functoronmorphisms1 T g (id z)) =
functoronmorphisms1 T
  (functoronmorphisms1 T (id x) g) 
  (id z) · ass x y2 z
functoronmorphisms1 T (functoronmorphisms1 T (id x) g)
  (id z) · ass x y2 z =

  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y1)

  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y1 y2 g)
· ass x y2 z

  (assoc_left

     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat

x, y1, y2, z: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y1), z) 
    ((x, y2), z) ((id x #, g) #, id z): ass x y1 z
· functoronmorphisms1 T

  (functoronmorphisms1 T (id x) g)

  (id z) · ass x y2 z = ?b
 do 2 apply maponpaths_2 ; apply when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering. 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y1, y2, z: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y1), z) 
    ((x, y2), z) ((id x #, g) #, id z): ass x y1 z
· functoronmorphisms1 T 
    (id x) (functoronmorphisms1 T g (id z)) =
functoronmorphisms1 T
  (functoronmorphisms1 T (id x) g) 
  (id z) · ass x y2 z
functoronmorphisms1 T
  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y1 y2 g) (id z)
· ass x y2 z =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y1)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y2)
  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y1 y2 g)
· ass x y2 z

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnattrans: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
        T))
  (λ xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
x, y1, y2, z: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
t:= ! assnattrans ((x, y1), z) 
    ((x, y2), z) ((id x #, g) #, id z): ass x y1 z
· functoronmorphisms1 T 
    (id x) (functoronmorphisms1 T g (id z)) =
functoronmorphisms1 T
  (functoronmorphisms1 T (id x) g) 
  (id z) · ass x y2 z
functoronmorphisms1 T
  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y1 y2 g) (id z) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y1)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x y2)
  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x y1 y2 g)

    apply when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering.
  Qed.

  
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
associator0 T
≃ associator (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)

T: bifunctor C C C
associator0 T
≃ associator (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
associator0_nattrans T
≃ assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
  ⟹ assoc_right (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
∏ x : associator0_nattrans T,
(λ x0 : associator0_nattrans T,
 ∑ assi : associatorinv_data T,
 associator_iso_law (pr1 x0) assi) x
≃ (λ y : assoc_left
           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
         ⟹ assoc_right
             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T),
   is_nat_z_iso y) (?f x)

T: bifunctor C C C
associator0_nattrans T
≃ assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
  ⟹ assoc_right (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)

≃ nat_trans_data
    (assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
    (assoc_right
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))

∏ x : associator_data T,
(λ x0 : associator_data T,
 associator_nat_leftwhisker x0
 × associator_nat_rightwhisker x0
   × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker x0) x
≃ is_nat_trans
    (assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
    (assoc_right
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)) (?f x)

≃ nat_trans_data

nat_trans_data
  (assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
  (assoc_right (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
→ associator_data T

T: bifunctor C C C
∏ x : associator_data T, ?g (?f x) = x
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
∏
y : nat_trans_data
      (assoc_left
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
      (assoc_right
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)),
?f (?g y) = y

associator_data T
→ nat_trans_data
    (assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
    (assoc_right
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
 exact (λ ass xyz, ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz)).

  (assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
  (assoc_right (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
→ associator_data T

∏ x : associator_data T,
?g
  ((λ (ass : associator_data T) (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
    ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz)) x) = x

T: bifunctor C C C

y : nat_trans_data
      (assoc_left
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
      (assoc_right
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)),

 ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz)) (?g y) = y

T: bifunctor C C C
nat_trans_data
  (assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
  (assoc_right (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
→ associator_data T
 exact (λ nt x y z, nt ((x,,y),,z)). 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
∏ x : associator_data T,
(λ (nt : nat_trans_data
           (assoc_left
              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
           (assoc_right
              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)))
 (x0 y z : C), nt ((x0,, y),, z))
  ((λ (ass : associator_data T) (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
    ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz)) x) = x
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
∏
y : nat_trans_data
      (assoc_left
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
      (assoc_right
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)),
(λ (ass : associator_data T) (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
 ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
  ((λ (nt : nat_trans_data
              (assoc_left
                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
              (assoc_right
                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)))
    (x y0 z : C), nt ((x,, y0),, z)) y) = y

        
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
∏ x : associator_data T,
(λ (nt : nat_trans_data
           (assoc_left
              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
           (assoc_right
              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)))
 (x0 y z : C), nt ((x0,, y),, z))
  ((λ (ass : associator_data T) (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
    ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz)) x) = x
 intro ; apply idpath. 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
∏
y : nat_trans_data
      (assoc_left
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
      (assoc_right
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)),
(λ (ass : associator_data T) (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
 ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
  ((λ (nt : nat_trans_data
              (assoc_left
                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
              (assoc_right
                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)))
    (x y0 z : C), nt ((x,, y0),, z)) y) = y

        intro ; apply idpath.

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
∏ x : associator_data T,
(λ x0 : associator_data T,
 associator_nat_leftwhisker x0
 × associator_nat_rightwhisker x0
   × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker x0) x
≃ is_nat_trans
    (assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
    (assoc_right
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
    (weq_iso
       (λ (ass : associator_data T)
        (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
        ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
       (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                  (assoc_left
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T))
                  (assoc_right
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T))) (x0 y z : C),
        nt ((x0,, y),, z))
       (λ x0 : associator_data T, idpath x0)
       (λ y : nat_trans_data
                (assoc_left
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T))
                (assoc_right
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T)), idpath y) x)
 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
(λ x : associator_data T,
 associator_nat_leftwhisker x
 × associator_nat_rightwhisker x
   × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker x) ass
≃ is_nat_trans
    (assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
    (assoc_right
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
    (weq_iso
       (λ (ass : associator_data T)
        (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
        ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
       (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                  (assoc_left
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T))
                  (assoc_right
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T))) (x y z : C),
        nt ((x,, y),, z))
       (λ x : associator_data T, idpath x)
       (λ y : nat_trans_data
                (assoc_left
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T))
                (assoc_right
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T)), idpath y) ass)

        
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
× associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
  × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass
→ is_nat_trans
    (assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
    (assoc_right
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
    (weq_iso
       (λ (ass : associator_data T)
        (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
        ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
       (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                  (assoc_left
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T))
                  (assoc_right
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T))) (x y z : C),
        nt ((x,, y),, z))
       (λ x : associator_data T, idpath x)
       (λ y : nat_trans_data
                (assoc_left
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T))
                (assoc_right
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T)), idpath y) ass)
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
  (assoc_right (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
  (weq_iso
     (λ (ass : associator_data T) (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
      ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
     (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                (assoc_left
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T))
                (assoc_right
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T))) (x y z : C),
      nt ((x,, y),, z))
     (λ x : associator_data T, idpath x)
     (λ y : nat_trans_data
              (assoc_left
                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
              (assoc_right
                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)),
      idpath y) ass)
→ associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
  × associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
    × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
∏
x : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
    × associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
      × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass,
?g (?f x) = x
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
∏
y : is_nat_trans
      (assoc_left
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
      (assoc_right
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
      (weq_iso
         (λ (ass : associator_data T)
          (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
          ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
         (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                    (assoc_left
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T))
                    (assoc_right
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T))) (x y z : C),
          nt ((x,, y),, z))
         (λ x : associator_data T, idpath x)
         (λ y : nat_trans_data
                  (assoc_left
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T))
                  (assoc_right
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T)), idpath y) ass),
?f (?g y) = y


        
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
× associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
  × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass
→ is_nat_trans
    (assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
    (assoc_right
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
    (weq_iso
       (λ (ass : associator_data T)
        (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
        ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
       (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                  (assoc_left
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T))
                  (assoc_right
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T))) (x y z : C),
        nt ((x,, y),, z))
       (λ x : associator_data T, idpath x)
       (λ y : nat_trans_data
                (assoc_left
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T))
                (assoc_right
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T)), idpath y) ass)
 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnat: associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
× associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
  × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass
is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
  (assoc_right (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
  (weq_iso
     (λ (ass : associator_data T) (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
      ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
     (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                (assoc_left
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T))
                (assoc_right
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T))) (x y z : C),
      nt ((x,, y),, z))
     (λ x : associator_data T, idpath x)
     (λ y : nat_trans_data
              (assoc_left
                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
              (assoc_right
                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)),
      idpath y) ass)

          (* show we get natural transformation *)
          
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnat: associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
× associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
  × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass
x, x': (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
f: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
# (assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
  f
· weq_iso
    (λ (ass : associator_data T) (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
     ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
    (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
               (assoc_left
                  (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                     T))
               (assoc_right
                  (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                     T))) (x y z : C),
     nt ((x,, y),, z))
    (λ x : associator_data T, idpath x)
    (λ y : nat_trans_data
             (assoc_left
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
             (assoc_right
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)),
     idpath y) ass x' =
weq_iso
  (λ (ass : associator_data T) (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
   ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
  (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
             (assoc_left
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
             (assoc_right
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)))
   (x y z : C), nt ((x,, y),, z))
  (λ x : associator_data T, idpath x)
  (λ y : nat_trans_data
           (assoc_left
              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
           (assoc_right
              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)),
   idpath y) ass x
· # (assoc_right
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)) f

          
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnat: associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
× associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
  × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass
x, x': (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
f: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
functoronmorphisms1 T
  (functoronmorphisms1 T (pr11 f) (pr21 f)) (pr2 f)
· ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
ass (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
· functoronmorphisms1 T (pr11 f)
    (functoronmorphisms1 T (pr21 f) (pr2 f))

          
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnat: associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
× associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
  × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass
x, x': (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
f: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
     (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
       (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
    (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
· ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
ass (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
     (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
       (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
       (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
          (pr21 x) (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x')
            (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))

          
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnat: associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
× associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
  × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass
x, x': (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
f: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
     (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
       (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
    (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
· ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
ass (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
· (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
     (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
       (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
       (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
          (pr21 x) (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x')
            (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))

          
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnat: associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
× associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
  × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass
x, x': (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
f: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
     (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
       (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
    (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
· ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
ass (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
· rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x)) (pr11 x)
    (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x) (pr21 x)
       (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x') (pr2 x)
         (pr2 x') (pr2 f))

          
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnat: associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
× associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
  × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass
x, x': (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
f: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
     (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
       (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
    (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
· ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
     (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
· ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x) (pr21 x)
       (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x') (pr2 x)
         (pr2 x') (pr2 f))

          
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnat: associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
× associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
  × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass
x, x': (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
f: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
     (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
       (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
· (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
     (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
   · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
     (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
· (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
       (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
       (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
          (pr21 x) (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x')
            (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))

  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
     (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
· (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
       (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
       (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))

            (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f))) =

  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
     (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
       (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
· (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
     (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
   · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))

· (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
       (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
       (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))

     (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')

f: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
     (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
· (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
       (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
       (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
          (pr21 x) (pr21 x') (pr21 f)

            (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f))) = ?b

ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x) (pr21 x)
       (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x') (pr2 x)
         (pr2 x') (pr2 f)) = ?t2

     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x') (pr2 x))

   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')

rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
     (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
· rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
       (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
    (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
     (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
       (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
    (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)

          
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnat: associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
× associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
  × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass
x, x': (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
f: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
     (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
       (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
    (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
     (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
· rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
       (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
    (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)

          
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
assnat: associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
× associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
  × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass
x, x': (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
f: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
     (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
· rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
       (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
    (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
     (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
· rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
       (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
    (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)

          apply idpath.
        
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
  (assoc_right (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
  (weq_iso
     (λ (ass : associator_data T) (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
      ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
     (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                (assoc_left
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T))
                (assoc_right
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T))) (x y z : C),
      nt ((x,, y),, z))
     (λ x : associator_data T, idpath x)
     (λ y : nat_trans_data
              (assoc_left
                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
              (assoc_right
                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)),
      idpath y) ass)
→ associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
  × associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
    × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass
 abstract exact (λ assnattrans,
              (nat_trans_associator_leftwhisker assnattrans) ,,
              (nat_trans_associator_rightwhisker assnattrans) ,,
              (nat_trans_associator_leftrightwhisker assnattrans)
            ).
        
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
∏
x : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
    × associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
      × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass,
associators_equiv_subproof C T ass
  ((λ assnat : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
               × associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
                 × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass,
    (λ (x0 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
     (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
     ((internal_paths_rew_r
         (C
          ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
              (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                 (pr21 x0)) (pr2 x0),
          bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
            (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
          ⟧)
         (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
          · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                  (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
               (pr11 f)
             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                    (pr2 x0))
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                    (pr2 x'))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                    (pr21 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                      (pr2 f))))
         (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
          · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
              (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                 (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
              (pr11 f)
          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
              (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                 (pr2 x0))
              (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                 (pr2 x'))
              (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x0)
                 (pr21 x0) (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))
         (λ p : C
                ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                       (pr21 x0)) (pr2 x0),
                bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                     (pr2 x')) ⟧,
          rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x0)
            (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
               (pr21 x0))
            (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
               (pr21 x'))
            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x0)
               (pr11 x0) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
                 (pr21 x0) (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
              (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                 (pr21 x')) (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
          · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') = p)
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C
             ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                    (pr21 x0)) (pr2 x0),
             bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                  (pr2 x0)) ⟧)
            (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
             · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                    (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                 (pr11 f))
            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x0)
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                  (pr21 x0))
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                  (pr21 x0))
               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                  (pr11 f))
             · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                       (pr2 x0),
                   bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                        (pr2 x0)) ⟧,
             rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x0)
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                  (pr21 x0))
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                  (pr21 x'))
               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T ... ...
                  ... ...
                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T ...
                    ... ... ...)
             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                    (pr21 x')) (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                 (pr2 f)
             · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
             p
             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                    (pr2 x0))
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                    (pr2 x'))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (...)
                    (pr21 x0) (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr21 x') (...) (...) (...)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C
                ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                       (pr21 x0)) (pr2 x0),
                bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                     (pr2 x')) ⟧)
               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (pr2 x0)
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                     (pr21 x0))
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (pr21 x'))
                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T ...
                     ... ... ...
                   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T ...
                       ... ... ...)
                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (pr21 x')) (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                    (pr2 f)
                · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (pr2 x0)
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                     (pr21 x0))
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (pr21 x'))
                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                     (pr11 f)
                   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                       (pr21 f))
                · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                     (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                   · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x')))
               (λ p : C
                      ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...) (pr2 x0),
                      bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                           ...) ⟧,
                p =
                rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (...)
                  (...) (...) (...)
                · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (...)
                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                    (... · ...))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C
                   ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                       (pr2 x0),
                   bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                   ⟧)
                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (...) (...) (...) (...)
                   · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (...)
                   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                       (... · ...))
                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr2 x0)
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        ... ... ... ...)
                   · (ass ... ... ...
                      · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          ... ... ... ...))
                  (λ p : C
                         ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...,
                         bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                           ... ⟧,
                   rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T ...
                     ... ... ... · (...) = p)
                  (! (maponpaths (...) (...) @
                      cancel_precomposition C ... ...
                        ... ... ... ... ... @
                      internal_paths_rew_r ... ... ...
                        ... ... ...))
                  (assoc'
                     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (...) (...) (...) (...))
                     (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (...))
                     (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr11 x') (...) (...) (...))))
               (assoc'
                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr2 x0)
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                        (pr21 x0))
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                        (pr21 x'))
                     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        ... ... ... ...
                      · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          ... ... ... ...))
                  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                        (pr21 x')) (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                     (pr2 f))
                  (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))))
            ((pr12 assnat) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
               (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0) (pr11 f)))
         (assoc (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                  (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
               (pr11 f))
            (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                  (pr2 x0))
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                  (pr2 x'))
               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                  (pr21 f)
                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                    (pr2 f))))
       :
       rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x0)
         (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
         (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x0)
            (pr11 x0) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
              (pr21 x0) (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
           (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
           (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
       · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
       ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
       · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
            (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
            (pr11 x0) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
              (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                 (pr2 x0))
              (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                 (pr2 x'))
              (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x0)
                 (pr21 x0) (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f))))
      :
      functoronmorphisms1 T
        (functoronmorphisms1 T (pr11 f) (pr21 f))
        (pr2 f) · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
      ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
      · functoronmorphisms1 T (pr11 f)
          (functoronmorphisms1 T (pr21 f) (pr2 f)))
     :
     # (assoc_left
          (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)) f
     · weq_iso
         (λ (ass : associator_data T)
          (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
          ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
         (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                    (assoc_left
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T))
                    (assoc_right
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T))) (x1 y z : C),
          nt ((x1,, y),, z))
         (λ x1 : associator_data T, idpath x1)
         (λ y : nat_trans_data
                  (assoc_left
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T))
                  (assoc_right
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T)), idpath y) ass x' =
     weq_iso
       (λ (ass : associator_data T)
        (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
        ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
       (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                  (assoc_left
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T))
                  (assoc_right
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T))) (x1 y z : C),
        nt ((x1,, y),, z))
       (λ x1 : associator_data T, idpath x1)
       (λ y : nat_trans_data
                (assoc_left
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T))
                (assoc_right
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T)), idpath y) ass x0
     · # (assoc_right
            (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)) f)
    :
    is_nat_trans
      (assoc_left
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
      (assoc_right
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
      (weq_iso
         (λ (ass : associator_data T)
          (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
          ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
         (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                    (assoc_left
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T))
                    (assoc_right
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T))) (x0 y z : C),
          nt ((x0,, y),, z))
         (λ x0 : associator_data T, idpath x0)
         (λ y : nat_trans_data
                  (assoc_left
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T))
                  (assoc_right
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T)), idpath y) ass)) x) = x
 intro ; repeat (apply isapropdirprod) ; repeat (apply impred_isaprop ; intro) ; apply homset_property.
        
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
∏
y : is_nat_trans
      (assoc_left
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
      (assoc_right
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
      (weq_iso
         (λ (ass : associator_data T)
          (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
          ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
         (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                    (assoc_left
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T))
                    (assoc_right
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T))) (x y z : C),
          nt ((x,, y),, z))
         (λ x : associator_data T, idpath x)
         (λ y : nat_trans_data
                  (assoc_left
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T))
                  (assoc_right
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T)), idpath y) ass),
(λ assnat : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
            × associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
              × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass,
 (λ (x x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C) (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
  ((internal_paths_rew_r
      (C
       ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
           (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
           (pr2 x),
       bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
         (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
      (ass (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
       · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
            (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
            (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
              (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
              (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                 (pr2 x'))
              (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
                 (pr21 x) (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (pr21 x') (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f))))
      (ass (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
       · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
           (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
           (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
           (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
           (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
           (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
              (pr21 x) (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
            · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x')
                (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))
      (λ p : C
             ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                    (pr21 x)) (pr2 x),
             bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                  (pr2 x')) ⟧,
       rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
         (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
         (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x)
            (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
              (pr21 x) (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
           (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
           (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
       · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') = p)
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (C
          ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
              (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                 (pr21 x)) (pr2 x),
          bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
            (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
          ⟧)
         (ass (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
          · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
              (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
              (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
            (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
            (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x)
               (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
          · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
         (λ p : C
                ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                       (pr21 x)) (pr2 x),
                bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                     (pr2 x)) ⟧,
          rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
            (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
            (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
               (pr21 x'))
            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x)
               (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
                 (pr21 x) (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
              (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                 (pr21 x')) (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
          · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
          p
          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
              (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
              (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                 (pr2 x'))
              (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
                 (pr21 x) (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (pr21 x') (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C
             ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                    (pr21 x)) (pr2 x),
             bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                  (pr2 x')) ⟧)
            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                  (pr21 x))
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                  (pr21 x'))
               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr21 x')
                    (pr21 f))
             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                    (pr21 x')) (pr2 x) (pr2 x')
                 (pr2 f)
             · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                  (pr21 x))
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                  (pr21 x'))
               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr21 x')
                    (pr21 f))
             · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (pr21 x')) (pr2 x) (pr2 x')
                  (pr2 f)
                · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x')))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x) (pr21 x)) (pr2 x),
                   bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                        (pr2 x')) ⟧,
             p =
             rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                  (pr21 x))
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                  (pr21 x))
               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
             · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                    (pr2 x))
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                    (pr2 x'))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (...)
                    (pr21 x) (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr21 x') (...) (...) (...)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C
                ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                       (pr21 x)) (pr2 x),
                bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                     (pr2 x')) ⟧)
               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                     (pr21 x))
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (pr21 x))
                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                     (pr11 f))
                · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                       (pr2 x))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                       (pr2 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (...) (pr21 x) (pr21 x')
                       (pr21 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr21 x') (...) (...) (...)))
               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                     (pr21 x))
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (pr21 x))
                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                     (pr11 f))
                · (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
                   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                       (... · ...)))
               (λ p : C
                      ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...) (pr2 x),
                      bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                           ...) ⟧,
                rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                  (... · ...)
                · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T ...
                     ... ... ... · ass ... ... ...) =
                p)
               (! (maponpaths (compose (...))
                     (internal_paths_rew_r (...) (...)
                        (...) (...) (...) (...)) @
                   cancel_precomposition C
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                     (... · ...) (... · ...)
                     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        ... ... ... ...)
                     (internal_paths_rew_r ... ... ...
                        ... ... ...) @
                   internal_paths_rew_r
                     (C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧) (... · ...)
                     (... · ...) (λ ..., ...)
                     (internal_paths_rew_r ... ... ...
                        ... ... ...)
                     (assoc ... ... ...)))
               (assoc'
                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr2 x)
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                        (pr21 x))
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                        (pr21 x))
                     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                        (pr11 f)))
                  (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
                  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr11 x')
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                        (...))
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                        (...))
                     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        ... ... ... ...
                      · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          ... ... ... ...))))
            (assoc'
               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                     (pr21 x))
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (pr21 x'))
                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                     (pr11 f)
                   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr21 x')
                       (pr21 f)))
               (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (pr21 x')) (pr2 x) (pr2 x')
                  (pr2 f))
               (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))))
         ((pr12 assnat) (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
            (pr2 x) (pr11 f)))
      (assoc (ass (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
            (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
            (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
         (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
            (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
            (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
               (pr21 x) (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x')
                 (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f))))
    :
    rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
      (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
      (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x)
         (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
           (pr21 x) (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
        (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
        (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
    · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
    ass (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
    · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
         (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
         (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
           (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
           (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
           (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
              (pr21 x) (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
            · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x')
                (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f))))
   :
   functoronmorphisms1 T
     (functoronmorphisms1 T (pr11 f) (pr21 f)) (pr2 f)
   · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
   ass (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
   · functoronmorphisms1 T (pr11 f)
       (functoronmorphisms1 T (pr21 f) (pr2 f)))
  :
  # (assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
    f
  · weq_iso
      (λ (ass : associator_data T)
       (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
       ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
      (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                 (assoc_left
                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T))
                 (assoc_right
                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T))) (x0 y0 z : C),
       nt ((x0,, y0),, z))
      (λ x0 : associator_data T, idpath x0)
      (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                (assoc_left
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T))
                (assoc_right
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T)), idpath y0) ass x' =
  weq_iso
    (λ (ass : associator_data T) (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
     ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
    (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
               (assoc_left
                  (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                     T))
               (assoc_right
                  (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                     T))) (x0 y0 z : C),
     nt ((x0,, y0),, z))
    (λ x0 : associator_data T, idpath x0)
    (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
              (assoc_left
                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
              (assoc_right
                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)),
     idpath y0) ass x
  · # (assoc_right
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)) f)
 :
 is_nat_trans
   (assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
   (assoc_right (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
   (weq_iso
      (λ (ass : associator_data T)
       (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
       ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
      (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                 (assoc_left
                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T))
                 (assoc_right
                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T))) (x y0 z : C),
       nt ((x,, y0),, z))
      (λ x : associator_data T, idpath x)
      (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                (assoc_left
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T))
                (assoc_right
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T)), idpath y0) ass))
  (associators_equiv_subproof C T ass y) = y
 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator_data T
y: is_nat_trans
  (assoc_left
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
  (assoc_right
     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
  (weq_iso
     (λ (ass : associator_data T)
      (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
      ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
     (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                (assoc_left
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T))
                (assoc_right
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T))) (x y z : C),
      nt ((x,, y),, z))
     (λ x : associator_data T, idpath x)
     (λ y : nat_trans_data
              (assoc_left
                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                    T))
              (assoc_right
                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                    T)), idpath y) ass)
(λ assnat : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
            × associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
              × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass,
 (λ (x x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C) (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
  ((internal_paths_rew_r
      (C
       ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
           (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
           (pr2 x),
       bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
         (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
      (ass (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
       · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
            (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
            (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
              (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
              (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                 (pr2 x'))
              (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
                 (pr21 x) (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (pr21 x') (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f))))
      (ass (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
       · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
           (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
           (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
           (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
           (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
           (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
              (pr21 x) (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
            · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x')
                (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))
      (λ p : C
             ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                    (pr21 x)) (pr2 x),
             bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                  (pr2 x')) ⟧,
       rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
         (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
         (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x)
            (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
              (pr21 x) (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
           (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
           (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
       · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') = p)
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (C
          ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
              (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                 (pr21 x)) (pr2 x),
          bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
            (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
          ⟧)
         (ass (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
          · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
              (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
              (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
            (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
            (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x)
               (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
          · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
         (λ p : C
                ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                       (pr21 x)) (pr2 x),
                bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                     (pr2 x)) ⟧,
          rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
            (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
            (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
               (pr21 x'))
            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr21 x)
               (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
                 (pr21 x) (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
              (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                 (pr21 x')) (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
          · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
          p
          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
              (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
              (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                 (pr2 x'))
              (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
                 (pr21 x) (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (pr21 x') (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (C
             ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                    (pr21 x)) (pr2 x),
             bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                  (pr2 x')) ⟧)
            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                  (pr21 x))
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                  (pr21 x'))
               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr21 x')
                    (pr21 f))
             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                    (pr21 x')) (pr2 x) (pr2 x')
                 (pr2 f)
             · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                  (pr21 x))
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                  (pr21 x'))
               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr21 x')
                    (pr21 f))
             · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (pr21 x')) (pr2 x) (pr2 x')
                  (pr2 f)
                · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x')))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x) (pr21 x)) (pr2 x),
                   bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                        (pr2 x')) ⟧,
             p =
             rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                  (pr21 x))
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                  (pr21 x))
               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
             · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                    (pr2 x))
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                    (pr2 x'))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr2 x) (pr21 x) (pr21 x')
                    (pr21 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr21 x') (pr2 x) (pr2 x')
                      (pr2 f)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C
                ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                       (pr21 x)) (pr2 x),
                bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                     (pr2 x')) ⟧)
               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                     (pr21 x))
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (pr21 x))
                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                     (pr11 f))
                · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                       (pr2 x))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                       (pr2 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x) (pr21 x) (pr21 x')
                       (pr21 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x) (pr2 x')
                         (pr2 f)))
               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                     (pr21 x))
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (pr21 x))
                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                     (pr11 f))
                · (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
                   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x) (...))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x') (...))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          ... ... ... ...
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T ... ... ... ...)))
               (λ p : C
                      ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                          (pr2 x),
                      bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x') (...)) ⟧,
                rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                     (pr21 x))
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (pr21 x'))
                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T ...
                     ... ... ...
                   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T ...
                       ... ... ...)
                · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (...)
                     (...) (...) (...)
                   · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (...)) =
                p)
               (! (maponpaths
                     (compose
                        (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                           T ... ... ... ...))
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                        (C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧)
                        (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           ... ... ... ...)
                        (... · ...) (λ ..., ...)
                        (internal_paths_rew_r ... ...
                           ... ... ... ...)
                        (bifunctor_leftcomp T ... ...
                           ... ... ... ...)) @
                   cancel_precomposition C
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (...)
                        (...))
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (...)
                        (...))
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                        (...))
                     (... · ...
                      · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          ... ... ... ...)
                     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        ... ... ... ... · (...))
                     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (...) (...) (...) (...))
                     (internal_paths_rew_r (...) (...)
                        (...) (...) (...) (...)) @
                   internal_paths_rew_r
                     (C
                      ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...,
                      bifunctor_on_objects T ... ... ⟧)
                     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        ... ... ... ... · (...))
                     (... · ... · (...))
                     (λ p : ..., p = ...)
                     (internal_paths_rew_r (...) (...)
                        (...) (...) (...) (...))
                     (assoc (...) (...) (...))))
               (assoc'
                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr2 x)
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                        (pr21 x))
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                        (pr21 x))
                     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                        (pr11 f)))
                  (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
                  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr11 x')
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                        (pr2 x))
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                        (pr2 x'))
                     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (...) (pr21 x) (pr21 x')
                        (pr21 f)
                      · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x') (...) (...) (...)))))
            (assoc'
               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                     (pr21 x))
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (pr21 x'))
                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                     (pr11 f)
                   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr21 x')
                       (pr21 f)))
               (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (pr21 x')) (pr2 x) (pr2 x')
                  (pr2 f))
               (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))))
