                            T z ... ... ...
                          · ass t t1 z)
                         (λ t1 : C,
                          impred_isaprop
                            (λ t2 : C, ∏ ..., ...)
                            (λ t2 : C,
                             impred_isaprop ... ...))))))
             (associators_equiv_subproof C T ass
                (λ (x0 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
                 (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
                 internal_paths_rew_r
                   (C
                    ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                        (pr2 x0),
                    bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                   (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                    · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                         (pr11 x0) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr11 x')
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                           (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0)
                              (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                            · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (pr21 x') (pr2 x0)
                                (pr2 x') (pr2 f))))
                   (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                    · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                        (pr11 x0) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr11 x')
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                        (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                           T (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0)
                           (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                         · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x') (pr2 x0)
                             (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))
                   (λ p : C
                          ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                              (pr2 x0),
                          bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x')
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧,
                    rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr2 x0)
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                         (pr11 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                           (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                        (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                    · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
                    p)
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (C
                       ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                           (pr2 x0),
                       bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)) ⟧)
                      (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0)
                         (pr2 x0)
                       · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                           T
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                           (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                           (pr11 f))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x0)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                            (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                       · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                           (pr2 x0))
                      (λ p : C
                             ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (bifunctor_on_objects
                                    T (pr11 x0)
                                    (pr21 x0))
                                 (pr2 x0),
                             bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x')
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                             ⟧,
                       rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x0)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T ... ... ... ...
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T ... ... ... ...)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                           (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                       · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                           (pr2 x') =
                       p
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr11 x')
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                           (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (...) (pr21 x0)
                              (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                            · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (pr21 x') (...)
                                (...) (...)))
                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                         (C
                          ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                              (pr2 x0),
                          bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x')
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr2 x0)
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T ... ... ... ...
                             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T ... ... ... ...)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                              (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                              (pr2 f)
                          · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                              (pr2 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr2 x0)
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                               (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                                 (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                          · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...) (pr2 x0)
                               (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                             · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                                 (pr2 x')))
                         (λ p : C
                                ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects
                                    T
                                    (bifunctor_on_objects
                                       T ... ...)
                                    (pr2 x0),
                                bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x')
                                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T ... ...) ⟧,
                          p =
                          rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (...) (...) (...) (...)
                          · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                              (...)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr11 x')
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 ... ...)
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 ... ...) (... · ...))
                         (internal_paths_rew_r
                            (C
                             ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (bifunctor_on_objects
                                    T ... ...)
                                 (pr2 x0),
                             bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x')
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...) ⟧)
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (...) (...) (...)
                               (...)
                             · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                                 (...)
                             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T (pr11 x')
                                 (bifunctor_on_objects
                                    T ... ...)
                                 (bifunctor_on_objects
                                    T ... ...)
                                 (... · ...))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr2 x0)
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...)
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...)
                               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...)
                             · (ass ... ... ...
                                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                    T ... ... ... ...))
                            (λ p : C
                                   ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects
                                       T ... ...,
                                   bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T ... ... ⟧,
                             rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T ... ... ... ...
                             · (...) = p)
                            (! (maponpaths (...) (...) @
                                cancel_precomposition
                                  C ... ... ... ...
                                  ... ... ... @
                                internal_paths_rew_r
                                  ... ... ... ... ...
                                  ...))
                            (assoc'
                               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T (...) (...) (...)
                                  (...))
                               (ass (pr11 x')
                                  (pr21 x0) (...))
                               (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T (pr11 x') (...)
                                  (...) (...))))
                         (assoc'
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr2 x0)
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...
                                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                    T ... ... ... ...))
                            (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                               (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                               (pr2 f))
                            (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                               (pr2 x'))))
                      ((pr12 x) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                         (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0) (pr11 f)))
                   (assoc
                      (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0)
                         (pr2 x0))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                         (pr11 x0) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr21 x') (pr2 x0)
                              (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))))) x)
          (λ y : is_nat_trans
                   (assoc_left
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T))
                   (assoc_right
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T))
                   (weq_iso
                      (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                       (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                       ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                         (pr2 xyz))
                      (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                                 (assoc_left
                                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                       T))
                                 (assoc_right
                                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                       T)))
                       (x y z : C), nt ((x,, y),, z))
                      (λ x : associator_data T,
                       idpath x)
                      (λ y : nat_trans_data
                               (assoc_left
                                  (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                     T))
                               (assoc_right
                                  (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                     T)), idpath y)
                      ass),
           let X :=
             λ (P : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C → UU)
             (H : ∏ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C, isaprop (P t))
             (x x' : ∏ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C, P t),
             pr1 (impred_isaprop P H x x') in
           X
             (λ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
              ∏ (x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
              (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, x' ⟧),
              # (assoc_left
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T)) f
              · weq_iso
                  (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                   (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                   ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                     (pr2 xyz))
                  (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                             (assoc_left
                                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                   T))
                             (assoc_right
                                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                   T))) (x y0 z : C),
                   nt ((x,, y0),, z))
                  (λ x : associator_data T, idpath x)
                  (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                            (assoc_left
                               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                  T))
                            (assoc_right
                               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                  T)), idpath y0) ass
                  x' =
              weq_iso
                (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                 (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                 ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
                (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                           (assoc_left
                              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                 T))
                           (assoc_right
                              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                 T))) (x y0 z : C),
                 nt ((x,, y0),, z))
                (λ x : associator_data T, idpath x)
                (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                          (assoc_left
                             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                T))
                          (assoc_right
                             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                T)), idpath y0) ass t
              · # (assoc_right
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T)) f)
             (λ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
              impred_isaprop
                (λ t0 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
                 ∏ f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                 # (assoc_left
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T)) f
                 · weq_iso
                     (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                      (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                      ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                        (pr2 xyz))
                     (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                                (assoc_left (...))
                                (assoc_right (...)))
                      (x y0 z : C), nt ((x,, y0),, z))
                     (λ x : associator_data T,
                      idpath x)
                     (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                               (assoc_left (...))
                               (assoc_right (...)),
                      idpath y0) ass t0 =
                 weq_iso
                   (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                    (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                    ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                      (pr2 xyz))
                   (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                              (assoc_left (...))
                              (assoc_right (...)))
                    (x y0 z : C), nt ((x,, y0),, z))
                   (λ x : associator_data T, idpath x)
                   (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                             (assoc_left (...))
                             (assoc_right (...)),
                    idpath y0) ass t
                 · # (assoc_right
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T)) f)
                (λ t0 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
                 impred_isaprop
                   (λ t1 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                    # (assoc_left
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T)) t1
                    · weq_iso
                        (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                         (xyz : (...) ⊠ C),
                         ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                           (pr2 xyz))
                        (λ (nt : nat_trans_data (...)
                                   (...))
                         (x y0 z : C), nt (...,, z))
                        (λ x : associator_data T,
                         idpath x)
                        (λ y0 : nat_trans_data (...)
                                  (...), idpath y0)
                        ass t0 =
                    weq_iso
                      (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                       (xyz : (...) ⊠ C),
                       ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                         (pr2 xyz))
                      (λ (nt : nat_trans_data (...)
                                 (...)) (x y0 z : C),
                       nt (...,, z))
                      (λ x : associator_data T,
                       idpath x)
                      (λ y0 : nat_trans_data (...)
                                (...), idpath y0) ass
                      t
                    · # (assoc_right
                           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                              T)) t1)
                   (λ t1 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                    C
                      (assoc_left
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T) t)
                      (assoc_right
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T) t0)
                      (# (assoc_left
                            (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                               T)) t1
                       · weq_iso
                           (λ (ass0 : associator_data
                                        T)
                            (xyz : ... ⊠ C),
                            ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                              (...))
                           (λ (nt : nat_trans_data ...
                                      ...)
                            (x y0 z : C), nt (...))
                           (λ x : associator_data T,
                            idpath x)
                           (λ y0 : nat_trans_data ...
                                     ..., idpath y0)
                           ass t0)
                      (weq_iso
                         (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                          (xyz : ... ⊠ C),
                          ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                            (...))
                         (λ (nt : nat_trans_data ...
                                    ...) (x y0 z : C),
                          nt (...))
                         (λ x : associator_data T,
                          idpath x)
                         (λ y0 : nat_trans_data ...
                                   ..., idpath y0) ass
                         t
                       · # (assoc_right
                              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                 T)) t1))))
             (λ (x x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
              (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
              internal_paths_rew_r
                (C
                 ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                        (pr21 x)) (pr2 x),
                 bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                      (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                (ass (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
                 · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                         (pr2 x)) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                      (pr11 f)
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr11 x')
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                        (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                           T (pr2 x) (pr21 x)
                           (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                         · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x') (pr2 x)
                             (pr2 x') (pr2 f))))
                (ass (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
                 · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                        (pr2 x)) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                     (pr11 f)
                 · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr11 x')
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                        (pr2 x))
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                        (pr2 x'))
                     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr2 x) (pr21 x) (pr21 x')
                        (pr21 f)
                      · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x) (pr2 x')
                          (pr2 f)))
                (λ p : C
                       ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                           (pr2 x),
                       bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧,
                 rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (pr2 x)
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                      (pr21 x))
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                      (pr21 x'))
                   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                      (pr11 f)
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr21 x')
                        (pr21 f))
                 · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                        (pr21 x')) (pr2 x) (pr2 x')
                     (pr2 f)
                 · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
                 p)
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (C
                    ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr11 x) (pr21 x)) (pr2 x),
                    bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                         (pr2 x)) ⟧)
                   (ass (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
                    · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x) (pr2 x)) (pr11 x)
                        (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr2 x)
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                         (pr21 x))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                         (pr11 f))
                    · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
                   (λ p : C
                          ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                              (pr2 x),
                          bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x')
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x) (pr2 x)) ⟧,
                    rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr2 x)
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                         (pr21 x))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                         (pr11 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
                           (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                        (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                    · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
                    p
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr11 x')
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                        (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                           T (pr2 x) (pr21 x)
                           (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                         · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x') (pr2 x)
                             (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (C
                       ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                           (pr2 x),
                       bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
                            (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
                              (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                           (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                       · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                           (pr2 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
                            (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
                              (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                       · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                            (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                          · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                              (pr2 x')))
                      (λ p : C
                             ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (bifunctor_on_objects
                                    T (pr11 x)
                                    (pr21 x)) (pr2 x),
                             bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x')
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                             ⟧,
                       p =
                       rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
                            (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                       · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
                           (pr2 x)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr11 x')
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                           (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (...) (pr21 x)
                              (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                            · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (pr21 x') (...)
                                (...) (...)))
                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                         (C
                          ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                              (pr2 x),
                          bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x')
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr2 x)
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
                               (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                          · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
                              (pr2 x)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr11 x')
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                              (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T (...) (pr21 x)
                                 (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                   T (pr21 x') (...)
                                   (...) (...)))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr2 x)
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
                               (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                          · (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
                               (pr2 x)
                             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T (pr11 x')
                                 (bifunctor_on_objects
                                    T ... ...)
                                 (bifunctor_on_objects
                                    T ... ...)
                                 (... · ...)))
                         (λ p : C
                                ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects
                                    T
                                    (bifunctor_on_objects
                                       T ... ...)
                                    (pr2 x),
                                bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x')
                                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T ... ...) ⟧,
                          rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr2 x)
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               ... ...)
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               ... ...) (... · ...)
                          · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T ... ... ... ...
                             · ass ... ... ...) = p)
                         (! (maponpaths
                               (compose (...))
                               (internal_paths_rew_r
                                  (...) (...) (...)
                                  (...) (...) (...)) @
                             cancel_precomposition C
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...)
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...)
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...) (... · ...)
                               (... · ...)
                               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...)
                               (internal_paths_rew_r
                                  ... ... ... ... ...
                                  ...) @
                             internal_paths_rew_r
                               (C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧)
                               (... · ...) (... · ...)
                               (λ ..., ...)
                               (internal_paths_rew_r
                                  ... ... ... ... ...
                                  ...)
                               (assoc ... ... ...)))
                         (assoc'
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr2 x)
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
                               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
                                  (pr11 x') (pr11 f)))
                            (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
                               (pr2 x))
                            (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr11 x')
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr21 x) (...))
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr21 x') (...))
                               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...
                                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                    T ... ... ... ...))))
                      (assoc'
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr2 x)
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
                               (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
                                 (pr21 x') (pr21 f)))
                         (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                            (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f))
                         (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                            (pr2 x'))))
                   ((pr12 (associators_equiv_subproof
                             C T ass y)) (pr11 x)
                      (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
                      (pr11 f)))
                (assoc (ass (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
                   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                         (pr2 x)) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                      (pr11 f))
                   (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                         (pr2 x))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x) (pr21 x) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x) (pr2 x')
                           (pr2 f))))) y)) ass)


    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
(∑ assi : associatorinv_data T,
 associator_iso_law (pr1 ass) assi)
≃ (∑
   s : ∏
       x : precategory_binproduct_data
             (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
       C
       ⟦ assoc_right
           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x,
       assoc_left
         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x ⟧,
   ∏
   x : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
   is_inverse_in_precat
     (weqtotal2
        (weq_iso
           (λ (ass : associator_data T)
            (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
            ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
           (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                      (assoc_left
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T))
                      (assoc_right
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T))) (x0 y z : C),
            nt ((x0,, y),, z))
           (λ x0 : associator_data T, idpath x0)
           (λ y : nat_trans_data
                    (assoc_left
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T))
                    (assoc_right
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T)), idpath y))
        (λ ass : associator_data T,
         weq_iso
           (λ (assnat : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
                        × associator_nat_rightwhisker
                            ass
                          × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                              ass)
            (x0 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
            (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (C
               ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                      (pr21 x0)) (pr2 x0),
               bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                    (pr2 x')) ⟧)
              (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
               · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                       (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                    (pr11 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                           (pr2 f))))
              (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
               · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                      (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                   (pr11 f)
               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (pr11 x')
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                      (pr2 x0))
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                      (pr2 x'))
                   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                      (pr21 f)
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                        (pr2 f)))
              (λ p : C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                         (pr2 x0),
                     bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧,
               rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x0)
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                    (pr21 x0))
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                    (pr21 x'))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                    (pr11 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                      (pr21 f))
               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                      (pr21 x')) (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                   (pr2 f)
               · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') = p)
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (C
                  ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0)) (pr2 x0),
                  bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                       (pr2 x0)) ⟧)
                 (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                  · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0)
                      (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr2 x0)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                       (pr21 x0))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (pr21 x0))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                       (pr11 f))
                  · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                 (λ p : C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                            (pr2 x0),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)) ⟧,
                  rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr2 x0)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                       (pr21 x0))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (pr21 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                       (pr11 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f))
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x')) (pr2 x0)
                      (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                  · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
                  p
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                           (pr2 f)))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                         (pr2 x0),
                     bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x0)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                          (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                         (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                         (pr2 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x0)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                          (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                     · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                            (pr2 x')))
                    (λ p : C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                               (pr2 x0),
                           bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x')
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧,
                     p =
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x0)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                          (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                         (pr2 x0)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr21 x') (pr2 x0)
                              (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                            (pr2 x0),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                            (pr2 x0)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x')
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0)
                               (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T (pr21 x') (pr2 x0)
                                 (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                        · (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                             (pr2 x0)
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr11 x')
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr21 x0) (...))
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr21 x') (...))
                               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...
                                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                    T ... ... ... ...)))
                       (λ p : C
                              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T (pr11 x0)
                                     (pr21 x0))
                                  (pr2 x0),
                              bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x')
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T (pr21 x') (...))
                              ⟧,
                        rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T ... ... ... ...
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T ... ... ... ...)
                        · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (...) (...) (...) (...)
                           · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                               (...)) = p)
                       (! (maponpaths
                             (compose
                                (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                   T ... ... ... ...))
                             (internal_paths_rew_r
                                (C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧)
                                (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                   T ... ... ... ...)
                                (... · ...)
                                (λ ..., ...)
                                (internal_paths_rew_r
                                   ... ... ... ... ...
                                   ...)
                                (bifunctor_leftcomp T
                                   ... ... ... ... ...
                                   ...)) @
                           cancel_precomposition C
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (...) (...))
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (...) (...))
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x') (...))
                             (... · ...
                              · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...)
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...
                              · (...))
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (...) (...) (...)
                                (...))
                             (internal_paths_rew_r
                                (...) (...) (...)
                                (...) (...) (...)) @
                           internal_paths_rew_r
                             (C
                              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...,
                              bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ... ⟧)
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...
                              · (...))
                             (... · ... · (...))
                             (λ p : ..., p = ...)
                             (internal_paths_rew_r
                                (...) (...) (...)
                                (...) (...) (...))
                             (assoc (...) (...) (...))))
                       (assoc'
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr2 x0)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                                (pr11 x') (pr11 f)))
                          (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                             (pr2 x0))
                          (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr11 x')
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (...) (pr21 x0)
                                (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                              · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T (pr21 x') (...)
                                  (...) (...)))))
                    (assoc'
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                               (pr21 x') (pr21 f)))
                       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f))
                       (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                          (pr2 x'))))
                 ((pr12 assnat) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                    (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0) (pr11 f)))
              (assoc
                 (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                       (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                    (pr11 f))
                 (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                       (pr2 x0))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                       (pr2 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                       (pr21 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                         (pr2 f)))))
           (associators_equiv_subproof C T ass)
           (λ x0 : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
                   × associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
                     × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                         ass,
            let X :=
              λ (X Y : UU) (H : isaprop X)
              (H0 : isaprop Y) (x1 x' : X × Y),
              pr1 (isapropdirprod X Y H H0 x1 x') in
            X (associator_nat_leftwhisker ass)
              (associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
               × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass)
              (impred_isaprop
                 (λ t : C,
                  ∏ (y z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                  ass t y z
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T y z')
                      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y
                         z z' h) =
                  leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T t y) z z'
                    h · ass t y z')
                 (λ t : C,
                  impred_isaprop
                    (λ t0 : C,
                     ∏ (z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                     ass t t0 z
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T t0 z)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T t0 z')
                         (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T t0 z z' h) =
                     leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t t0) z
                       z' h · ass t t0 z')
                    (λ t0 : C,
                     impred_isaprop
                       (λ t1 : C,
                        ∏ (z' : C) (h : C ⟦ t1, z' ⟧),
                        ... · ... = ... · ...)
                       (λ t1 : C,
                        impred_isaprop (λ ..., ...)
                          (λ ..., ...)))))
              (isapropdirprod
                 (associator_nat_rightwhisker ass)
                 (associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass)
                 (impred_isaprop
                    (λ t : C,
                     ∏ (x' y z : C) (f : C ⟦ t, x' ⟧),
                     ass t y z
                     · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
                         t x' f =
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t y)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T x' y)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          y t x' f) · ass x' y z)
                    (λ t : C,
                     impred_isaprop
                       (λ t0 : C,
                        ∏ (y z : C) (f : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧),
                        ass t y z
                        · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T ... t t0 f =
                        rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          z ... ... ... · ass t0 y z)
                       (λ t0 : C,
                        impred_isaprop
                          (λ t1 : C, ∏ ... ..., ...)
                          (λ t1 : C,
                           impred_isaprop ... ...))))
                 (impred_isaprop
                    (λ t : C,
                     ∏ (y y' z : C) (g : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧),
                     ass t y z
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T y' z)
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T z y y' g) =
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t y)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t y')
                       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          t y y' g) · ass t y' z)
                    (λ t : C,
                     impred_isaprop
                       (λ t0 : C,
                        ∏ (y' z : C)
                        (g : C ⟦ t0, y' ⟧),
                        ass t t0 z
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T t ... ... ... =
                        rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          z ... ... ... · ass t y' z)
                       (λ t0 : C,
                        impred_isaprop
                          (λ t1 : C, ∏ ... ..., ...)
                          (λ t1 : C,
                           impred_isaprop ... ...)))))
              (associators_equiv_subproof C T ass
                 (λ (x1 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
                  (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x1, x' ⟧),
                  internal_paths_rew_r
                    (C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                         (pr2 x1),
                     bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                    (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)
                     · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x1) (...))
                          (pr11 x1) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x')
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x1) (...))
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x') (...))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T ... ... ... ...
                             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T ... ... ... ...)))
                    (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)
                     · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                         (pr11 x1) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr2 x1) (pr21 x1)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr21 x') (pr2 x1)
                              (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))
                    (λ p : C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                               (pr2 x1),
                           bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x')
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr21 x') (...)) ⟧,
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x1)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                       (... · ...)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                            ...) (pr2 x1) (pr2 x')
                         (pr2 f)
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                         (pr2 x') = p)
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                            (pr2 x1),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x1) (...)) ⟧)
                       (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1)
                          (pr2 x1)
                        · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x1) (...))
                            (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                            (pr11 f))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x1)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x1))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x1) (pr11 x1)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x1)
                            (pr2 x1))
                       (λ p : C
                              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (...) (...),
                              bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x') (...) ⟧,
                        rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          ... ... ... ...
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T ... ... ... ...
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                            (...) =
                        p
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x') (...) (...)
                            (...))
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          (C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (...) (...),
                           bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (...) ⟧)
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T ... ... ... ...
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T ... ... ... ...
                           · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                               (...))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (...) (...) (...) (...)
                           · (... · ...))
                          (λ p : C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                           p = ... · ...)
                          (internal_paths_rew_r
                             (C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧)
                             (... · ...) (... · ...)
                             (λ ..., ...) (! (...))
                             (assoc' ... ... ...))
                          (assoc'
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...)
                             (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...)
                             (ass ... ... ...)))
                       ((pr12 x0) (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                          (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1) (pr11 f)))
                    (assoc
                       (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1)
                          (pr2 x1))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                          (pr11 x1) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (...) (pr21 x1)
                             (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr21 x') (...) (...)
                               (...)))))) x0)
           (λ y : is_nat_trans
                    (assoc_left
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T))
                    (assoc_right
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T))
                    (weq_iso
                       (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                        (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                        ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                          (pr2 xyz))
                       (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                                  (assoc_left
                                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                        T))
                                  (assoc_right
                                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                        T)))
                        (x0 y z : C),
                        nt ((x0,, y),, z))
                       (λ x0 : associator_data T,
                        idpath x0)
                       (λ y : nat_trans_data
                                (assoc_left
                                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                      T))
                                (assoc_right
                                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                      T)), idpath y)
                       ass),
            let X :=
              λ (P : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C → UU)
              (H : ∏ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C, isaprop (P t))
              (x0 x' : ∏ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C, P t),
              pr1 (impred_isaprop P H x0 x') in
            X
              (λ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
               ∏ (x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
               (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, x' ⟧),
               # (assoc_left
                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T)) f
               · weq_iso
                   (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                    (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                    ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                      (pr2 xyz))
                   (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                              (assoc_left (...))
                              (assoc_right (...)))
                    (x0 y0 z : C), nt ((x0,, y0),, z))
                   (λ x0 : associator_data T,
                    idpath x0)
                   (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                             (assoc_left (...))
                             (assoc_right (...)),
                    idpath y0) ass x' =
               weq_iso
                 (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                  (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                  ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
                 (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                            (assoc_left (...))
                            (assoc_right (...)))
                  (x0 y0 z : C), nt ((x0,, y0),, z))
                 (λ x0 : associator_data T, idpath x0)
                 (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                           (assoc_left (...))
                           (assoc_right (...)),
                  idpath y0) ass t
               · # (assoc_right
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T)) f)
              (λ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
               impred_isaprop
                 (λ t0 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
                  ∏ f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                  # (assoc_left
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T)) f
                  · weq_iso
                      (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                       (xyz : ... ⊠ C),
                       ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                         (...))
                      (λ (nt : nat_trans_data ... ...)
                       (x0 y0 z : C), nt (...))
                      (λ x0 : associator_data T,
                       idpath x0)
                      (λ y0 : nat_trans_data ... ...,
                       idpath y0) ass t0 =
                  weq_iso
                    (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                     (xyz : ... ⊠ C),
                     ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (...))
                    (λ (nt : nat_trans_data ... ...)
                     (x0 y0 z : C), nt (...))
                    (λ x0 : associator_data T,
                     idpath x0)
                    (λ y0 : nat_trans_data ... ...,
                     idpath y0) ass t
                  · # (assoc_right
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T)) f)
                 (λ t0 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
                  impred_isaprop
                    (λ t1 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                     # (assoc_left ...) t1
                     · weq_iso (λ ... ..., ...)
                         (λ ... ..., ...) (λ ..., ...)
                         (λ ..., ...) ass t0 =
                     weq_iso (λ ... ..., ...)
                       (λ ... ..., ...) (λ ..., ...)
                       (λ ..., ...) ass t
                     · # (assoc_right ...) t1)
                    (λ t1 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                     C
                       (assoc_left
                          (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                             T) t)
                       (assoc_right
                          (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                             T) t0)
                       (# (...) t1
