                        · weq_iso (...) (...) (...)
                            (...) ass t0)
                       (weq_iso (...) (...) (...)
                          (...) ass t · # (...) t1))))
              (λ (x0 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
               (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (C
                  ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0)) (pr2 x0),
                  bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                       (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                 (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                  · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                       (pr11 x0) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr21 x') (pr2 x0)
                              (pr2 x') (pr2 f))))
                 (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                  · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0)
                      (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                           (pr2 f)))
                 (λ p : C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                            (pr2 x0),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧,
                  rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr2 x0)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                       (pr21 x0))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (pr21 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                       (pr11 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f))
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x')) (pr2 x0)
                      (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                  · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
                  p)
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                         (pr2 x0),
                     bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)) ⟧)
                    (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                     · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                         (pr11 x0) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x0)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                          (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                         (pr2 x0))
                    (λ p : C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                               (pr2 x0),
                           bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x')
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr21 x0) (...)) ⟧,
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x0)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                       (... · ...)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                            ...) (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                         (pr2 f)
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                         (pr2 x') =
                     p
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x0) (...))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (...))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T ... ... ... ...
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T ... ... ... ...))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                            (pr2 x0),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x') (...)) ⟧)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...) (... · ...)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               ... ...) (pr2 x0)
                            (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                            (pr2 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T ... ... ... ...
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T ... ... ... ...)
                        · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (...) (...) (...) (...)
                           · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                               (...)))
                       (λ p : C
                              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (...) (...),
                              bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x') (...) ⟧,
                        p =
                        rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          ... ... ... ...
                        · ass ... ... ...
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x') (...) (...)
                            (...))
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          (C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (...) (...),
                           bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (...) ⟧)
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T ... ... ... ...
                           · ass ... ... ...
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr11 x') (...) (...)
                               (...))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (...) (...) (...) (...)
                           · (... · ...))
                          (λ p : C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                           ... · ... = p)
                          (! (maponpaths ... ... @
                              ... @ ...))
                          (assoc'
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...)
                             (ass ... ... ...)
                             (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...)))
                       (assoc'
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr2 x0)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...) (... · ...))
                          (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...) (pr2 x0)
                             (pr2 x') (pr2 f))
                          (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                             (pr2 x'))))
                    ((pr12 (associators_equiv_subproof
                              C T ass y)) (pr11 x0)
                       (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                       (pr11 f)))
                 (assoc
                    (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                       (pr11 x0) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                          (pr21 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr21 x') (pr2 x0)
                            (pr2 x') (pr2 f))))) y))
        ass x) (s x))

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
associatorinv_data T
≃ (∏
   x : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
   C
   ⟦ assoc_right
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x,
   assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x
   ⟧)
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
∏ x : associatorinv_data T,
associator_iso_law (pr1 ass) x
≃ (λ y : ∏
         x0 : precategory_binproduct_data
                (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
         C
         ⟦ assoc_right
             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x0,
         assoc_left
           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x0 ⟧,
   ∏
   x0 : precategory_binproduct_data
          (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
   is_inverse_in_precat
     (weqtotal2
        (weq_iso
           (λ (ass : associator_data T)
            (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
            ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
           (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                      (assoc_left
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T))
                      (assoc_right
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T))) (x1 y0 z : C),
            nt ((x1,, y0),, z))
           (λ x1 : associator_data T, idpath x1)
           (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                     (assoc_left
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T))
                     (assoc_right
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T)), idpath y0))
        (λ ass : associator_data T,
         weq_iso
           (λ (assnat : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
                        × associator_nat_rightwhisker
                            ass
                          × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                              ass)
            (x1 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
            (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x1, x' ⟧),
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (C
               ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x1)
                      (pr21 x1)) (pr2 x1),
               bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                    (pr2 x')) ⟧)
              (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)
               · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x1)
                       (pr2 x1)) (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                    (pr11 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x1) (pr2 x')
                           (pr2 f))))
              (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)
               · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x1)
                      (pr2 x1)) (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                   (pr11 f)
               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (pr11 x')
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x1)
                      (pr2 x1))
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                      (pr2 x'))
                   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr2 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr21 x')
                      (pr21 f)
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr21 x') (pr2 x1) (pr2 x')
                        (pr2 f)))
              (λ p : C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                         (pr2 x1),
                     bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧,
               rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x1)
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x1)
                    (pr21 x1))
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                    (pr21 x'))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr21 x1) (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                    (pr11 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x') (pr21 x1) (pr21 x')
                      (pr21 f))
               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                      (pr21 x')) (pr2 x1) (pr2 x')
                   (pr2 f)
               · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') = p)
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (C
                  ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1)) (pr2 x1),
                  bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x1)
                       (pr2 x1)) ⟧)
                 (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)
                  · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)) (pr11 x1)
                      (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr2 x1)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x1)
                       (pr21 x1))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (pr21 x1))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr21 x1) (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                       (pr11 f))
                  · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                 (λ p : C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                            (pr2 x1),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)) ⟧,
                  rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr2 x1)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x1)
                       (pr21 x1))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (pr21 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr21 x1) (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                       (pr11 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x1) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f))
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x')) (pr2 x1)
                      (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                  · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
                  p
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x1) (pr2 x')
                           (pr2 f)))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                         (pr2 x1),
                     bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x1)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x1) (pr11 x1)
                          (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x') (pr21 x1)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                         (pr2 x1) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                         (pr2 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x1)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x1) (pr11 x1)
                          (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x') (pr21 x1)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                     · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (pr2 x1) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                            (pr2 x')))
                    (λ p : C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                               (pr2 x1),
                           bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x')
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr21 x') (...)) ⟧,
                     p =
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x1)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          ... ... ... ...)
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x1)
                         (pr2 x1)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x1) (...))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (...))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T ... ... ... ...
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T ... ... ... ...))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                            (pr2 x1),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x') (...)) ⟧)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x1)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...)
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T ... ... ... ...)
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x1)
                            (pr2 x1)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x')
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x1) (...))
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x') (...))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T ... ... ... ...
                             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T ... ... ... ...))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x1)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x1))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x1) (pr11 x1)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                        · (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x1)
                             (...)
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr11 x') (...) (...)
                               (...)))
                       (λ p : C
                              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (...) (...),
                              bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x') (...) ⟧,
                        rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (...) (...) (...) (...)
                        · (... · ...) = p)
                       (! (maponpaths (compose ...)
                             (internal_paths_rew_r ...
                                ... ... ... ... ...) @
                           cancel_precomposition C
                             (...) (...) (...) (...)
                             (...) (...) (...) @
                           internal_paths_rew_r (...)
                             (...) (...) (...) (...)
                             (...)))
                       (assoc'
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr2 x1)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...)
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...))
                          (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x1)
                             (pr2 x1))
                          (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr11 x')
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...) (... · ...))))
                    (assoc'
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x1)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x1) (pr11 x1)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr11 x') (pr21 x1)
                               (pr21 x') (pr21 f)))
                       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (pr2 x1) (pr2 x') (pr2 f))
                       (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                          (pr2 x'))))
                 ((pr12 assnat) (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                    (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1) (pr11 f)))
              (assoc
                 (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x1)
                       (pr2 x1)) (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                    (pr11 f))
                 (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x1)
                       (pr2 x1))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                       (pr2 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr21 x')
                       (pr21 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x1) (pr2 x')
                         (pr2 f)))))
           (associators_equiv_subproof C T ass)
           (λ x1 : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
                   × associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
                     × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                         ass,
            let X :=
              λ (X Y : UU) (H : isaprop X)
              (H0 : isaprop Y) (x2 x' : X × Y),
              pr1 (isapropdirprod X Y H H0 x2 x') in
            X (associator_nat_leftwhisker ass)
              (associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
               × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass)
              (impred_isaprop
                 (λ t : C,
                  ∏ (y0 z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                  ass t y0 z
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T y0 z)
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T y0 z')
                      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         y0 z z' h) =
                  leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T t y0) z z'
                    h · ass t y0 z')
                 (λ t : C,
                  impred_isaprop
                    (λ t0 : C,
                     ∏ (z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                     ass t t0 z
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                         ... ... ... =
                     leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T ...
                       z z' h · ass t t0 z')
                    (λ t0 : C,
                     impred_isaprop
                       (λ t1 : C, ∏ ... ..., ...)
                       (λ t1 : C,
                        impred_isaprop ... ...))))
              (isapropdirprod
                 (associator_nat_rightwhisker ass)
                 (associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass)
                 (impred_isaprop
                    (λ t : C,
                     ∏ (x' y0 z : C)
                     (f : C ⟦ t, x' ⟧),
                     ass t y0 z
                     · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (...) t x' f =
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
                       (...) (...) (...) · ass x' y0 z)
                    (λ t : C,
                     impred_isaprop
                       (λ t0 : C,
                        ∏ (y0 z : C) (f : ...),
                        ... = ...)
                       (λ t0 : C,
                        impred_isaprop (...) (...))))
                 (impred_isaprop
                    (λ t : C,
                     ∏ (y0 y' z : C)
                     (g : C ⟦ y0, y' ⟧),
                     ass t y0 z
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                         (...) (...) (...) =
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
                       (...) (...) (...) · ass t y' z)
                    (λ t : C,
                     impred_isaprop
                       (λ t0 : C,
                        ∏ (y' z : C) (g : ...),
                        ... = ...)
                       (λ t0 : C,
                        impred_isaprop (...) (...)))))
              (associators_equiv_subproof C T ass
                 (λ (x2 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
                  (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x2, x' ⟧),
                  internal_paths_rew_r
                    (C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x2) (pr21 x2))
                         (pr2 x2),
                     bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x') (...)) ⟧)
                    (ass (pr11 x2) (pr21 x2) (pr2 x2)
                     · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (...) (pr11 x2) (pr11 x')
                          (pr11 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x') (...) (...)
                            (...)))
                    (ass (pr11 x2) (pr21 x2) (pr2 x2)
                     · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                            ...) (pr11 x2) (pr11 x')
                         (pr11 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x2) (...))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (...))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T ... ... ... ...
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T ... ... ... ...))
                    (λ p : C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (...) (...),
                           bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (...) ⟧,
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       ... ... ... ...
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         ... ... ... ...
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (...) =
                     p)
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T (...)
                            (...),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (...) ⟧)
                       (ass (pr11 x2) (pr21 x2) (...)
                        · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (...) (pr11 x2)
                            (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (...) (...) (...) (...)
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x2)
                            (...))
                       (λ p : C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                        ... · ... = p · ...)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          (C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧) (... · ...)
                          (... · ...) (λ ..., ...)
                          (internal_paths_rew_r ...
                             ... ... ... ... ...)
                          (assoc' ... ... ...))
                       ((pr12 x1) (pr11 x2) (pr11 x')
                          (pr21 x2) (pr2 x2) (pr11 f)))
                    (assoc
                       (ass (pr11 x2) (pr21 x2)
                          (pr2 x2))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...) (pr11 x2) (pr11 x')
                          (pr11 f))
                       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...) (... · ...))))) x1)
           (λ y0 : is_nat_trans
                     (assoc_left
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T))
                     (assoc_right
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T))
                     (weq_iso
                        (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                         (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                         ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                           (pr2 xyz))
                        (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                                   (assoc_left
                                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                         T))
                                   (assoc_right
                                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                         T)))
                         (x1 y0 z : C),
                         nt ((x1,, y0),, z))
                        (λ x1 : associator_data T,
                         idpath x1)
                        (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                                  (assoc_left
                                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                        T))
                                  (assoc_right
                                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                        T)), idpath y0)
                        ass),
            let X :=
              λ (P : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C → UU)
              (H : ∏ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C, isaprop (P t))
              (x1 x' : ∏ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C, P t),
              pr1 (impred_isaprop P H x1 x') in
            X
              (λ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
               ∏ (x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
               (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, x' ⟧),
               # (assoc_left
                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T)) f
               · weq_iso
                   (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                    (xyz : (...) ⊠ C),
                    ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                      (pr2 xyz))
                   (λ (nt : nat_trans_data (...) (...))
                    (x1 y1 z : C), nt (...,, z))
                   (λ x1 : associator_data T,
                    idpath x1)
                   (λ y1 : nat_trans_data (...) (...),
                    idpath y1) ass x' =
               weq_iso
                 (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                  (xyz : (...) ⊠ C),
                  ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
                 (λ (nt : nat_trans_data (...) (...))
                  (x1 y1 z : C), nt (...,, z))
                 (λ x1 : associator_data T, idpath x1)
                 (λ y1 : nat_trans_data (...) (...),
                  idpath y1) ass t
               · # (assoc_right
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T)) f)
              (λ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
               impred_isaprop
                 (λ t0 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
                  ∏ f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                  # (assoc_left ...) f
                  · weq_iso (λ ... ..., ...)
                      (λ ... ..., ...) (λ ..., ...)
                      (λ ..., ...) ass t0 =
                  weq_iso (λ ... ..., ...)
                    (λ ... ..., ...) (λ ..., ...)
                    (λ ..., ...) ass t
                  · # (assoc_right ...) f)
                 (λ t0 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
                  impred_isaprop
                    (λ t1 : ... ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                     # ... t1
                     · weq_iso ... ... ... ... ass t0 =
                     weq_iso ... ... ... ... ass t
                     · # ... t1)
                    (λ t1 : ... ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                     C (assoc_left ... t)
                       (assoc_right ... t0)
                       (... · ...) (... · ...))))
              (λ (x1 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
               (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x1, x' ⟧),
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (C
                  ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1)) (pr2 x1),
                  bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                       (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                 (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)
                  · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x1) (...)) (pr11 x1)
                       (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x1) (...))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (...))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T ... ... ... ...
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T ... ... ... ...)))
                 (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)
                  · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)) (pr11 x1)
                      (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x1) (pr2 x')
                           (pr2 f)))
                 (λ p : C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                            (pr2 x1),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x') (...)) ⟧,
                  rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr2 x1)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                    (... · ...)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                      (pr2 x1) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                  · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
                  p)
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                         (pr2 x1),
                     bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x1) (...)) ⟧)
                    (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)
                     · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x1) (...)) (pr11 x1)
                         (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x1)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x1))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x1) (pr11 x1)
                          (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x1)
                         (pr2 x1))
                    (λ p : C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (...) (...),
                           bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (...) ⟧,
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       ... ... ... ...
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         ... ... ... ...
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (...) =
                     p
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x') (...) (...) (...))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T (...)
                            (...),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (...) ⟧)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          ... ... ... ...
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T ... ... ... ...
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                            (...))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (...) (...) (...) (...)
                        · (... · ...))
                       (λ p : C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                        p = ... · ...)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          (C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧) (... · ...)
                          (... · ...) (λ ..., ...)
                          (! (...))
                          (assoc' ... ... ...))
                       (assoc'
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T ... ... ... ...)
                          (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T ... ... ... ...)
                          (ass ... ... ...)))
                    ((pr12 (associators_equiv_subproof
                              C T ass y0)) (pr11 x1)
                       (pr11 x') (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)
                       (pr11 f)))
                 (assoc
                    (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                       (pr11 x1) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (...) (pr21 x1) (pr21 x')
                          (pr21 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr21 x') (...) (...)
                            (...))))) y0)) ass x0)
     (y x0)) (?f x)

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
associatorinv_data T
≃ (∏
   x : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
   C
   ⟦ assoc_right
       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x,
   assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x
   ⟧)

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
associatorinv_data T
→ ∏
  x : precategory_binproduct_data
        (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
  C
  ⟦ assoc_right (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
      x,
  assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x
  ⟧
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
(∏
 x : precategory_binproduct_data
       (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
 C
 ⟦ assoc_right (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
     x,
 assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x ⟧)
→ associatorinv_data T
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
∏ x : associatorinv_data T, ?g (?f x) = x
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
∏
y : ∏
    x : precategory_binproduct_data
          (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
    C
    ⟦ assoc_right
        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x,
    assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
      x ⟧, ?f (?g y) = y

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
associatorinv_data T
→ ∏
  x : precategory_binproduct_data
        (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
  C
  ⟦ assoc_right (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
      x,
  assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x
  ⟧
 exact (λ assinv xyz, assinv (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz)). 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
(∏
 x : precategory_binproduct_data
       (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
 C
 ⟦ assoc_right (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
     x,
 assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x ⟧)
→ associatorinv_data T
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
∏ x : associatorinv_data T,
?g
  ((λ (assinv : associatorinv_data T)
    (xyz : precategory_binproduct_data
             (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C),
    assinv (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz)) x) = x
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
∏
y : ∏
    x : precategory_binproduct_data
          (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
    C
    ⟦ assoc_right
        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x,
    assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
      x ⟧,
(λ (assinv : associatorinv_data T)
 (xyz : precategory_binproduct_data
          (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C),
 assinv (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz)) (?g y) = y

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
(∏
 x : precategory_binproduct_data
       (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
 C
 ⟦ assoc_right (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
     x,
 assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x ⟧)
→ associatorinv_data T
 exact (λ assinv x y z, assinv ((x,,y),,z)). 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
∏ x : associatorinv_data T,
(λ (assinv : ∏
             x0 : precategory_binproduct_data
                    (precategory_binproduct_data C C)
                    C,
             C
             ⟦ assoc_right
                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                 x0,
             assoc_left
               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
               x0 ⟧) (x0 y z : C),
 assinv ((x0,, y),, z))
  ((λ (assinv : associatorinv_data T)
    (xyz : precategory_binproduct_data
             (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C),
    assinv (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz)) x) = x
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
∏
y : ∏
    x : precategory_binproduct_data
          (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
    C
    ⟦ assoc_right
        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x,
    assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
      x ⟧,
(λ (assinv : associatorinv_data T)
 (xyz : precategory_binproduct_data
          (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C),
 assinv (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
  ((λ (assinv : ∏
                x : precategory_binproduct_data
                      (precategory_binproduct_data C C)
                      C,
                C
                ⟦ assoc_right
                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T) x,
                assoc_left
                  (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                     T) x ⟧) (x y0 z : C),
    assinv ((x,, y0),, z)) y) = y

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
∏ x : associatorinv_data T,
(λ (assinv : ∏
             x0 : precategory_binproduct_data
                    (precategory_binproduct_data C C)
                    C,
             C
             ⟦ assoc_right
                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                 x0,
             assoc_left
               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
               x0 ⟧) (x0 y z : C),
 assinv ((x0,, y),, z))
  ((λ (assinv : associatorinv_data T)
    (xyz : precategory_binproduct_data
             (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C),
    assinv (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz)) x) = x
 intro ; apply idpath. 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
∏
y : ∏
    x : precategory_binproduct_data
          (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
    C
    ⟦ assoc_right
        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x,
    assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
      x ⟧,
(λ (assinv : associatorinv_data T)
 (xyz : precategory_binproduct_data
          (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C),
 assinv (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
  ((λ (assinv : ∏
                x : precategory_binproduct_data
                      (precategory_binproduct_data C C)
                      C,
                C
                ⟦ assoc_right
                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T) x,
                assoc_left
                  (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                     T) x ⟧) (x y0 z : C),
    assinv ((x,, y0),, z)) y) = y

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
∏
y : ∏
    x : precategory_binproduct_data
          (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
    C
    ⟦ assoc_right
        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x,
    assoc_left (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
      x ⟧,
(λ (assinv : associatorinv_data T)
 (xyz : precategory_binproduct_data
          (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C),
 assinv (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
  ((λ (assinv : ∏
                x : precategory_binproduct_data
                      (precategory_binproduct_data C C)
                      C,
                C
                ⟦ assoc_right
                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T) x,
                assoc_left
                  (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                     T) x ⟧) (x y0 z : C),
    assinv ((x,, y0),, z)) y) = y
 intro ; apply idpath. }
    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
∏ x : associatorinv_data T,
associator_iso_law (pr1 ass) x
≃ (λ y : ∏
         x0 : precategory_binproduct_data
                (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
         C
         ⟦ assoc_right
             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x0,
         assoc_left
           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x0 ⟧,
   ∏
   x0 : precategory_binproduct_data
          (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
   is_inverse_in_precat
     (weqtotal2
        (weq_iso
           (λ (ass : associator_data T)
            (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
            ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
           (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                      (assoc_left
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T))
                      (assoc_right
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T))) (x1 y0 z : C),
            nt ((x1,, y0),, z))
           (λ x1 : associator_data T, idpath x1)
           (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                     (assoc_left
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T))
                     (assoc_right
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T)), idpath y0))
        (λ ass : associator_data T,
         weq_iso
           (λ (assnat : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
                        × associator_nat_rightwhisker
                            ass
                          × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                              ass)
            (x1 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
            (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x1, x' ⟧),
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (C
               ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x1)
                      (pr21 x1)) (pr2 x1),
               bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                    (pr2 x')) ⟧)
              (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)
               · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x1)
                       (pr2 x1)) (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                    (pr11 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x1) (pr2 x')
                           (pr2 f))))
              (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)
               · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x1)
                      (pr2 x1)) (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                   (pr11 f)
               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (pr11 x')
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x1)
                      (pr2 x1))
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                      (pr2 x'))
                   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr2 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr21 x')
                      (pr21 f)
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr21 x') (pr2 x1) (pr2 x')
                        (pr2 f)))
              (λ p : C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                         (pr2 x1),
                     bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧,
               rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x1)
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x1)
                    (pr21 x1))
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                    (pr21 x'))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr21 x1) (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                    (pr11 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x') (pr21 x1) (pr21 x')
                      (pr21 f))
               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                      (pr21 x')) (pr2 x1) (pr2 x')
                   (pr2 f)
               · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') = p)
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (C
                  ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1)) (pr2 x1),
                  bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x1)
                       (pr2 x1)) ⟧)
                 (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)
                  · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)) (pr11 x1)
                      (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr2 x1)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x1)
                       (pr21 x1))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (pr21 x1))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr21 x1) (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                       (pr11 f))
                  · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                 (λ p : C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                            (pr2 x1),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)) ⟧,
                  rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr2 x1)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x1)
                       (pr21 x1))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (pr21 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr21 x1) (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                       (pr11 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x1) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f))
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x')) (pr2 x1)
                      (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                  · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
                  p
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x1) (pr2 x')
                           (pr2 f)))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                         (pr2 x1),
                     bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x1)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x1) (pr11 x1)
                          (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x') (pr21 x1)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                         (pr2 x1) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                         (pr2 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x1)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x1) (pr11 x1)
                          (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x') (pr21 x1)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                     · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (pr2 x1) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                            (pr2 x')))
                    (λ p : C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                               (pr2 x1),
                           bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x')
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr21 x') (...)) ⟧,
                     p =
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x1)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          ... ... ... ...)
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x1)
                         (pr2 x1)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x1) (...))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (...))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T ... ... ... ...
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T ... ... ... ...))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                            (pr2 x1),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x') (...)) ⟧)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x1)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...)
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T ... ... ... ...)
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x1)
                            (pr2 x1)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x')
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x1) (...))
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x') (...))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T ... ... ... ...
                             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T ... ... ... ...))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x1)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x1))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x1) (pr11 x1)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                        · (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x1)
                             (...)
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr11 x') (...) (...)
                               (...)))
                       (λ p : C
                              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (...) (...),
                              bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x') (...) ⟧,
                        rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (...) (...) (...) (...)
                        · (... · ...) = p)
                       (! (maponpaths (compose ...)
                             (internal_paths_rew_r ...
                                ... ... ... ... ...) @
                           cancel_precomposition C
                             (...) (...) (...) (...)
                             (...) (...) (...) @
                           internal_paths_rew_r (...)
                             (...) (...) (...) (...)
                             (...)))
                       (assoc'
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr2 x1)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...)
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...))
                          (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x1)
                             (pr2 x1))
                          (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr11 x')
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...) (... · ...))))
                    (assoc'
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x1)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x1) (pr11 x1)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr11 x') (pr21 x1)
                               (pr21 x') (pr21 f)))
                       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (pr2 x1) (pr2 x') (pr2 f))
                       (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                          (pr2 x'))))
                 ((pr12 assnat) (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                    (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1) (pr11 f)))
              (assoc
                 (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x1)
                       (pr2 x1)) (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                    (pr11 f))
                 (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x1)
                       (pr2 x1))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                       (pr2 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr21 x')
                       (pr21 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x1) (pr2 x')
                         (pr2 f)))))
           (associators_equiv_subproof C T ass)
           (λ x1 : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
                   × associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
                     × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                         ass,
            let X :=
              λ (X Y : UU) (H : isaprop X)
              (H0 : isaprop Y) (x2 x' : X × Y),
              pr1 (isapropdirprod X Y H H0 x2 x') in
            X (associator_nat_leftwhisker ass)
              (associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
               × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass)
              (impred_isaprop
                 (λ t : C,
                  ∏ (y0 z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                  ass t y0 z
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T y0 z)
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T y0 z')
                      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         y0 z z' h) =
                  leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T t y0) z z'
                    h · ass t y0 z')
                 (λ t : C,
                  impred_isaprop
                    (λ t0 : C,
                     ∏ (z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                     ass t t0 z
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                         ... ... ... =
                     leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T ...
                       z z' h · ass t t0 z')
                    (λ t0 : C,
                     impred_isaprop
                       (λ t1 : C, ∏ ... ..., ...)
                       (λ t1 : C,
                        impred_isaprop ... ...))))
              (isapropdirprod
                 (associator_nat_rightwhisker ass)
                 (associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass)
                 (impred_isaprop
                    (λ t : C,
                     ∏ (x' y0 z : C)
                     (f : C ⟦ t, x' ⟧),
                     ass t y0 z
                     · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (...) t x' f =
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
                       (...) (...) (...) · ass x' y0 z)
                    (λ t : C,
                     impred_isaprop
                       (λ t0 : C,
                        ∏ (y0 z : C) (f : ...),
                        ... = ...)
                       (λ t0 : C,
                        impred_isaprop (...) (...))))
                 (impred_isaprop
                    (λ t : C,
                     ∏ (y0 y' z : C)
                     (g : C ⟦ y0, y' ⟧),
                     ass t y0 z
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                         (...) (...) (...) =
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
                       (...) (...) (...) · ass t y' z)
                    (λ t : C,
                     impred_isaprop
                       (λ t0 : C,
                        ∏ (y' z : C) (g : ...),
                        ... = ...)
                       (λ t0 : C,
                        impred_isaprop (...) (...)))))
              (associators_equiv_subproof C T ass
                 (λ (x2 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
                  (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x2, x' ⟧),
                  internal_paths_rew_r
                    (C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x2) (pr21 x2))
                         (pr2 x2),
                     bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x') (...)) ⟧)
                    (ass (pr11 x2) (pr21 x2) (pr2 x2)
                     · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (...) (pr11 x2) (pr11 x')
                          (pr11 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x') (...) (...)
                            (...)))
                    (ass (pr11 x2) (pr21 x2) (pr2 x2)
                     · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                            ...) (pr11 x2) (pr11 x')
                         (pr11 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x2) (...))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (...))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T ... ... ... ...
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T ... ... ... ...))
                    (λ p : C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (...) (...),
                           bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (...) ⟧,
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       ... ... ... ...
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         ... ... ... ...
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (...) =
                     p)
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T (...)
                            (...),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (...) ⟧)
                       (ass (pr11 x2) (pr21 x2) (...)
                        · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (...) (pr11 x2)
                            (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (...) (...) (...) (...)
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x2)
                            (...))
                       (λ p : C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                        ... · ... = p · ...)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          (C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧) (... · ...)
                          (... · ...) (λ ..., ...)
                          (internal_paths_rew_r ...
                             ... ... ... ... ...)
                          (assoc' ... ... ...))
                       ((pr12 x1) (pr11 x2) (pr11 x')
                          (pr21 x2) (pr2 x2) (pr11 f)))
                    (assoc
                       (ass (pr11 x2) (pr21 x2)
                          (pr2 x2))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...) (pr11 x2) (pr11 x')
                          (pr11 f))
                       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...) (... · ...))))) x1)
           (λ y0 : is_nat_trans
                     (assoc_left
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T))
                     (assoc_right
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T))
                     (weq_iso
                        (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                         (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                         ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                           (pr2 xyz))
                        (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                                   (assoc_left
                                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                         T))
                                   (assoc_right
                                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                         T)))
                         (x1 y0 z : C),
                         nt ((x1,, y0),, z))
                        (λ x1 : associator_data T,
                         idpath x1)
                        (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                                  (assoc_left
                                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                        T))
                                  (assoc_right
                                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                        T)), idpath y0)
                        ass),
            let X :=
              λ (P : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C → UU)
              (H : ∏ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C, isaprop (P t))
              (x1 x' : ∏ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C, P t),
              pr1 (impred_isaprop P H x1 x') in
            X
              (λ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
               ∏ (x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
               (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, x' ⟧),
               # (assoc_left
                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T)) f
               · weq_iso
                   (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                    (xyz : (...) ⊠ C),
                    ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                      (pr2 xyz))
                   (λ (nt : nat_trans_data (...) (...))
                    (x1 y1 z : C), nt (...,, z))
                   (λ x1 : associator_data T,
                    idpath x1)
                   (λ y1 : nat_trans_data (...) (...),
                    idpath y1) ass x' =
               weq_iso
                 (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                  (xyz : (...) ⊠ C),
                  ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
                 (λ (nt : nat_trans_data (...) (...))
                  (x1 y1 z : C), nt (...,, z))
                 (λ x1 : associator_data T, idpath x1)
                 (λ y1 : nat_trans_data (...) (...),
                  idpath y1) ass t
               · # (assoc_right
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T)) f)
              (λ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
               impred_isaprop
                 (λ t0 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
                  ∏ f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                  # (assoc_left ...) f
                  · weq_iso (λ ... ..., ...)
                      (λ ... ..., ...) (λ ..., ...)
                      (λ ..., ...) ass t0 =
                  weq_iso (λ ... ..., ...)
                    (λ ... ..., ...) (λ ..., ...)
                    (λ ..., ...) ass t
                  · # (assoc_right ...) f)
                 (λ t0 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
                  impred_isaprop
                    (λ t1 : ... ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                     # ... t1
                     · weq_iso ... ... ... ... ass t0 =
                     weq_iso ... ... ... ... ass t
                     · # ... t1)
                    (λ t1 : ... ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                     C (assoc_left ... t)
                       (assoc_right ... t0)
                       (... · ...) (... · ...))))
              (λ (x1 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
               (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x1, x' ⟧),
