               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (C
                  ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1)) (pr2 x1),
                  bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                       (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                 (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)
                  · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x1) (...)) (pr11 x1)
                       (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x1) (...))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (...))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T ... ... ... ...
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T ... ... ... ...)))
                 (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)
                  · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)) (pr11 x1)
                      (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x1) (pr2 x')
                           (pr2 f)))
                 (λ p : C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                            (pr2 x1),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x') (...)) ⟧,
                  rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr2 x1)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                    (... · ...)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                      (pr2 x1) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                  · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
                  p)
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                         (pr2 x1),
                     bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x1) (...)) ⟧)
                    (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)
                     · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x1) (...)) (pr11 x1)
                         (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x1)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x1))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x1) (pr11 x1)
                          (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x1)
                         (pr2 x1))
                    (λ p : C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (...) (...),
                           bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (...) ⟧,
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       ... ... ... ...
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         ... ... ... ...
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (...) =
                     p
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x') (...) (...) (...))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T (...)
                            (...),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (...) ⟧)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          ... ... ... ...
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T ... ... ... ...
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                            (...))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (...) (...) (...) (...)
                        · (... · ...))
                       (λ p : C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                        p = ... · ...)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          (C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧) (... · ...)
                          (... · ...) (λ ..., ...)
                          (! (...))
                          (assoc' ... ... ...))
                       (assoc'
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T ... ... ... ...)
                          (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T ... ... ... ...)
                          (ass ... ... ...)))
                    ((pr12 (associators_equiv_subproof
                              C T ass y0)) (pr11 x1)
                       (pr11 x') (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)
                       (pr11 f)))
                 (assoc
                    (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                       (pr11 x1) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (...) (pr21 x1) (pr21 x')
                          (pr21 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr21 x') (...) (...)
                            (...))))) y0)) ass x0)
     (y x0))
    (weq_iso
       (λ (assinv : associatorinv_data T)
        (xyz : precategory_binproduct_data
                 (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C),
        assinv (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
       (λ (assinv : ∏
                    x0 : precategory_binproduct_data
                           (precategory_binproduct_data
                              C C) C,
                    C
                    ⟦ assoc_right
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T) x0,
                    assoc_left
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T) x0 ⟧) (x0 y z : C),
        assinv ((x0,, y),, z))
       (λ x0 : associatorinv_data T, idpath x0)
       (λ y : ∏
              x0 : precategory_binproduct_data
                     (precategory_binproduct_data C C)
                     C,
              C
              ⟦ assoc_right
                  (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                     T) x0,
              assoc_left
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                x0 ⟧, idpath y) x)

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
assinv: associatorinv_data T
associator_iso_law (pr1 ass) assinv
≃ (λ y : ∏
         x : precategory_binproduct_data
               (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
         C
         ⟦ assoc_right
             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x,
         assoc_left
           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x ⟧,
   ∏
   x : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
   is_inverse_in_precat
     (weqtotal2
        (weq_iso
           (λ (ass : associator_data T)
            (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
            ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
           (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                      (assoc_left
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T))
                      (assoc_right
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T))) (x0 y0 z : C),
            nt ((x0,, y0),, z))
           (λ x0 : associator_data T, idpath x0)
           (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                     (assoc_left
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T))
                     (assoc_right
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T)), idpath y0))
        (λ ass : associator_data T,
         weq_iso
           (λ (assnat : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
                        × associator_nat_rightwhisker
                            ass
                          × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                              ass)
            (x0 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
            (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (C
               ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                      (pr21 x0)) (pr2 x0),
               bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                    (pr2 x')) ⟧)
              (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
               · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                       (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                    (pr11 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                           (pr2 f))))
              (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
               · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                      (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                   (pr11 f)
               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (pr11 x')
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                      (pr2 x0))
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                      (pr2 x'))
                   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                      (pr21 f)
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                        (pr2 f)))
              (λ p : C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                         (pr2 x0),
                     bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧,
               rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x0)
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                    (pr21 x0))
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                    (pr21 x'))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                    (pr11 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                      (pr21 f))
               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                      (pr21 x')) (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                   (pr2 f)
               · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') = p)
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (C
                  ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0)) (pr2 x0),
                  bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                       (pr2 x0)) ⟧)

                  · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0)
                      (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr2 x0)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                       (pr21 x0))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (pr21 x0))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                       (pr11 f))
                  · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                 (λ p : C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T

                            (pr2 x0),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T

                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)) ⟧,
                  rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr2 x0)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                       (pr21 x0))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (pr21 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                       (pr11 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f))
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x')) (pr2 x0)
                      (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                  · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
                  p
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                           (pr2 f)))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                         (pr2 x0),
                     bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x0)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                          (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                         (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                         (pr2 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x0)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                          (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                     · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                            (pr2 x')))
                    (λ p : C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                               (pr2 x0),
                           bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x')
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧,
                     p =
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x0)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                          (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                         (pr2 x0)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (...) (pr21 x0)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr21 x') (...) (...)
                              (...)))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                            (pr2 x0),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                            (pr2 x0)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x')
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (...) (pr21 x0)
                               (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T (pr21 x') (...)
                                 (...) (...)))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T

                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                        · (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                             (pr2 x0)
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr11 x')
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...)
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...) (... · ...)))
                       (λ p : C
                              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T ... ...)
                                  (pr2 x0),
                              bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x')
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T ... ...) ⟧,
                        rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...) (... · ...)
                        · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T ... ... ... ...
                           · ass ... ... ...) = p)
                       (! (maponpaths (compose (...))
                             (internal_paths_rew_r
                                (...) (...) (...)
                                (...) (...) (...)) @
                           cancel_precomposition C
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...) (... · ...)
                             (... · ...)
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...)
                             (internal_paths_rew_r ...
                                ... ... ... ... ...) @
                           internal_paths_rew_r
                             (C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧)
                             (... · ...) (... · ...)
                             (λ ..., ...)
                             (internal_paths_rew_r ...
                                ... ... ... ... ...)
                             (assoc ... ... ...)))
                       (assoc'
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr2 x0)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                                (pr11 x') (pr11 f)))
                          (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                             (pr2 x0))
                          (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr11 x')
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr21 x0) (...))
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr21 x') (...))
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...
                              · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...))))
                    (assoc'
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                               (pr21 x') (pr21 f)))
                       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f))
                       (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                          (pr2 x'))))
                 ((pr12 assnat) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                    (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0) (pr11 f)))
              (assoc
                 (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                       (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                    (pr11 f))
                 (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                       (pr2 x0))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                       (pr2 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T

                       (pr21 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                         (pr2 f)))))
           (associators_equiv_subproof C T ass)
           (λ x0 : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
                   × associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
                     × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                         ass,
            let X :=
              λ (X Y : UU) (H : isaprop X)
              (H0 : isaprop Y) (x1 x' : X × Y),
              pr1 (isapropdirprod X Y H H0 x1 x') in
            X (associator_nat_leftwhisker ass)
              (associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
               × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass)
              (impred_isaprop
                 (λ t : C,
                  ∏ (y0 z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                  ass t y0 z
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T y0 z)
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T y0 z')
                      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         y0 z z' h) =
                  leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T t y0) z z'
                    h · ass t y0 z')
                 (λ t : C,
                  impred_isaprop
                    (λ t0 : C,
                     ∏ (z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                     ass t t0 z
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                         (...) (...) (...) =
                     leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (...) z z' h · ass t t0 z')
                    (λ t0 : C,
                     impred_isaprop
                       (λ t1 : C,
                        ∏ (z' : C) (h : ...),
                        ... = ...)
                       (λ t1 : C,
                        impred_isaprop (...) (...)))))
              (isapropdirprod
                 (associator_nat_rightwhisker ass)
                 (associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass)
                 (impred_isaprop
                    (λ t : C,
                     ∏ (x' y0 z : C)
                     (f : C ⟦ t, x' ⟧),
                     ass t y0 z
                     · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T y0 z)
                         t x' f =
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t y0)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T x' y0)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          y0 t x' f) · ass x' y0 z)
                    (λ t : C,
                     impred_isaprop
                       (λ t0 : C,
                        ∏ (y0 z : C)
                        (f : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧),
                        ... · ... = ... · ...)
                       (λ t0 : C,
                        impred_isaprop (λ ..., ...)
                          (λ ..., ...))))
                 (impred_isaprop
                    (λ t : C,
                     ∏ (y0 y' z : C)
                     (g : C ⟦ y0, y' ⟧),
                     ass t y0 z
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T y0 z)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T y' z)
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T z y0 y' g) =
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t y0)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t y')
                       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          t y0 y' g) · ass t y' z)
                    (λ t : C,
                     impred_isaprop
                       (λ t0 : C,
                        ∏ (y' z : C)
                        (g : C ⟦ t0, y' ⟧),
                        ... · ... = ... · ...)

                        impred_isaprop (λ ..., ...)
                          (λ ..., ...)))))
              (associators_equiv_subproof C T ass
                 (λ (x1 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
                  (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x1, x' ⟧),
                  internal_paths_rew_r
                    (C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                         (pr2 x1),
                     bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T

                    (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)
                     · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...) (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                          (pr11 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x')
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               ... ...)
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               ... ...) (... · ...)))
                    (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)
                     · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x1) (...)) (pr11 x1)
                         (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (...) (pr21 x1)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr21 x') (...) (...)
                              (...)))
                    (λ p : C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...) (pr2 x1),
                           bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x')
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...) ⟧,
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (...) (...) (...) (...)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (...) (...) (...) (...)
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                         (pr2 x') = p)
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               ... ...) (pr2 x1),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...) ⟧)
                       (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1)
                          (pr2 x1)
                        · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               ... ...) (pr11 x1)
                            (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x1)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...)
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T ... ... ... ...)
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x1)
                            (pr2 x1))
                       (λ p : C
                              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...,
                              bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ... ⟧,
                        ... · ... · ass ... ... ... =
                        p
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T ... ... ... ...)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          (C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               ... ...,
                           bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ... ⟧)
                          (... · ... · ass ... ... ...)
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T ... ... ... ... · (...))
                          (λ p : ..., p = ...)
                          (internal_paths_rew_r (...)
                             (...) (...) (...) (! ...)
                             (...))
                          (assoc' (...) (...) (...)))
                       ((pr12 x0) (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                          (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1) (pr11 f)))
                    (assoc
                       (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1)
                          (pr2 x1))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x1) (...))
                          (pr11 x1) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x1) (...))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x') (...))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T ... ... ... ...
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T ... ... ... ...)))))
              x0)
           (λ y0 : is_nat_trans
                     (assoc_left
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T))
                     (assoc_right
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T))
                     (weq_iso
                        (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                         (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                         ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                           (pr2 xyz))
                        (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                                   (assoc_left
                                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                         T))
                                   (assoc_right
                                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                         T)))
                         (x0 y0 z : C),
                         nt ((x0,, y0),, z))
                        (λ x0 : associator_data T,
                         idpath x0)
                        (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                                  (assoc_left
                                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                        T))
                                  (assoc_right
                                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                        T)), idpath y0)
                        ass),
            let X :=
              λ (P : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C → UU)
              (H : ∏ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C, isaprop (P t))
              (x0 x' : ∏ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C, P t),
              pr1 (impred_isaprop P H x0 x') in
            X
              (λ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
               ∏ (x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
               (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, x' ⟧),
               # (assoc_left
                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T)) f
               · weq_iso
                   (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                    (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                    ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                      (pr2 xyz))
                   (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                              (assoc_left ...)
                              (assoc_right ...))
                    (x0 y1 z : C), nt ((...),, z))
                   (λ x0 : associator_data T,
                    idpath x0)
                   (λ y1 : nat_trans_data
                             (assoc_left ...)
                             (assoc_right ...),
                    idpath y1) ass x' =
               weq_iso
                 (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                  (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                  ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
                 (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                            (assoc_left ...)
                            (assoc_right ...))
                  (x0 y1 z : C), nt ((...),, z))
                 (λ x0 : associator_data T, idpath x0)
                 (λ y1 : nat_trans_data
                           (assoc_left ...)
                           (assoc_right ...),
                  idpath y1) ass t
               · # (assoc_right
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T)) f)
              (λ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
               impred_isaprop
                 (λ t0 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
                  ∏ f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                  # (assoc_left (...)) f
                  · weq_iso
                      (λ (ass0 : ...) (xyz : ...),
                       ass0 ... ... ...)
                      (λ (nt : ...) (x0 y1 z : C),
                       nt ...) (λ x0 : ..., idpath x0)
                      (λ y1 : ..., idpath y1) ass t0 =
                  weq_iso
                    (λ (ass0 : ...) (xyz : ...),
                     ass0 ... ... ...)
                    (λ (nt : ...) (x0 y1 z : C),
                     nt ...) (λ x0 : ..., idpath x0)
                    (λ y1 : ..., idpath y1) ass t
                  · # (assoc_right (...)) f)
                 (λ t0 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
                  impred_isaprop
                    (λ t1 : (...) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                     # (...) t1
                     · weq_iso (...) (...) (...) (...)
                         ass t0 =
                     weq_iso (...) (...) (...) (...)
                       ass t · # (...) t1)
                    (λ t1 : (...) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                     C (assoc_left (...) t)
                       (assoc_right (...) t0)
                       (# ... t1
                        · weq_iso ... ... ... ... ass
                            t0)
                       (weq_iso ... ... ... ... ass t
                        · # ... t1))))
              (λ (x0 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
               (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (C
                  ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0)) (pr2 x0),
                  bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                       (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                 (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                  · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                       (pr11 x0) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (...) (pr21 x0)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr21 x') (...) (...)
                              (...))))
                 (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                  · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0)
                      (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                           (pr2 f)))
                 (λ p : C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                            (pr2 x0),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧,
                  rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr2 x0)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                       (pr21 x0))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (pr21 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       ... ... ... ...
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         ... ... ... ...)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x')) (pr2 x0)
                      (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                  · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
                  p)
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                         (pr2 x0),
                     bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)) ⟧)
                    (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                     · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                         (pr11 x0) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x0)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                          (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                         (pr2 x0))
                    (λ p : C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...) (pr2 x0),
                           bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x')
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...) ⟧,
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (...) (...) (...) (...)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (...) (...) (...) (...)
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                         (pr2 x') =
                     p
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                            ...)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                            ...) (... · ...))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               ... ...) (pr2 x0),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...) ⟧)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (...) (...) (...) (...)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (...) (...) (...) (...)
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                            (pr2 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...) (... · ...)
                        · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T ... ... ... ...
                           · ass ... ... ...))
                       (λ p : C
                              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...,
                              bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ... ⟧,
                        p =
                        ... · ...
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T ... ... ... ...)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          (C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               ... ...,
                           bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ... ⟧)
                          (... · ...
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T ... ... ... ...)
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T ... ... ... ... · (...))
                          (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                          (! (... @ ...))
                          (assoc' (...) (...) (...)))
                       (assoc'
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (...) (...) (...) (...))
                          (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (...) (...) (...) (...))
                          (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                             (...))))
                    ((pr12 (associators_equiv_subproof
                              C T ass y0)) (pr11 x0)
                       (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                       (pr11 f)))
                 (assoc
                    (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                       (pr11 x0) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                          (pr21 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr21 x') (pr2 x0)
                            (pr2 x') (pr2 f))))) y0))
        ass x) (y x))
    (weq_iso
       (λ (assinv : associatorinv_data T)
        (xyz : precategory_binproduct_data
                 (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C),
        assinv (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
       (λ (assinv : ∏
                    x : precategory_binproduct_data
                          (precategory_binproduct_data
                             C C) C,
                    C
                    ⟦ assoc_right
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T) x,
                    assoc_left
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T) x ⟧) (x y z : C),
        assinv ((x,, y),, z))
       (λ x : associatorinv_data T, idpath x)
       (λ y : ∏
              x : precategory_binproduct_data
                    (precategory_binproduct_data C C)
                    C,
              C
              ⟦ assoc_right
                  (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                     T) x,
              assoc_left
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                x ⟧, idpath y) assinv)

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
assinv: associatorinv_data T
associator_iso_law (pr1 ass) assinv
→ ∏
  x : precategory_binproduct_data
        (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
  is_inverse_in_precat
    (weqtotal2
       (weq_iso
          (λ (ass : associator_data T)
           (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
           ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
          (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                     (assoc_left
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T))
                     (assoc_right
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T))) (x0 y z : C),
           nt ((x0,, y),, z))
          (λ x0 : associator_data T, idpath x0)
          (λ y : nat_trans_data
                   (assoc_left
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T))
                   (assoc_right
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T)), idpath y))
       (λ ass : associator_data T,
        weq_iso
          (λ (assnat : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
                       × associator_nat_rightwhisker
                           ass
                         × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                             ass)
           (x0 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
           (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
           internal_paths_rew_r
             (C
              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                     (pr21 x0)) (pr2 x0),
              bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                   (pr2 x')) ⟧)
             (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
              · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                      (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                   (pr11 f)
                 · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr11 x')
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                        (pr2 x0))
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                        (pr2 x'))
                     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                        (pr21 f)
                      · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                          (pr2 f))))
             (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
              · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                     (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                  (pr11 f)
              · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (pr11 x')
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                     (pr2 x0))
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                     (pr2 x'))
                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                     (pr21 f)
                   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                       (pr2 f)))
             (λ p : C
                    ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                        (pr2 x0),
                    bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧,
              rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x0)
                (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                   (pr21 x0))
                (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                   (pr21 x'))
                (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                   (pr11 f)
                 · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                     (pr21 f))
              · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (pr21 x')) (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                  (pr2 f)
              · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') = p)
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (C
                 ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                        (pr21 x0)) (pr2 x0),
                 bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                      (pr2 x0)) ⟧)
                (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                 · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                        (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                     (pr11 f))
                (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (pr2 x0)
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                      (pr21 x0))
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                      (pr21 x0))
                   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                      (pr11 f))
                 · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                (λ p : C
                       ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                           (pr2 x0),
                       bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)) ⟧,
                 rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (pr2 x0)
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                      (pr21 x0))
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                      (pr21 x'))
                   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                      (pr11 f)
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                        (pr21 f))
                 · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                        (pr21 x')) (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                     (pr2 f)
                 · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
                 p
                 · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr11 x')
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                        (pr2 x0))
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                        (pr2 x'))
                     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                        (pr21 f)
                      · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                          (pr2 f)))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (C
                    ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                        (pr2 x0),
                    bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr2 x0)
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                         (pr11 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                           (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                        (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                    · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr2 x0)
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                         (pr11 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                           (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                    · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                         (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                       · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                           (pr2 x')))
                   (λ p : C
                          ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                              (pr2 x0),
                          bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x')
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧,
                    p =
                    rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr2 x0)
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                         (pr11 f))
                    · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr11 x')
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                        (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                           T (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0)
                           (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                         · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x') (pr2 x0)
                             (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (C
                       ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                           (pr2 x0),
                       bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x0)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                            (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                       · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                           (pr2 x0)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr11 x')
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                           (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0)
                              (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                            · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (pr21 x') (pr2 x0)
                                (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x0)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                            (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                       · (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                            (pr2 x0)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr11 x')
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                              (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0)
                                 (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                   T (pr21 x')
                                   (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                                   (pr2 f))))
                      (λ p : C
                             ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (bifunctor_on_objects
                                    T (pr11 x0)
                                    (pr21 x0))
                                 (pr2 x0),
                             bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x')
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                             ⟧,
                       rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x0)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                            (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                              (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                       · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                            (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                          · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                              (pr2 x')) = p)
                      (! (maponpaths
                            (compose
                               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T (pr2 x0)
                                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T ... ...)
                                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T ... ...)
                                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                     T ... ... ... ...)))
                            (internal_paths_rew_r
                               (C
                                ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects
                                    T (pr11 x') (...),
                                bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x') (...) ⟧)
                               (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T (pr11 x')
                                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T ... ...)
                                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T ... ...)
                                  (... · ...))
                               (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T (pr11 x') (...)
                                  (...) (...)
                                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                    T (pr11 x') (...)
                                    (...) (...))
                               (λ p : C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                                ... · p = ... · ...)
                               (internal_paths_rew_r
                                  (C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧)
                                  (... · ...)
                                  (... · ...)
                                  (λ ..., ...)
                                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                                     ... ... ... ...
                                     ... ...)
                                  (assoc ... ... ...))
                               (bifunctor_leftcomp T
                                  (pr11 x')
                                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T ... ...)
                                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T ... ...)
                                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T ... ...)
                                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                     T ... ... ... ...)
                                  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                     T ... ... ... ...))) @
                          cancel_precomposition C
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                               (pr2 x0))
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                               (pr2 x0))
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x')
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr21 x') (...)))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (...) (...) (...)
                               (...)
                             · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                                 (...)
                             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T (pr11 x')
                                 (bifunctor_on_objects
                                    T ... ...)
                                 (bifunctor_on_objects
                                    T ... ...)
                                 (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                    T ... ... ... ...))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr2 x0)
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...)
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...)
                               (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...)
                             · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...
                                · ass ... ... ...))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr2 x0)
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T (pr21 x0)
                                  (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                                  (pr11 f)))
                            (internal_paths_rew_r
                               (C
                                ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects
                                    T ... ...,
                                bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ... ⟧)
                               (... · ...
                                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                    T ... ... ... ...)
                               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...
                                · (...))
                               (λ p : ..., p = ...)
                               (cancel_precomposition
                                  C (...) (...) (...)
                                  (...) (...) (...)
                                  (...))
                               (assoc' (...) (...)
                                  (...))) @
                          internal_paths_rew_r
                            (C
                             ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (bifunctor_on_objects
                                    T ... ...)
                                 (pr2 x0),
                             bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x')
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...) ⟧)
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr2 x0)
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...)
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...)
                               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...)
                             · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...
                                · (...)))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (...) (...) (...)
                               (...)
                             · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T (...) (...) (...)
                                 (...)
                             · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...
                                · ass ... ... ...))
                            (λ p : C
                                   ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects
                                       T ... ...,
                                   bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T ... ... ⟧,
                             p =
                             rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T ... ... ... ...
                             · (...))
                            (internal_paths_rew_r
                               (C
                                ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects
                                    T ... ...,
                                bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ... ⟧)
                               (... · ... · (...))
                               (... · ...
                                · ass ... ... ...)
                               (λ p : ..., p = ...)
                               (internal_paths_rew_r
                                  (...) (...) (...)
                                  (...) (...) (...))
                               (assoc (...) (...)
                                  (...)))
                            (assoc
                               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T (...) (...) (...)
                                  (...))
                               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T (...) (...) (...)
                                  (...))
                               (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...
                                · ass ... ... ...))))
                      (assoc'
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr2 x0)
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                               (pr11 x') (pr11 f)))
                         (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                            (pr2 x0))
                         (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x')
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0)
                               (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T (pr21 x') (pr2 x0)
                                 (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))))
                   (assoc'
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x0)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                            (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                              (pr21 x') (pr21 f)))
                      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                         (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f))
                      (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                         (pr2 x'))))
                ((pr12 assnat) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                   (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0) (pr11 f)))
             (assoc (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                      (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                   (pr11 f))
                (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (pr11 x')
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                      (pr2 x0))
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                      (pr2 x'))
                   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                      (pr21 f)
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                        (pr2 f)))))
          (associators_equiv_subproof C T ass)
          (λ x0 : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
                  × associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
                    × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                        ass,
           let X :=
             λ (X Y : UU) (H : isaprop X)
             (H0 : isaprop Y) (x1 x' : X × Y),
             pr1 (isapropdirprod X Y H H0 x1 x') in
           X (associator_nat_leftwhisker ass)
             (associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
              × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass)
             (impred_isaprop
                (λ t : C,
                 ∏ (y z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                 ass t y z
                 · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z')
                     (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y
                        z z' h) =
                 leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T t y) z z' h
                 · ass t y z')
                (λ t : C,
                 impred_isaprop
                   (λ t0 : C,
                    ∏ (z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                    ass t t0 z
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T t0 z)
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T t0 z')
                        (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           t0 z z' h) =
                    leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T t t0) z
                      z' h · ass t t0 z')
                   (λ t0 : C,
                    impred_isaprop
                      (λ t1 : C,
                       ∏ (z' : C) (h : C ⟦ t1, z' ⟧),
                       ass t t0 t1
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           t (...) (...) (...) =
                       leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (...) t1 z' h · ass t t0 z')
                      (λ t1 : C,
                       impred_isaprop
                         (λ t2 : C,
                          ∏ h : ..., ... = ...)
                         (λ t2 : C,
                          impred_isaprop (...) (...))))))
             (isapropdirprod
                (associator_nat_rightwhisker ass)
                (associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass)
                (impred_isaprop
                   (λ t : C,
                    ∏ (x' y z : C) (f : C ⟦ t, x' ⟧),
                    ass t y z
                    · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) t
                        x' f =
