                    rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T t y)
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T x' y)
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         y t x' f) · ass x' y z)
                   (λ t : C,
                    impred_isaprop
                      (λ t0 : C,
                       ∏ (y z : C) (f : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧),
                       ass t y z
                       · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                           T
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
                           t t0 f =
                       rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         z
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T t y)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T t0 y)
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T y t t0 f) · ass t0 y z)
                      (λ t0 : C,
                       impred_isaprop
                         (λ t1 : C,
                          ∏ (z : C) (f : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧),
                          ... · ... = ... · ...)
                         (λ t1 : C,
                          impred_isaprop (λ ..., ...)
                            (λ ..., ...)))))
                (impred_isaprop
                   (λ t : C,
                    ∏ (y y' z : C) (g : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧),
                    ass t y z
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T y' z)
                        (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                           T z y y' g) =
                    rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T t y)
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T t y')
                      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                         y y' g) · ass t y' z)
                   (λ t : C,
                    impred_isaprop
                      (λ t0 : C,
                       ∏ (y' z : C)
                       (g : C ⟦ t0, y' ⟧),
                       ass t t0 z
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           t
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T t0
                              z)
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T y'
                              z)
                           (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T z t0 y' g) =
                       rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         z
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T t t0)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T t y')
                         (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T t t0 y' g) · ass t y' z)
                      (λ t0 : C,
                       impred_isaprop
                         (λ t1 : C,
                          ∏ (z : C)
                          (g : C ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧),
                          ... · ... = ... · ...)
                         (λ t1 : C,
                          impred_isaprop (λ ..., ...)
                            (λ ..., ...))))))
             (associators_equiv_subproof C T ass
                (λ (x1 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
                 (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x1, x' ⟧),
                 internal_paths_rew_r
                   (C
                    ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                        (pr2 x1),
                    bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                   (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)
                    · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                         (pr11 x1) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr11 x')
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                           (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr2 x1) (pr21 x1)
                              (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                            · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (pr21 x') (pr2 x1)
                                (pr2 x') (pr2 f))))
                   (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)
                    · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                        (pr11 x1) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr11 x')
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                        (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                           T (pr2 x1) (pr21 x1)
                           (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                         · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x') (pr2 x1)
                             (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))
                   (λ p : C
                          ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                              (pr2 x1),
                          bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x')
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧,
                    rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr2 x1)
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr21 x1) (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                         (pr11 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr11 x') (pr21 x1)
                           (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                        (pr2 x1) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                    · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
                    p)
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (C
                       ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                           (pr2 x1),
                       bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)) ⟧)
                      (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1)
                         (pr2 x1)
                       · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                           T
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                           (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                           (pr11 f))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x1)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x1))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr21 x1) (pr11 x1)
                            (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                       · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x1)
                           (pr2 x1))
                      (λ p : C
                             ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (bifunctor_on_objects
                                    T (pr11 x1)
                                    (pr21 x1))
                                 (pr2 x1),
                             bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x')
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr21 x1) (...)) ⟧,
                       rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x1)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                            ...)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                            ...) (... · ...)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                              ...) (pr2 x1) (pr2 x')
                           (pr2 f)
                       · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                           (pr2 x') =
                       p
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr11 x')
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr21 x1) (...))
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr21 x') (...))
                           (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T ... ... ... ...
                            · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...))
                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                         (C
                          ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                              (pr2 x1),
                          bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x')
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x') (...)) ⟧)
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr2 x1)
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               ... ...)
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               ... ...) (... · ...)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 ... ...) (pr2 x1)
                              (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                          · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                              (pr2 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr2 x1)
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T ... ... ... ...
                             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T ... ... ... ...)
                          · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (...) (...) (...)
                               (...)
                             · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                                 (...)))
                         (λ p : C
                                ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects
                                    T (...) (...),
                                bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x') (...) ⟧,
                          p =
                          rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T ... ... ... ...
                          · ass ... ... ...
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr11 x') (...) (...)
                              (...))
                         (internal_paths_rew_r
                            (C
                             ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (...) (...),
                             bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x') (...) ⟧)
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T ... ... ... ...
                             · ass ... ... ...
                             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T (pr11 x') (...)
                                 (...) (...))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (...) (...) (...)
                               (...) · (... · ...))
                            (λ p : C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                             ... · ... = p)
                            (! (maponpaths ... ... @
                                ... @ ...))
                            (assoc'
                               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...)
                               (ass ... ... ...)
                               (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...)))
                         (assoc'
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr2 x1)
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...)
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...) (... · ...))
                            (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...) (pr2 x1)
                               (pr2 x') (pr2 f))
                            (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                               (pr2 x'))))
                      ((pr12 x0) (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                         (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1) (pr11 f)))
                   (assoc
                      (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1)
                         (pr2 x1))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                         (pr11 x1) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr2 x1) (pr21 x1)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr21 x') (pr2 x1)
                              (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))))) x0)
          (λ y : is_nat_trans
                   (assoc_left
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T))
                   (assoc_right
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T))
                   (weq_iso
                      (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                       (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                       ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                         (pr2 xyz))
                      (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                                 (assoc_left
                                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                       T))
                                 (assoc_right
                                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                       T)))
                       (x0 y z : C), nt ((x0,, y),, z))
                      (λ x0 : associator_data T,
                       idpath x0)
                      (λ y : nat_trans_data
                               (assoc_left
                                  (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                     T))
                               (assoc_right
                                  (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                     T)), idpath y)
                      ass),
           let X :=
             λ (P : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C → UU)
             (H : ∏ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C, isaprop (P t))
             (x0 x' : ∏ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C, P t),
             pr1 (impred_isaprop P H x0 x') in
           X
             (λ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
              ∏ (x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
              (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, x' ⟧),
              # (assoc_left
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T)) f
              · weq_iso
                  (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                   (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                   ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                     (pr2 xyz))
                  (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                             (assoc_left
                                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                   T))
                             (assoc_right
                                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                   T))) (x0 y0 z : C),
                   nt ((x0,, y0),, z))
                  (λ x0 : associator_data T, idpath x0)
                  (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                            (assoc_left
                               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                  T))
                            (assoc_right
                               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                  T)), idpath y0) ass
                  x' =
              weq_iso
                (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                 (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                 ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
                (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                           (assoc_left
                              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                 T))
                           (assoc_right
                              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                 T))) (x0 y0 z : C),
                 nt ((x0,, y0),, z))
                (λ x0 : associator_data T, idpath x0)
                (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                          (assoc_left
                             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                T))
                          (assoc_right
                             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                T)), idpath y0) ass t
              · # (assoc_right
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T)) f)
             (λ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
              impred_isaprop
                (λ t0 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
                 ∏ f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                 # (assoc_left
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T)) f
                 · weq_iso
                     (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                      (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                      ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                        (pr2 xyz))
                     (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                                (assoc_left ...)
                                (assoc_right ...))
                      (x0 y0 z : C), nt ((...),, z))
                     (λ x0 : associator_data T,
                      idpath x0)
                     (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                               (assoc_left ...)
                               (assoc_right ...),
                      idpath y0) ass t0 =
                 weq_iso
                   (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                    (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                    ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                      (pr2 xyz))
                   (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                              (assoc_left ...)
                              (assoc_right ...))
                    (x0 y0 z : C), nt ((...),, z))
                   (λ x0 : associator_data T,
                    idpath x0)
                   (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                             (assoc_left ...)
                             (assoc_right ...),
                    idpath y0) ass t
                 · # (assoc_right
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T)) f)
                (λ t0 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
                 impred_isaprop
                   (λ t1 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                    # (assoc_left
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T)) t1
                    · weq_iso
                        (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                         (xyz : ... ⊠ C),
                         ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                           (...))
                        (λ (nt : nat_trans_data ...
                                   ...) (x0 y0 z : C),
                         nt (...))
                        (λ x0 : associator_data T,
                         idpath x0)
                        (λ y0 : nat_trans_data ... ...,
                         idpath y0) ass t0 =
                    weq_iso
                      (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                       (xyz : ... ⊠ C),
                       ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                         (...))
                      (λ (nt : nat_trans_data ... ...)
                       (x0 y0 z : C), nt (...))
                      (λ x0 : associator_data T,
                       idpath x0)
                      (λ y0 : nat_trans_data ... ...,
                       idpath y0) ass t
                    · # (assoc_right
                           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                              T)) t1)
                   (λ t1 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                    C
                      (assoc_left
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T) t)
                      (assoc_right
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T) t0)
                      (# (assoc_left (...)) t1
                       · weq_iso
                           (λ (ass0 : ...)
                            (xyz : ...),
                            ass0 ... ... ...)
                           (λ (nt : ...)
                            (x0 y0 z : C), nt ...)
                           (λ x0 : ..., idpath x0)
                           (λ y0 : ..., idpath y0) ass
                           t0)
                      (weq_iso
                         (λ (ass0 : ...) (xyz : ...),
                          ass0 ... ... ...)
                         (λ (nt : ...) (x0 y0 z : C),
                          nt ...)
                         (λ x0 : ..., idpath x0)
                         (λ y0 : ..., idpath y0) ass t
                       · # (assoc_right (...)) t1))))
             (λ (x0 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
              (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
              internal_paths_rew_r
                (C
                 ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                        (pr21 x0)) (pr2 x0),
                 bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                      (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                 · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0)
                      (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr11 x')
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                        (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                           T (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0)
                           (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                         · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x') (pr2 x0)
                             (pr2 x') (pr2 f))))
                (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                 · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                        (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                     (pr11 f)
                 · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr11 x')
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                        (pr2 x0))
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                        (pr2 x'))
                     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                        (pr21 f)
                      · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                          (pr2 f)))
                (λ p : C
                       ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                           (pr2 x0),
                       bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧,
                 rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (pr2 x0)
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                      (pr21 x0))
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                      (pr21 x'))
                   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                      (pr11 f)
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                        (pr21 f))
                 · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                        (pr21 x')) (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                     (pr2 f)
                 · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
                 p)
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (C
                    ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                        (pr2 x0),
                    bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)) ⟧)
                   (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                    · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                        (pr11 x0) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr2 x0)
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                         (pr11 f))
                    · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                   (λ p : C
                          ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                              (pr2 x0),
                          bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x')
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)) ⟧,
                    rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr2 x0)
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                         (pr11 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                           (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                        (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                    · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
                    p
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr11 x')
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                        (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                           T (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0)
                           (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                         · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x') (pr2 x0)
                             (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (C
                       ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                           (pr2 x0),
                       bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x0)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                            (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                              (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                           (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                       · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                           (pr2 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x0)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                            (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                              (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                       · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                            (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                          · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                              (pr2 x')))
                      (λ p : C
                             ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (bifunctor_on_objects
                                    T (pr11 x0)
                                    (pr21 x0))
                                 (pr2 x0),
                             bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x')
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr21 x') (...)) ⟧,
                       p =
                       rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x0)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                            ...)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                            ...)
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T ... ... ... ...)
                       · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                           (pr2 x0)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr11 x')
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr21 x0) (...))
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr21 x') (...))
                           (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T ... ... ... ...
                            · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...))
                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                         (C
                          ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                              (pr2 x0),
                          bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x')
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x') (...)) ⟧)
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr2 x0)
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               ... ...)
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               ... ...)
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T ... ... ... ...)
                          · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                              (pr2 x0)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr11 x')
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (pr21 x0) (...))
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (pr21 x') (...))
                              (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T ... ... ... ...
                               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                   T ... ... ... ...))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr2 x0)
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                               (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                          · (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                               (...)
                             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T (pr11 x') (...)
                                 (...) (...)))
                         (λ p : C
                                ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects
                                    T (...) (...),
                                bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x') (...) ⟧,
                          rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (...) (...) (...) (...)
                          · (... · ...) = p)
                         (! (maponpaths (compose ...)
                               (internal_paths_rew_r
                                  ... ... ... ... ...
                                  ...) @
                             cancel_precomposition C
                               (...) (...) (...) (...)
                               (...) (...) (...) @
                             internal_paths_rew_r
                               (...) (...) (...) (...)
                               (...) (...)))
                         (assoc'
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr2 x0)
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...)
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...)
                               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...))
                            (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                               (pr2 x0))
                            (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr11 x')
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...)
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...) (... · ...))))
                      (assoc'
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr2 x0)
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                               (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                                 (pr21 x') (pr21 f)))
                         (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                            (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f))
                         (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                            (pr2 x'))))
                   ((pr12 (associators_equiv_subproof
                             C T ass y)) (pr11 x0)
                      (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                      (pr11 f)))
                (assoc
                   (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0)
                      (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                   (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                           (pr2 f))))) y)) ass x)
    (weq_iso
       (λ (assinv : associatorinv_data T)
        (xyz : precategory_binproduct_data
                 (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C),
        assinv (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
       (λ (assinv : ∏
                    x0 : precategory_binproduct_data
                           (precategory_binproduct_data
                              C C) C,
                    C
                    ⟦ assoc_right
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T) x0,
                    assoc_left
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T) x0 ⟧) (x0 y z : C),
        assinv ((x0,, y),, z))
       (λ x0 : associatorinv_data T, idpath x0)
       (λ y : ∏
              x0 : precategory_binproduct_data
                     (precategory_binproduct_data C C)
                     C,
              C
              ⟦ assoc_right
                  (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                     T) x0,
              assoc_left
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                x0 ⟧, idpath y) assinv x)
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
assinv: associatorinv_data T
(∏
 x : precategory_binproduct_data
       (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (weqtotal2
      (weq_iso
         (λ (ass : associator_data T)
          (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
          ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
         (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                    (assoc_left
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T))
                    (assoc_right
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T))) 
          (x0 y z : C), 
          nt ((x0,, y),, z))
         (λ x0 : associator_data T, idpath x0)
         (λ y : nat_trans_data
                  (assoc_left
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T))
                  (assoc_right
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T)), 
          idpath y))
      (λ ass : associator_data T,
       weq_iso
         (λ (assnat : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
                      ×

                      ×

                       ass)

          (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),

            (C
             ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T

                    (pr21 x0)) 
                 (pr2 x0),
             bifunctor_on_objects T 
               (pr11 x')
               (bifunctor_on_objects T 
                  (pr21 x')

            (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
             · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T

                       (pr11 x')

                  (λ p :

         (associators_equiv_subproof C T ass)
         (λ x0 : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
                 × associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
                   × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                       ass,
          let X :=
            λ (X Y : UU) 
            (H : isaprop X) 
            (H0 : isaprop Y) 
            (x1 x' : X × Y),
            pr1 (isapropdirprod X Y H H0 x1 x') in
          X (associator_nat_leftwhisker ass)
            (associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
             × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass)
            (impred_isaprop
               (λ t : C,
                ∏ (y z z' : C) 
                (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                ass t y z
                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z')
                    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z
                       z' h) =
                leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T t y) z z' h
                · ass t y z')
               (λ t : C,
                impred_isaprop
                  (λ t0 : C,
                   ∏ (z z' : C) 
                   (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                   ass t t0 z
                   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t0 z)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t0 z')
                       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       t0 z z' h) =
                   leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T t t0) z
                     z' h · 
                   ass t t0 z')
                  (λ t0 : C,
                   impred_isaprop
                     (λ 
                      t1 : C,
                      ∏ 
                      (z' : C) 
                      (h : C ⟦ t1, z' ⟧),
                      ass t t0 t1
                      · 
                      leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                       ... ... ... =
                      leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       ... t1 z' h · 
                      ass t t0 z')
                     (λ 
                      t1 : C,
                      impred_isaprop
                       (λ t2 : C, ∏ ..., ...)
                       (λ 
                       t2 : C, 
                       impred_isaprop ... ...)))))
            (isapropdirprod
               (associator_nat_rightwhisker ass)
               (associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass)
               (impred_isaprop
                  (λ t : C,
                   ∏ (x' y z : C) 
                   (f : C ⟦ t, x' ⟧),
                   ass t y z
                   · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T

                     (bifunctor_on_objects T t y)

                  (λ t : C,

                       t1 : C,
                       impred_isaprop (...) (...)))))
               (impred_isaprop
                  (λ t : C,
                   ∏ (y y' z : C) 
                   (g : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧),
                   ass t y z
                   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T y' z)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       z y y' g) =
                   rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T t y)
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T t y')
                     (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                       y y' g) · 
                   ass t y' z)
                  (λ t : C,
                   impred_isaprop
                     (λ 
                      t0 : C,
                      ∏ 
                      (y' z : C) 
                      (g : C ⟦ t0, y' ⟧),
                      ass t t0 z
                      · 
                      leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                       (...)

                       (...)

                       (...) ·

                     (λ

                       (λ 
                       t1 : C,
                       impred_isaprop (...) (...))))))
            (associators_equiv_subproof C T ass

                     ((pr12 x0)

         (λ y : is_nat_trans
                  (assoc_left

                  (weq_iso
                     (λ

                       (assoc_right

                       T))
                       (assoc_right
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat

            λ (P : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C → UU)

               (λ t0 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,

              (x1 x' : X × Y),
              pr1 (isapropdirprod X Y H H0 x1 x') in
            X (associator_nat_leftwhisker ass)
              (associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
               × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass)
              (impred_isaprop
                 (λ t : C,
                  ∏ (y z z' : C) 
                  (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                  ass t y z
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T y z')
                      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y
                       z z' h) =
                  leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T t y) z z'
                    h · 
                  ass t y z')
                 (λ t : C,
                  impred_isaprop
                    (λ t0 : C,
                     ∏ (z z' : C) 
                     (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                     ass t t0 z
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t0 z)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t0 z')
                       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       t0 z z' h) =
                     leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t t0) z
                       z' h · 
                     ass t t0 z')
                    (λ t0 : C,
                     impred_isaprop
                       (λ 
                       t1 : C,
                       ∏ 
                       (z' : C) 
                       (h : C ⟦ t1, z' ⟧),
                       ass t t0 t1
                       · 
                       leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                       ... ... ... =
                       leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       ... t1 z' h · 
                       ass t t0 z')
                       (λ 
                       t1 : C,
                       impred_isaprop
                       (λ t2 : C, ∏ ..., ...)
                       (λ 
                       t2 : C, 
                       impred_isaprop ... ...)))))
              (isapropdirprod
                 (associator_nat_rightwhisker ass)
                 (associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass)
                 (impred_isaprop
                    (λ t : C,
                     ∏ (x' y z : C) 
                     (f : C ⟦ t, x' ⟧),
                     ass t y z
                     · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) t
                       x' f =
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t y)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T x' y)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       y t x' f) · 
                     ass x' y z)
                    (λ t : C,
                     impred_isaprop
                       (λ 
                       t0 : C,
                       ∏ 
                       (y z : C) 
                       (f : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧),
                       ass t y z
                       · 
                       rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (...) t t0 f =
                       rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       z (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...) · 
                       ass t0 y z)
                       (λ 
                       t0 : C,
                       impred_isaprop
                       (λ 
                       t1 : C,
                       ∏ (z : C) (f : ...), ... = ...)
                       (λ 
                       t1 : C,
                       impred_isaprop (...) (...)))))
                 (impred_isaprop
                    (λ t : C,
                     ∏ (y y' z : C) 
                     (g : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧),
                     ass t y z
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T y' z)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       z y y' g) =
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t y)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t y')
                       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       t y y' g) · 
                     ass t y' z)
                    (λ t : C,
                     impred_isaprop
                       (λ 
                       t0 : C,
                       ∏ 
                       (y' z : C) 
                       (g : C ⟦ t0, y' ⟧),
                       ass t t0 z
                       · 
                       leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...) =
                       rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       z (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...) · 
                       ass t y' z)
                       (λ 
                       t0 : C,
                       impred_isaprop
                       (λ 
                       t1 : C,
                       ∏ (z : C) (g : ...), ... = ...)
                       (λ 
                       t1 : C,
                       impred_isaprop (...) (...))))))
              (associators_equiv_subproof C T ass
                 (λ (x1 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
                  (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x1, x' ⟧),
                  internal_paths_rew_r
                    (C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (pr11 x1) 
                       (pr21 x1)) 
                       (pr2 x1),
                     bifunctor_on_objects T 
                       (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (pr21 x')

                    (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)
                     · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (pr21 x1)

                       (pr11 f)
                       ·

                       (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (pr21 x1)

                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (pr21 x')

                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T

                       (pr21 x1) 
                       (pr21 x') 
                       (pr21 f)
                       · 
                       leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr21 x') 
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...))))
                    (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)
                     · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (pr21 x1) 
                       (pr2 x1)) 
                       (pr11 x1) 
                       (pr11 x') 
                       (pr11 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (pr21 x1) 
                       (pr2 x1))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (pr21 x') 
                       (pr2 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x1) 
                       (pr21 x1) 
                       (pr21 x') 
                       (pr21 f)
                       · 
                       leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr21 x') 
                       (pr2 x1) 
                       (pr2 x') 
                       (pr2 f)))
                    (λ p : 
                       C
                       ⟦ 
                       bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (pr11 x1) 
                       (pr21 x1)) 
                       (pr2 x1),
                       bifunctor_on_objects T

                       (bifunctor_on_objects T

                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (pr11 x')

                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       ... ... ... ...
                       · 
                       leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       ... ... ... ...)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (pr11 x') 
                       (pr21 x')) 
                       (pr2 x1) 
                       (pr2 x') 
                       (pr2 f)
                     · ass 
                       (pr11 x') 
                       (pr21 x') 
                       (pr2 x') = p)
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (C
                       ⟦ 
                       bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (pr11 x1)

                       (pr21 x1)

                       (pr21 x1)

                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x1)

                       (pr11 x1)

                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr21 x1) 
                       (pr11 x1) 
                       (pr11 x') 
                       (pr11 f))
                       · 
                       ass 
                       (pr11 x') 
                       (pr21 x1) 
                       (pr2 x1))
                       (λ 
                       p : 
                       C
                       ⟦ 
                       bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                       (pr2 x1),
                       bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                       ⟧,
                       rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...)

                       · 
                       leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...)
                       ·

                       (pr11 x') 
                       (pr21 x') 
                       (pr2 x') =
                       p
                       · 
                       leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                       (... · ...))
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (C
                       ⟦ 
                       bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                       (pr2 x1),
                       bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                       ⟧)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...)
                       · 
                       leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...)
                       · 
                       ass 
                       (pr11 x') 
                       (pr21 x') 
                       (pr2 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x1)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...)
                       (... · ...)
                       · 
                       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       ... ... ... ...
                       · 
                       ass ... ... ...))
                       (λ 
                       p : 
                       C
                       ⟦ 
                       bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...,
                       bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...
                       ⟧,
                       p =
                       ... · ...
                       · 
                       leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       ... ... ... ...)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (C
                       ⟦ 
                       bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...,
                       bifunctor_on_objects T ... ...
                       ⟧)
                       (... · ...
                       · 
                       leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       ... ... ... ...)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       ... ... ... ... · 
                       (...)) 
                       (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                       (! (... @ ...))
                       (assoc' (...) (...) (...)))
                       (assoc'
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...))
                       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...))
                       (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (...))))
                       ((pr12 x0) 
                       (pr11 x1) 
                       (pr11 x') 
                       (pr21 x1) 
                       (pr2 x1) 
                       (pr11 f)))
                    (assoc
                       (ass 
                       (pr11 x1) 
                       (pr21 x1) 
                       (pr2 x1))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (pr21 x1)

                       (bifunctor_on_objects T

                       (pr2 x1)

                       · 
                       leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr21 x') 
                       (pr2 x1) 
                       (pr2 x') 
                       (pr2 f)))))) x0)
           (λ y : is_nat_trans
                    (assoc_left
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T))
                    (assoc_right
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T))
                    (weq_iso
                       (λ 
                       (ass0 : associator_data T)
                       (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                       ass0 
                       (pr11 xyz) 
                       (pr21 xyz) 
                       (pr2 xyz))
                       (λ 
                       (nt : 
                       nat_trans_data
                       (assoc_left
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T))
                       (assoc_right
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T))) 
                       (x0 y z : C), 
                       nt ((x0,, y),, z))
                       (λ 
                       x0 : associator_data T,
                       idpath x0)
                       (λ 
                       y : 
                       nat_trans_data
                       (assoc_left
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T))
                       (assoc_right
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T)), 
                       idpath y) ass),
            let X :=
              λ (P : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C → UU)
              (H : ∏ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C, isaprop (P t))
              (x0 x' : ∏ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C, P t),
              pr1 (impred_isaprop P H x0 x') in
            X
              (λ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
               ∏ (x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
               (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, x' ⟧),
               # (assoc_left
                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T)) f
               · weq_iso
                   (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)

                       T))) 
                    (x0 y0 z : C),

                   (λ y0 :

                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T))
                       (assoc_right
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T)), 
                    idpath y0) ass x' =
               weq_iso
                 (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                  (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                  ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
                 (λ (nt :

                       (assoc_right

                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T))
                       (assoc_right
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat

               · # (assoc_right
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T)) f)
              (λ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,

                 (λ t0 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,

                       (xyz : (...) ⊠ C),
                       ass0

                      (λ 
                       (nt :

                      (λ

                    (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)

                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat

                 (λ t0 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
                  impred_isaprop
                    (λ t1 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                     # (assoc_left (...)) t1
                     · weq_iso
                       (λ 
                       (ass0 : ...) 
                       (xyz : ...),

                       (λ 
                       (nt : ...)

                       (λ x0 : ..., idpath x0)
                       (λ y0 : ..., idpath y0) ass t0 =

                       (λ 
                       (ass0 : ...) 
                       (xyz : ...), 
                       ass0 ... ... ...)
                       (λ 
                       (nt : ...)

                       (assoc_left
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat

                       (assoc_right

                       ·

                       (λ ... ..., ...)

                       (weq_iso 
                       (λ ... ..., ...)
                       (λ ... ..., ...) 
                       (λ ..., ...)

                       · 
                       # (assoc_right ...) t1))))
              (λ (x0 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)

                 (C
                  ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T

                       (bifunctor_on_objects T

                    (λ p :

                       (bifunctor_on_objects T

                       (bifunctor_on_objects T

                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T

                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T

                     · ass 
                       (pr11 x') 
                       (pr21 x') 
                       (pr2 x') =
                     p
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (pr21 x0) 
                       (pr2 x0))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (pr21 x') 
                       (pr2 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (...) 
                       (pr21 x0) 
                       (pr21 x') 
                       (pr21 f)
                       · 
                       leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr21 x') 
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...)))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (C
                       ⟦ 
                       bifunctor_on_objects T

                       bifunctor_on_objects T

                       ... ... ... ...

                       ... ... ... ...)

                       ·

                       (pr2 x')))
                       (λ

                       ⟧,

                       (ass

                    ((pr12 
                      (associators_equiv_subproof C T
                       ass y)) 
                       (pr11 x0) 
                       (pr11 x') 
                       (pr21 x0) 
                       (pr2 x0) 
                       (pr11 f)))
                 (assoc
                    (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))

                       (pr21 x0)

                       ·

                       (pr21 x') 
                       (pr2 x0) 
                       (pr2 x') 
                       (pr2 f))))) y)) ass x)
     (weq_iso
        (λ (assinv : associatorinv_data T)
         (xyz : precategory_binproduct_data
                  (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C),
         assinv (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
        (λ (assinv : ∏
                     x0 : 
                      precategory_binproduct_data
                       (precategory_binproduct_data C
                       C) C,
                     C
                     ⟦ assoc_right
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T) x0,
                     assoc_left
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T) x0 ⟧) 
         (x0 y z : C), assinv ((x0,, y),, z))
        (λ x0 : associatorinv_data T, idpath x0)
        (λ y : ∏
               x0 : precategory_binproduct_data
                      (precategory_binproduct_data C C)
                      C,
               C
               ⟦ assoc_right
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T) x0,
               assoc_left
                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                 x0 ⟧, idpath y) assinv x))

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
assinv: associatorinv_data T
associator_iso_law (pr1 ass) assinv
→ ∏
  x : precategory_binproduct_data
        (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
  is_inverse_in_precat
    (weqtotal2
       (weq_iso
          (λ (ass : associator_data T)
           (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
           ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
          (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                     (assoc_left
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T))
                     (assoc_right
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T))) (x0 y z : C),
           nt ((x0,, y),, z))
          (λ x0 : associator_data T, idpath x0)
          (λ y : nat_trans_data
                   (assoc_left
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T))
                   (assoc_right
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T)), idpath y))
       (λ ass : associator_data T,
        weq_iso
          (λ (assnat : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
                       × associator_nat_rightwhisker
                           ass
                         × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                             ass)

           (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),

             (C
              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                     (pr21 x0)) (pr2 x0),
              bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')

             (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
              · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                      (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                   (pr11 f)
                 · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr11 x')
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                        (pr2 x0))
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                        (pr2 x'))

                        (pr21 f)

              · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T

                  (pr11 f)

                     (pr2 x0))
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')

                     (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                     (pr21 f)

                       (pr2 f)))
             (λ p : C
                    ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                        (pr2 x0),
                    bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧,
              rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x0)
                (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                   (pr21 x0))
                (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                   (pr21 x'))
                (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')

                 · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T

              · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (pr21 x')) (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                  (pr2 f)
              · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') = p)
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (C
                 ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                        (pr21 x0)) (pr2 x0),
                 bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                      (pr2 x0)) ⟧)

                        (pr2 x0))

                        (pr2 x0),
                    bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')

                   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr2 x0)

                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))

                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T

                        (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                    · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))

                      (pr2 x0)
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T

                         (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                         (pr11 f)

                           (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                    · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                         (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                       · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                           (pr2 x')))
                   (λ p : C
                          ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                              (pr2 x0),
                          bifunctor_on_objects T

                            (bifunctor_on_objects T

                    p =
                    rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr2 x0)
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                         (pr11 f))
                    · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr11 x')
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                        (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms

                           (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                         · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms

                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (C
                       ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T

                           (pr2 x0),
                       bifunctor_on_objects T

                         (bifunctor_on_objects T

                         (pr2 x0)

                         (bifunctor_on_objects T

                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms

                            (pr11 x') (pr11 f))

                           (pr2 x0)

                              (bifunctor_on_objects T

                              (bifunctor_on_objects T

                                    T (pr11 x') (...)
                                    (...) (...))
                               (λ p : C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,

                               (internal_paths_rew_r

                                  (internal_paths_rew_r

                                  (assoc ... ... ...))
                               (bifunctor_leftcomp T
                                  (pr11 x')

                            (bifunctor_on_objects T

                            (internal_paths_rew_r
