                                        T ... ...)
                                     (pr2 x),
                                 bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T (pr11 x')
                                   (bifunctor_on_objects
                                      T ... ...) ⟧,
                           p =
                           rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr2 x)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...) (... · ...)
                           · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...
                              · ass ... ... ...))
                          (internal_paths_rew_r
                             (C
                              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T ... ...)
                                  (pr2 x),
                              bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x')
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T ... ...) ⟧)
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (...) (...) (...)
                                (...)
                              · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T (...) (...) (...)
                                  (...)
                              · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                   T ... ... ... ...
                                 · ass ... ... ...))
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...
                              · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...
                              · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T (...) (...) (...)
                                  (...)
                              · ass (pr11 x')
                                  (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))

                                        T ... ...,

                                T ... ... ... ...

                             (internal_paths_rew_r

                                     T ... ...,

                                   T ... ... ⟧)
                                (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                   T ... ... ... ...
                                 · (...))
                                (... · ...
                                 · ass ... ... ...)
                                (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                                (cancel_postcomposition
                                   (...) (...) (...)
                                   (! ...))
                                (assoc (...) (...)
                                   (...)))
                             (assoc
                                (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                   T ... ... ... ...
                                 · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                     T ... ... ... ...)
                                (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                   T (...) (...) (...)
                                   (...))
                                (ass (pr11 x')
                                   (pr21 x') (...))))
                          (assoc
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (pr2 x)
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T (pr11 x')
                                   (pr21 x))
                                (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                   T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
                                   (pr11 x') (pr11 f)))
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (pr2 x)
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T (pr11 x')
                                   (pr21 x))
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T (pr11 x')
                                   (pr21 x'))
                                (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                   T (pr11 x')
                                   (pr21 x) (pr21 x')
                                   (pr21 f)))
                             (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T ... ...) (pr2 x)
                                (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                              · ass (pr11 x')
                                  (pr21 x') (pr2 x')))))
                    (assoc'
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f)))
                       (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
                       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T

                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr2 x) (pr21 x)
                             (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr21 x') (pr2 x)
                               (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))))
                 (assoc'
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T

                          (pr11 f)

                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f)))

                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x')) (pr2 x)
                       (pr2 x') (pr2 f))
                    (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))))
              ((pr12 assnat) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                 (pr21 x) (pr2 x) (pr11 f)))
           (assoc (ass (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
              (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                    (pr2 x)) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                 (pr11 f))
              (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                    (pr2 x))

                    (pr2 x'))

                    (pr21 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr21 x') (pr2 x) (pr2 x')
                      (pr2 f)))))
        (associators_equiv_subproof C T ass)
        (λ x : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
               × associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
                 × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass,
         let X :=
           λ (X Y : UU) (H : isaprop X)
           (H0 : isaprop Y) (x0 x' : X × Y),
           pr1 (isapropdirprod X Y H H0 x0 x') in
         X (associator_nat_leftwhisker ass)
           (associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
            × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass)
           (impred_isaprop
              (λ t : C,
               ∏ (y z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
               ass t y z
               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T y z')
                   (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z
                      z' h) =
               leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T t y) z z' h
               · ass t y z')
              (λ t : C,
               impred_isaprop
                 (λ t0 : C,
                  ∏ (z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                  ass t t0 z
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T t0 z)
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T t0 z')
                      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         t0 z z' h) =
                  leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T t t0) z z'
                    h · ass t t0 z')
                 (λ t0 : C,
                  impred_isaprop
                    (λ t1 : C,
                     ∏ (z' : C) (h : C ⟦ t1, z' ⟧),
                     ass t t0 t1
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T t0 t1)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T t0 z')
                         (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T t0 t1 z' h) =
                     leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t t0)
                       t1 z' h · ass t t0 z')
                    (λ t1 : C,
                     impred_isaprop
                       (λ t2 : C,
                        ∏ h : C ⟦ t1, t2 ⟧,
                        ass t t0 t1
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T t ... ... ... =
                        leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          ... t1 t2 h · ass t t0 t2)
                       (λ t2 : C,
                        impred_isaprop
                          (λ t3 : ..., ... = ...)
                          (λ t3 : ...,
                           C ... ... ... ...))))))
           (isapropdirprod
              (associator_nat_rightwhisker ass)
              (associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass)
              (impred_isaprop
                 (λ t : C,
                  ∏ (x' y z : C) (f : C ⟦ t, x' ⟧),
                  ass t y z
                  · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T y z) t
                      x' f =
                  rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T t y)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T x' y)
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y
                       t x' f) · ass x' y z)
                 (λ t : C,
                  impred_isaprop
                    (λ t0 : C,
                     ∏ (y z : C) (f : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧),
                     ass t y z
                     · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
                         t t0 f =
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t y)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t0 y)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          y t t0 f) · ass t0 y z)
                    (λ t0 : C,
                     impred_isaprop
                       (λ t1 : C,
                        ∏ (z : C) (f : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧),
                        ass t t1 z
                        · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (...) t t0 f =
                        rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          z (...) (...) (...)
                        · ass t0 t1 z)
                       (λ t1 : C,
                        impred_isaprop
                          (λ t2 : C,
                           ∏ f : ..., ... = ...)
                          (λ t2 : C,
                           impred_isaprop (...) (...))))))
              (impred_isaprop
                 (λ t : C,
                  ∏ (y y' z : C) (g : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧),
                  ass t y z
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T y' z)
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         z y y' g) =
                  rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T t y)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T t y')
                    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t y
                       y' g) · ass t y' z)
                 (λ t : C,
                  impred_isaprop
                    (λ t0 : C,
                     ∏ (y' z : C) (g : C ⟦ t0, y' ⟧),
                     ass t t0 z
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T t0 z)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T y' z)
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T z t0 y' g) =
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t t0)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t y')
                       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          t t0 y' g) · ass t y' z)
                    (λ t0 : C,
                     impred_isaprop
                       (λ t1 : C,
                        ∏ (z : C) (g : C ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧),
                        ass t t0 z
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T t (...) (...) (...) =
                        rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          z (...) (...) (...)
                        · ass t t1 z)
                       (λ t1 : C,
                        impred_isaprop
                          (λ t2 : C,
                           ∏ g : ..., ... = ...)
                          (λ t2 : C,
                           impred_isaprop (...) (...)))))))
           (associators_equiv_subproof C T ass
              (λ (x0 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
               (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (C
                  ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0)) (pr2 x0),
                  bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                       (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                 (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                  · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                       (pr11 x0) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr21 x') (pr2 x0)
                              (pr2 x') (pr2 f))))
                 (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                  · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0)
                      (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                           (pr2 f)))
                 (λ p : C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                            (pr2 x0),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧,
                  rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr2 x0)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                       (pr21 x0))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (pr21 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                       (pr11 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f))
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x')) (pr2 x0)
                      (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                  · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
                  p)
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                         (pr2 x0),
                     bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)) ⟧)
                    (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                     · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                         (pr11 x0) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x0)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                          (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                         (pr2 x0))
                    (λ p : C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                               (pr2 x0),
                           bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x')
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)) ⟧,
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x0)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                          (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                         (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                         (pr2 x') =
                     p
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr21 x') (pr2 x0)
                              (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                            (pr2 x0),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                               (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                            (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                            (pr2 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                               (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                        · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                             (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                           · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                               (pr2 x')))
                       (λ p : C
                              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T (pr11 x0)
                                     (pr21 x0))
                                  (pr2 x0),
                              bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x')
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T (pr21 x') (...))
                              ⟧,
                        p =
                        rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...)
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T ... ... ... ...)
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                            (pr2 x0)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x')
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x0) (...))
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x') (...))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T ... ... ... ...
                             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T ... ... ... ...))
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          (C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                               (pr2 x0),
                           bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x')
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr21 x') (...)) ⟧)
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr2 x0)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...)
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...)
                           · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                               (pr2 x0)
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr11 x')
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr21 x0) (...))
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr21 x') (...))
                               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...
                                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                    T ... ... ... ...))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr2 x0)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                                (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                           · (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                                (...)
                              · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T (pr11 x') (...)
                                  (...) (...)))
                          (λ p : C
                                 ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T (...) (...),
                                 bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T (pr11 x') (...) ⟧,
                           rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (...) (...) (...) (...)
                           · (... · ...) = p)
                          (! (maponpaths (compose ...)
                                (internal_paths_rew_r
                                   ... ... ... ... ...
                                   ...) @
                              cancel_precomposition C
                                (...) (...) (...)
                                (...) (...) (...)
                                (...) @
                              internal_paths_rew_r
                                (...) (...) (...)
                                (...) (...) (...)))
                          (assoc'
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (pr2 x0)
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T ... ...)
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T ... ...)
                                (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                   T ... ... ... ...))
                             (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                                (pr2 x0))
                             (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (pr11 x')
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T ... ...)
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T ... ...)
                                (... · ...))))
                       (assoc'
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr2 x0)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                                (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                              · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T (pr11 x')
                                  (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                                  (pr21 f)))
                          (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                             (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f))
                          (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                             (pr2 x'))))
                    ((pr12 x) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                       (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0) (pr11 f)))
                 (assoc
                    (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                       (pr11 x0) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                          (pr21 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr21 x') (pr2 x0)
                            (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))))) x)
        (λ y : is_nat_trans
                 (assoc_left
                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T))
                 (assoc_right
                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T))
                 (weq_iso
                    (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                     (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                     ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                       (pr2 xyz))
                    (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                               (assoc_left
                                  (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                     T))
                               (assoc_right
                                  (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                     T))) (x y z : C),
                     nt ((x,, y),, z))
                    (λ x : associator_data T, idpath x)
                    (λ y : nat_trans_data
                             (assoc_left
                                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                   T))
                             (assoc_right
                                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                   T)), idpath y) ass),
         let X :=
           λ (P : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C → UU)
           (H : ∏ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C, isaprop (P t))
           (x x' : ∏ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C, P t),
           pr1 (impred_isaprop P H x x') in
         X
           (λ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
            ∏ (x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
            (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, x' ⟧),
            # (assoc_left
                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T))
              f
            · weq_iso
                (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                 (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                 ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
                (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                           (assoc_left
                              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                 T))
                           (assoc_right
                              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                 T))) (x y0 z : C),
                 nt ((x,, y0),, z))
                (λ x : associator_data T, idpath x)
                (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                          (assoc_left
                             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                T))
                          (assoc_right
                             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                T)), idpath y0) ass x' =
            weq_iso
              (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
               (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
               ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
              (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                         (assoc_left
                            (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                               T))
                         (assoc_right
                            (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                               T))) (x y0 z : C),
               nt ((x,, y0),, z))
              (λ x : associator_data T, idpath x)
              (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                        (assoc_left
                           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                              T))
                        (assoc_right
                           (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                              T)), idpath y0) ass t
            · # (assoc_right
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T)) f)
           (λ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
            impred_isaprop
              (λ t0 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
               ∏ f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
               # (assoc_left
                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T)) f
               · weq_iso
                   (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                    (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                    ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                      (pr2 xyz))
                   (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                              (assoc_left
                                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                    T))
                              (assoc_right
                                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                    T))) (x y0 z : C),
                    nt ((x,, y0),, z))
                   (λ x : associator_data T, idpath x)
                   (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                             (assoc_left
                                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                   T))
                             (assoc_right
                                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                   T)), idpath y0) ass
                   t0 =
               weq_iso
                 (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                  (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                  ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
                 (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                            (assoc_left
                               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                  T))
                            (assoc_right
                               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                  T))) (x y0 z : C),
                  nt ((x,, y0),, z))
                 (λ x : associator_data T, idpath x)
                 (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                           (assoc_left
                              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                 T))
                           (assoc_right
                              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                 T)), idpath y0) ass t
               · # (assoc_right
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T)) f)
              (λ t0 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
               impred_isaprop
                 (λ t1 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                  # (assoc_left
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T)) t1
                  · weq_iso
                      (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                       (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                       ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                         (pr2 xyz))
                      (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                                 (assoc_left ...)
                                 (assoc_right ...))
                       (x y0 z : C), nt ((...),, z))
                      (λ x : associator_data T,
                       idpath x)
                      (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                                (assoc_left ...)
                                (assoc_right ...),
                       idpath y0) ass t0 =
                  weq_iso
                    (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                     (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                     ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                       (pr2 xyz))
                    (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                               (assoc_left ...)
                               (assoc_right ...))
                     (x y0 z : C), nt ((...),, z))
                    (λ x : associator_data T, idpath x)
                    (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                              (assoc_left ...)
                              (assoc_right ...),
                     idpath y0) ass t
                  · # (assoc_right
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T)) t1)
                 (λ t1 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                  C
                    (assoc_left
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T) t)
                    (assoc_right
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T) t0)
                    (# (assoc_left
                          (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                             T)) t1
                     · weq_iso
                         (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                          (xyz : (...) ⊠ C),
                          ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                            (pr2 xyz))
                         (λ (nt : nat_trans_data (...)
                                    (...))
                          (x y0 z : C), nt (...,, z))
                         (λ x : associator_data T,
                          idpath x)
                         (λ y0 : nat_trans_data (...)
                                   (...), idpath y0)
                         ass t0)
                    (weq_iso
                       (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                        (xyz : (...) ⊠ C),
                        ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                          (pr2 xyz))
                       (λ (nt : nat_trans_data (...)
                                  (...)) (x y0 z : C),
                        nt (...,, z))
                       (λ x : associator_data T,
                        idpath x)
                       (λ y0 : nat_trans_data (...)
                                 (...), idpath y0) ass
                       t
                     · # (assoc_right
                            (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                               T)) t1))))
           (λ (x x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
            (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (C
               ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                      (pr21 x)) (pr2 x),
               bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                    (pr2 x')) ⟧)
              (ass (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
               · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                       (pr2 x)) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                    (pr11 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                         (pr2 x))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x) (pr21 x) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x) (pr2 x')
                           (pr2 f))))
              (ass (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
               · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                      (pr2 x)) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                   (pr11 f)
               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (pr11 x')
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                      (pr2 x))
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                      (pr2 x'))
                   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr2 x) (pr21 x) (pr21 x')
                      (pr21 f)
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr21 x') (pr2 x) (pr2 x')
                        (pr2 f)))
              (λ p : C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x) (pr21 x)) (pr2 x),
                     bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧,
               rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x)
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                    (pr21 x))
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                    (pr21 x'))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                    (pr11 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr21 x')
                      (pr21 f))
               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                      (pr21 x')) (pr2 x) (pr2 x')
                   (pr2 f)
               · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') = p)
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (C
                  ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                         (pr21 x)) (pr2 x),
                  bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                       (pr2 x)) ⟧)
                 (ass (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
                  · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                         (pr2 x)) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                      (pr11 f))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr2 x)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                       (pr21 x))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (pr21 x))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                       (pr11 f))
                  · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
                 (λ p : C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                            (pr2 x),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x) (pr2 x)) ⟧,
                  rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr2 x)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x)
                       (pr21 x))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (pr21 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                       (pr11 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f))
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x')) (pr2 x)
                      (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                  · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
                  p
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                         (pr2 x))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x) (pr21 x) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x) (pr2 x')
                           (pr2 f)))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x) (pr21 x)) (pr2 x),
                     bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                          (pr11 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                         (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                         (pr2 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                          (pr11 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                     · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                            (pr2 x')))
                    (λ p : C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                               (pr2 x),
                           bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x')
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧,
                     p =
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                          (pr11 f))
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr2 x) (pr21 x)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr21 x') (pr2 x)
                              (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                            (pr2 x),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
                            (pr2 x)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x')
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr2 x) (pr21 x)
                               (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T (pr21 x') (pr2 x)
                                 (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                        · (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
                             (pr2 x)
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr11 x')
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr21 x) (...))
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr21 x') (...))
                               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...
                                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                    T ... ... ... ...)))
                       (λ p : C
                              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T (pr11 x)
                                     (pr21 x)) (pr2 x),
                              bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x')
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T (pr21 x') (...))
                              ⟧,
                        rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T ... ... ... ...
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T ... ... ... ...)
                        · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (...) (...) (...) (...)
                           · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                               (...)) = p)
                       (! (maponpaths
                             (compose
                                (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                   T ... ... ... ...))
                             (internal_paths_rew_r
                                (C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧)
                                (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                   T ... ... ... ...)
                                (... · ...)
                                (λ ..., ...)
                                (internal_paths_rew_r
                                   ... ... ... ... ...
                                   ...)
                                (bifunctor_leftcomp T
                                   ... ... ... ... ...
                                   ...)) @
                           cancel_precomposition C
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (...) (...))
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (...) (...))
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x') (...))
                             (... · ...
                              · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...)
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...
                              · (...))
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (...) (...) (...)
                                (...))
                             (internal_paths_rew_r
                                (...) (...) (...)
                                (...) (...) (...)) @
                           internal_paths_rew_r
                             (C
                              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...,
                              bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ... ⟧)
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...
                              · (...))
                             (... · ... · (...))
                             (λ p : ..., p = ...)
                             (internal_paths_rew_r
                                (...) (...) (...)
                                (...) (...) (...))
                             (assoc (...) (...) (...))))
                       (assoc'
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr2 x)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x') (pr21 x))
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
                                (pr11 x') (pr11 f)))
                          (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
                             (pr2 x))
                          (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr11 x')
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (...) (pr21 x)
                                (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                              · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T (pr21 x') (...)
                                  (...) (...)))))
                    (assoc'
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x) (pr21 x))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x) (pr11 x)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr11 x') (pr21 x)
                               (pr21 x') (pr21 f)))
                       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (pr2 x) (pr2 x') (pr2 f))
                       (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                          (pr2 x'))))
                 ((pr12 (associators_equiv_subproof C
                           T ass y)) (pr11 x)
                    (pr11 x') (pr21 x) (pr2 x)
                    (pr11 f)))
              (assoc (ass (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                       (pr2 x)) (pr11 x) (pr11 x')
                    (pr11 f))
                 (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x)
                       (pr2 x))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                       (pr2 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x) (pr21 x) (pr21 x')
                       (pr21 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x) (pr2 x')
                         (pr2 f))))) y)) ass xyz)
  (weq_iso
     (λ (assinv : associatorinv_data T)
      (xyz : precategory_binproduct_data
               (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C),
      assinv (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
     (λ (assinv : ∏
                  x : precategory_binproduct_data
                        (precategory_binproduct_data C
                           C) C,
                  C
                  ⟦ assoc_right
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T) x,
                  assoc_left
                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T) x ⟧) (x y z : C),
      assinv ((x,, y),, z))
     (λ x : associatorinv_data T, idpath x)
     (λ y : ∏
            x : precategory_binproduct_data
                  (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
            C
            ⟦ assoc_right
                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                x,
            assoc_left
              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T) x
            ⟧, idpath y) assinv xyz)

      apply isolaw.
    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
assinv: associatorinv_data T
(∏
 x : precategory_binproduct_data
       (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (weqtotal2
      (weq_iso
         (λ (ass : associator_data T)
          (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
          ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
         (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                    (assoc_left
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T))
                    (assoc_right
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T))) (x0 y z : C),
          nt ((x0,, y),, z))
         (λ x0 : associator_data T, idpath x0)
         (λ y : nat_trans_data
                  (assoc_left
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T))
                  (assoc_right
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T)), idpath y))
      (λ ass : associator_data T,
       weq_iso
         (λ (assnat : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
                      × associator_nat_rightwhisker
                          ass
                        × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                            ass) (x0 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
          (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (C
             ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                    (pr21 x0)) (pr2 x0),
             bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                  (pr2 x')) ⟧)
            (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
             · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                     (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                  (pr11 f)
                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                       (pr2 x0))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                       (pr2 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                       (pr21 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                         (pr2 f))))
            (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
             · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                    (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                 (pr11 f)
             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr11 x')
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                    (pr2 x0))
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                    (pr2 x'))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                    (pr21 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                      (pr2 f)))
            (λ p : C
                   ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                       (pr2 x0),
                   bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                        (pr2 x')) ⟧,
             rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T (pr2 x0)
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                  (pr21 x0))
               (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                  (pr21 x'))
               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                  (pr11 f)
                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                    (pr21 f))
             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                    (pr21 x')) (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                 (pr2 f)
             · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') = p)
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (C
                ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                       (pr21 x0)) (pr2 x0),
                bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                     (pr2 x0)) ⟧)
               (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                       (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                    (pr11 f))
               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (pr2 x0)
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                     (pr21 x0))
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (pr21 x0))
                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                     (pr11 f))
                · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
               (λ p : C
                      ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                          (pr2 x0),
                      bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)) ⟧,
                rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (pr2 x0)
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                     (pr21 x0))
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (pr21 x'))
                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                     (pr11 f)
                   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                       (pr21 f))
                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (pr21 x')) (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                    (pr2 f)
                · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
                p
                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                       (pr2 x0))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                       (pr2 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                       (pr21 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                         (pr2 f)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C
                   ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                       (pr2 x0),
                   bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                        (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr2 x0)
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                        (pr21 x0))
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                        (pr21 x'))
                     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                        (pr11 f)
                      · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                          (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                       (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                   · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr2 x0)
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                        (pr21 x0))
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                        (pr21 x'))
                     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                        (pr11 f)
                      · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                          (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                   · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                        (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                      · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                          (pr2 x')))
                  (λ p : C
                         ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                             (pr2 x0),
                         bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr11 x')
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧,

                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                        (pr21 x0))

                        (pr21 x0))

                        (pr11 f))

                       (bifunctor_on_objects T

                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T

                          (pr21 f)

                            (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r

                          (pr2 x0),

                        (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms

                           (pr11 x') (pr11 f))

                          (pr2 x0)

                          (bifunctor_on_objects T

                               (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))

                        (pr2 x0)
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T

                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                        (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                           T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                           (pr11 x') (pr11 f))

                           (pr2 x0)

                             (bifunctor_on_objects T

                             (bifunctor_on_objects T

                                T (...) (pr21 x0)
                                (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                              · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T (pr21 x') (...)
                                  (...) (...))))

                            ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T (pr11 x0)
                                   (pr21 x0)) (pr2 x0),

                              (bifunctor_on_objects T

                        (bifunctor_on_objects T

                        (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                           T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                           (pr11 x') (pr11 f)

                             T (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                             (pr21 x') (pr21 f))

                           (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                              ...) (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                           (pr2 f)
                         · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                             (pr2 x')) = p)
                     (! (maponpaths

                                 (...)))

                               ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T ... ...,

                              (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T (pr11 x') (...)
                                 (...) (...))

                                 T ... ... ... ...
                               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                   T ... ... ... ...)
                              (λ p : ..., ... = ...)
                              (internal_paths_rew_r
                                 (...) (...) (...)
                                 (...) (...) (...))
                              (bifunctor_leftcomp T
                                 (pr11 x') (...) (...)
                                 (...) (...) (...))) @
                         cancel_precomposition C
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 ... ...) (pr2 x0))
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 ... ...) (pr2 x0))
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr11 x')
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 ... ...))

                                T (pr11 x') (...)

                              T (pr2 x0)
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T

                                 ... ...)

                                 T ... ... ... ...))
                           (internal_paths_rew_r
                              (C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧)
                              (... · ...) (... · ...)
                              (λ ..., ...)
                              (cancel_precomposition C
                                 ... ... ... ... ...
                                 ... ...)
                              (assoc' ... ... ...)) @
                         internal_paths_rew_r
                           (C
                            ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (...) (...),
                            bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr11 x') (...) ⟧)
                           (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (...) (...) (...)
                              (...) · (... · ...))
                           (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T ... ... ... ...
                            · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...
                            · (... · ...))
                           (λ p : C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                            p = ... · ...)
                           (internal_paths_rew_r
                              (C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧)
                              (... · ...) (... · ...)
                              (λ ..., ...)
                              (internal_paths_rew_r
                                 ... ... ... ... ...
                                 ...)
                              (assoc ... ... ...))
                           (assoc
                              (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T ... ... ... ...)
                              (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T ... ... ... ...)
                              (... · ...))))
                     (assoc'
                        (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                           T (pr2 x0)
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                           (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                              (pr11 x') (pr11 f)))
                        (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                           (pr2 x0))
                        (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr11 x')
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T

                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                           (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms

                              (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                            · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms

                  (assoc'

                        (pr2 x0)
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T

                        (bifunctor_on_objects T

                           (pr11 x') (pr11 f)

                             (pr21 x') (pr21 f)))

                           (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                        (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f))

               ((pr12 assnat) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')

                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                     (pr2 x'))

                     (pr21 f)

                       (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                       (pr2 f)))))
         (associators_equiv_subproof C T ass)
         (λ x0 : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
                 × associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
                   × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                       ass,
          let X :=
            λ (X Y : UU) (H : isaprop X)
            (H0 : isaprop Y) (x1 x' : X × Y),
            pr1 (isapropdirprod X Y H H0 x1 x') in
          X (associator_nat_leftwhisker ass)
            (associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
             × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass)
            (impred_isaprop
               (λ t : C,
                ∏ (y z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                ass t y z
                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T y z')
                    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y z
                       z' h) =
                leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T t y) z z' h
                · ass t y z')
               (λ t : C,
                impred_isaprop
                  (λ t0 : C,
                   ∏ (z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                   ass t t0 z
                   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t0 z)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t0 z')
                       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T

                     (bifunctor_on_objects T t t0) z
                     z' h · ass t t0 z')
                  (λ t0 : C,
                   impred_isaprop

                      ∏ (z' : C) (h : C ⟦ t1, z' ⟧),
                      ass t t0 t1
                      · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T

                      leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        ... t1 z' h · ass t t0 z')
                     (λ t1 : C,
                      impred_isaprop
                        (λ t2 : C, ∏ ..., ...)
                        (λ t2 : C,
                         impred_isaprop ... ...)))))
            (isapropdirprod
               (associator_nat_rightwhisker ass)
               (associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass)

               (impred_isaprop
                  (λ t : C,

                         ... · ...

                             T ... ... ... ...)
                        (internal_paths_rew_r

                           (... · ...

                            · (...))
                           (λ p : ..., ... = p)

                  (assoc_right

                  (weq_iso
