                     (λ x0 : associator_data T,
                      idpath x0)
                     (λ y : nat_trans_data
                              (assoc_left
                                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                    T))
                              (assoc_right
                                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                    T)), idpath y) ass),
          let X :=
            λ (P : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C → UU)
            (H : ∏ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C, isaprop (P t))
            (x0 x' : ∏ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C, P t),
            pr1 (impred_isaprop P H x0 x') in
          X
            (λ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
             ∏ (x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
             (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, x' ⟧),
             # (assoc_left
                  (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                     T)) f
             · weq_iso
                 (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                  (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                  ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
                 (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                            (assoc_left
                               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                  T))
                            (assoc_right
                               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                  T))) (x0 y0 z : C),
                  nt ((x0,, y0),, z))
                 (λ x0 : associator_data T, idpath x0)
                 (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                           (assoc_left
                              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                 T))
                           (assoc_right
                              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                 T)), idpath y0) ass
                 x' =
             weq_iso
               (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
               (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                          (assoc_left
                             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                T))
                          (assoc_right
                             (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                T))) (x0 y0 z : C),
                nt ((x0,, y0),, z))
               (λ x0 : associator_data T, idpath x0)
               (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                         (assoc_left
                            (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                               T))
                         (assoc_right
                            (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                               T)), idpath y0) ass t
             · # (assoc_right
                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T)) f)
            (λ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
             impred_isaprop
               (λ t0 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
                ∏ f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                # (assoc_left
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T)) f
                · weq_iso
                    (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                     (xyz : (...) ⊠ C),
                     ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                       (pr2 xyz))
                    (λ (nt : nat_trans_data (...)
                               (...)) (x0 y0 z : C),
                     nt (...,, z))
                    (λ x0 : associator_data T,
                     idpath x0)
                    (λ y0 : nat_trans_data (...) (...),
                     idpath y0) ass t0 =
                weq_iso
                  (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                   (xyz : (...) ⊠ C),
                   ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                     (pr2 xyz))
                  (λ (nt : nat_trans_data (...) (...))
                   (x0 y0 z : C), nt (...,, z))
                  (λ x0 : associator_data T, idpath x0)
                  (λ y0 : nat_trans_data (...) (...),
                   idpath y0) ass t
                · # (assoc_right
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T)) f)
               (λ t0 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
                impred_isaprop
                  (λ t1 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                   # (assoc_left (...)) t1
                   · weq_iso
                       (λ (ass0 : ...) (xyz : ...),
                        ass0 ... ... ...)
                       (λ (nt : ...) (x0 y0 z : C),
                        nt ...)
                       (λ x0 : ..., idpath x0)
                       (λ y0 : ..., idpath y0) ass t0 =
                   weq_iso
                     (λ (ass0 : ...) (xyz : ...),
                      ass0 ... ... ...)
                     (λ (nt : ...) (x0 y0 z : C),
                      nt ...) (λ x0 : ..., idpath x0)
                     (λ y0 : ..., idpath y0) ass t
                   · # (assoc_right (...)) t1)
                  (λ t1 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                   C
                     (assoc_left
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T) t)
                     (assoc_right
                        (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                           T) t0)
                     (# (assoc_left ...) t1
                      · weq_iso (λ ... ..., ...)
                          (λ ... ..., ...)
                          (λ ..., ...) (λ ..., ...)
                          ass t0)
                     (weq_iso (λ ... ..., ...)
                        (λ ... ..., ...) (λ ..., ...)
                        (λ ..., ...) ass t
                      · # (assoc_right ...) t1))))
            (λ (x0 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
             (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
             internal_paths_rew_r
               (C
                ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                       (pr21 x0)) (pr2 x0),
                bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                     (pr2 x')) ⟧)
               (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                        (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                     (pr11 f)
                   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                          (pr21 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr21 x') (pr2 x0)
                            (pr2 x') (pr2 f))))
               (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                       (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                    (pr11 f)
                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                       (pr2 x0))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                       (pr2 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                       (pr21 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                         (pr2 f)))
               (λ p : C
                      ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                          (pr2 x0),
                      bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧,
                rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                  (pr2 x0)
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                     (pr21 x0))
                  (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (pr21 x'))
                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                     (pr11 f)
                   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                       (pr21 f))
                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (pr21 x')) (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                    (pr2 f)
                · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') = p)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (C
                   ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                       (pr2 x0),
                   bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                        (pr2 x0)) ⟧)
                  (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                   · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                       (pr11 x0) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr2 x0)
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                        (pr21 x0))
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                        (pr21 x0))
                     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                        (pr11 f))
                   · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                  (λ p : C
                         ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                             (pr2 x0),
                         bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr11 x')
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)) ⟧,
                   rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr2 x0)
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                        (pr21 x0))
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                        (pr21 x'))
                     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        ... ... ... ...
                      · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          ... ... ... ...)
                   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                       (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                   · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
                   p
                   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (...) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                          (pr21 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr21 x') (...) (...)
                            (...)))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (C
                      ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                          (pr2 x0),
                      bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr2 x0)
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                        (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                           T ... ... ... ...
                         · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T ... ... ... ...)
                      · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                      · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                          (pr2 x'))
                     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr2 x0)
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                        (bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                        (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                           T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                           (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                         · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                             (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                      · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                              ...) (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                           (pr2 f)
                         · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                             (pr2 x')))
                     (λ p : C
                            ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T ... ...) (pr2 x0),
                            bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr11 x')
                              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 ... ...) ⟧,
                      p =
                      rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (...) (...) (...) (...)
                      · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (...)
                      · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                             ...) (... · ...))
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                        (C
                         ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...) (pr2 x0),
                         bifunctor_on_objects T
                           (pr11 x')
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                              ...) ⟧)
                        (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                           T (...) (...) (...) (...)
                         · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                             (...)
                         · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr11 x')
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...) (... · ...))
                        (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                           T (pr2 x0)
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                              ...)
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T ...
                              ...)
                           (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T ... ... ... ...)
                         · (ass ... ... ...
                            · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...))
                        (λ p : C
                               ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T ... ...,
                               bifunctor_on_objects T
                                 ... ... ⟧,
                         rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                           T ... ... ... ... · (...) =
                         p)
                        (! (maponpaths (...) (...) @
                            cancel_precomposition C
                              ... ... ... ... ... ...
                              ... @
                            internal_paths_rew_r ...
                              ... ... ... ... ...))
                        (assoc'
                           (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (...) (...) (...)
                              (...))
                           (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                              (...))
                           (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr11 x') (...) (...)
                              (...))))
                     (assoc'
                        (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                           T (pr2 x0)
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                           (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T ... ... ... ...
                            · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...))
                        (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (bifunctor_on_objects T
                              (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                           (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f))
                        (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                           (pr2 x'))))
                  ((pr12 (associators_equiv_subproof C
                            T ass y)) (pr11 x0)
                     (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                     (pr11 f)))
               (assoc
                  (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                        (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                     (pr11 f))
                  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                     (pr11 x')
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                        (pr2 x0))
                     (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                        (pr2 x'))
                     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                        (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                        (pr21 f)
                      · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                          (pr2 f))))) y)) ass x)
   (weq_iso
      (λ (assinv : associatorinv_data T)
       (xyz : precategory_binproduct_data
                (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C),
       assinv (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
      (λ (assinv : ∏
                   x0 : precategory_binproduct_data
                          (precategory_binproduct_data
                             C C) C,
                   C
                   ⟦ assoc_right
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T) x0,
                   assoc_left
                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                        T) x0 ⟧) (x0 y z : C),
       assinv ((x0,, y),, z))
      (λ x0 : associatorinv_data T, idpath x0)
      (λ y : ∏
             x0 : precategory_binproduct_data
                    (precategory_binproduct_data C C)
                    C,
             C
             ⟦ assoc_right
                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                 x0,
             assoc_left
               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
               x0 ⟧, idpath y) assinv x))
→ associator_iso_law (pr1 ass) assinv
 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
assinv: associatorinv_data T
isolaw: ∏
x : precategory_binproduct_data
      (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
is_inverse_in_precat
  (weqtotal2
     (weq_iso
        (λ (ass : associator_data T)
         (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
         ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
        (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                   (assoc_left
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T))
                   (assoc_right
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T))) 
         (x0 y z : C), nt ((x0,, y),, z))
        (λ x0 : associator_data T, idpath x0)
        (λ y : nat_trans_data
                 (assoc_left
                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T))
                 (assoc_right
                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T)), 
         idpath y))
     (λ ass : associator_data T,
      weq_iso
        (λ (assnat : associator_nat_leftwhisker
                       ass
                     × associator_nat_rightwhisker
                       ass
                       × 
                       associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                       ass)
         (x0 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
         (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (C
            ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                (bifunctor_on_objects T
                   (pr11 x0) 
                   (pr21 x0)) 
                (pr2 x0),
            bifunctor_on_objects T 
              (pr11 x')
              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                 (pr21 x') 
                 (pr2 x')) ⟧)
           (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
            · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T
                    (pr21 x0) 
                    (pr2 x0)) 
                 (pr11 x0) 
                 (pr11 x') 
                 (pr11 f)
               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                   T (pr11 x')
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T
                      (pr21 x0) 
                      (pr2 x0))
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T
                      (pr21 x') 
                      (pr2 x'))
                   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                      T 
                      (pr2 x0) 
                      (pr21 x0) 
                      (pr21 x') 
                      (pr21 f)
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                       T 
                       (pr21 x') 
                       (pr2 x0) 
                       (pr2 x') 
                       (pr2 f))))
           (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
            · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                (bifunctor_on_objects T
                   (pr21 x0) 
                   (pr2 x0)) 
                (pr11 x0) 
                (pr11 x') 
                (pr11 f)
            · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                (pr11 x')
                (bifunctor_on_objects T
                   (pr21 x0) 
                   (pr2 x0))
                (bifunctor_on_objects T
                   (pr21 x') 
                   (pr2 x'))
                (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                   T (pr2 x0) 
                   (pr21 x0) 
                   (pr21 x') 
                   (pr21 f)
                 · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                     T (pr21 x') 
                     (pr2 x0) 
                     (pr2 x') 
                     (pr2 f)))
           (λ p : C
                  ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (pr11 x0) 
                       (pr21 x0)) 
                      (pr2 x0),
                  bifunctor_on_objects T
                    (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (pr21 x') 
                       (pr2 x')) ⟧,
            rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
              (pr2 x0)
              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                 (pr11 x0) 
                 (pr21 x0))
              (bifunctor_on_objects T
                 (pr11 x') 
                 (pr21 x'))
              (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                 (pr21 x0) 
                 (pr11 x0) 
                 (pr11 x') 
                 (pr11 f)
               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                   T (pr11 x') 
                   (pr21 x0) 
                   (pr21 x') 
                   (pr21 f))
            · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                (bifunctor_on_objects T
                   (pr11 x') 
                   (pr21 x')) 
                (pr2 x0) 
                (pr2 x') 
                (pr2 f)
            · ass (pr11 x') 
                (pr21 x') 
                (pr2 x') = p)
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (C
               ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T
                      (pr11 x0) 
                      (pr21 x0)) 
                   (pr2 x0),
               bifunctor_on_objects T
                 (pr11 x')
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T
                    (pr21 x0) 
                    (pr2 x0)) ⟧)
              (ass (pr11 x0) 
                 (pr21 x0) 
                 (pr2 x0)
               · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                   T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T
                      (pr21 x0) 
                      (pr2 x0)) 
                   (pr11 x0) 
                   (pr11 x') 
                   (pr11 f))
              (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                 (pr2 x0)
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T
                    (pr11 x0) 
                    (pr21 x0))
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T
                    (pr11 x') 
                    (pr21 x0))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                    T (pr21 x0) 
                    (pr11 x0) 
                    (pr11 x') 
                    (pr11 f))
               · ass (pr11 x') 
                   (pr21 x0) 
                   (pr2 x0))
              (λ p : C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects
                       T (pr11 x0) 
                       (pr21 x0)) 
                       (pr2 x0),
                     bifunctor_on_objects T
                       (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects
                       T (pr21 x0) 
                       (pr2 x0)) ⟧,
               rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                 (pr2 x0)
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T
                    (pr11 x0) 
                    (pr21 x0))
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T
                    (pr11 x') 
                    (pr21 x'))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                    T (pr21 x0) 
                    (pr11 x0) 
                    (pr11 x') 
                    (pr11 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                      T 
                      (pr11 x') 
                      (pr21 x0) 
                      (pr21 x') 
                      (pr21 f))
               · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                   T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T
                      (pr11 x') 
                      (pr21 x')) 
                   (pr2 x0) 
                   (pr2 x') 
                   (pr2 f)
               · ass (pr11 x') 
                   (pr21 x') 
                   (pr2 x') =
               p

                       T t0 y)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                       T y t t0 f)
                     · ass t0 y z)
                    (λ t0 : C,
                     impred_isaprop
                       (λ 
                       t1 : C,
                       ∏ 
                       (z : C)
                       (f : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧),
                       ass t t1 z
                       · 
                       rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                       T ... t t0 f =
                       rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                       T z ... ... ...
                       · 
                       ass t0 t1 z)
                       (λ 
                       t1 : C,
                       impred_isaprop
                       (λ t2 : C, ∏ ..., ...)
                       (λ 
                       t2 : C,
                       impred_isaprop ... ...)))))
              (impred_isaprop
                 (λ t : C,
                  ∏ (y y' z : C)
                  (g : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧),
                  ass t y z
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                      T t
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                       y z)
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                       y' z)
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                       T z y y' g) =
                  rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                    T z
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T t
                       y)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T t
                       y')
                    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                       T t y y' g)
                  · ass t y' z)
                 (λ t : C,

                    (λ t0 : C,

                       T t
                       (bifunctor_on_objects
                       T t0 z)

                       T y' z)

                       T z
                       (bifunctor_on_objects
                       T t t0)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects
                       T t y')
                       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                       T t t0 y' g)
                     · ass t y' z)
                    (λ t0 : C,

                       T z ... ... ...
                       ·

                       (assoc_right
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T)),

     (λ (assinv : associatorinv_data T)
      (xyz : precategory_binproduct_data
               (precategory_binproduct_data C
                  C) C),
      assinv (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
     (λ (assinv : ∏

            assoc_left

      idpath y) assinv x)
x, y, z: C
is_inverse_in_precat (pr1 ass x y z) (assinv x y z)

      apply (isolaw ((x,,y),,z)).
    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
assinv: associatorinv_data T
isaprop (associator_iso_law (pr1 ass) assinv)
 repeat (apply impred_isaprop ; intro) ; apply isaprop_is_inverse_in_precat.
    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
ass: associator0_nattrans T
assinv: associatorinv_data T
isaprop
  (∏
   x : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C,
   is_inverse_in_precat
     (weqtotal2
        (weq_iso
           (λ (ass : associator_data T)
            (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
            ass (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
           (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                      (assoc_left
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T))
                      (assoc_right
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T))) (x0 y z : C),
            nt ((x0,, y),, z))
           (λ x0 : associator_data T, idpath x0)
           (λ y : nat_trans_data
                    (assoc_left
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T))
                    (assoc_right
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T)), idpath y))
        (λ ass : associator_data T,
         weq_iso
           (λ (assnat : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
                        × associator_nat_rightwhisker
                            ass
                          × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                              ass)
            (x0 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
            (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (C
               ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                      (pr21 x0)) (pr2 x0),
               bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                    (pr2 x')) ⟧)
              (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
               · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                       (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                    (pr11 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))

                         (pr21 f)

                      (pr2 x0))
                   (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                      (pr2 x'))

                        (pr2 f)))

                         (pr2 x0),

                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                    (pr21 x0))
                 (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')

              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (C

                  · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =

                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T

                         (pr2 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x0)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                          (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                     · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                            (pr2 x')))
                    (λ p : C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                               (pr2 x0),
                           bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x')
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧,
                     p =
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x0)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                          (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                         (pr2 x0)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr21 x') (pr2 x0)
                              (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                            (pr2 x0),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                            (pr2 x0)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x')
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                            (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0)
                               (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                             · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 T (pr21 x') (pr2 x0)
                                 (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T

                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                        · (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                             (pr2 x0)
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr11 x')
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                               (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T (...) (pr21 x0)
                                  (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                                · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                    T (pr21 x') (...)
                                    (...) (...))))
                       (λ p : C
                              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T (pr11 x0)
                                     (pr21 x0))
                                  (pr2 x0),
                              bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x')
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T (pr21 x')
                                   (pr2 x')) ⟧,
                        rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                               (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                        · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...) (pr2 x0)
                             (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                           · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                               (pr2 x')) = p)
                       (! (maponpaths
                             (compose
                                (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                   T (...) (...) (...)
                                   (...)))
                             (internal_paths_rew_r
                                (C
                                 ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T ... ...,
                                 bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T ... ... ⟧)
                                (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                   T (pr11 x') (...)
                                   (...) (...))
                                (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                   T ... ... ... ...
                                 · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                     T ... ... ... ...)
                                (λ p : ..., ... = ...)
                                (internal_paths_rew_r
                                   (...) (...) (...)
                                   (...) (...) (...))
                                (bifunctor_leftcomp T
                                   (pr11 x') (...)
                                   (...) (...) (...)
                                   (...))) @
                           cancel_precomposition C
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T ... ...) (pr2 x0))
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T ... ...) (pr2 x0))
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x')
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T ... ...))
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...
                              · ass ... ... ...
                              · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T (pr11 x') (...)
                                  (...) (...))
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (...) (...) (...)
                                (...) · (... · ...))
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (pr2 x0)
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T ... ...)
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T ... ...)
                                (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                   T ... ... ... ...))
                             (internal_paths_rew_r
                                (C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧)
                                (... · ...)
                                (... · ...)
                                (λ ..., ...)
                                (cancel_precomposition
                                   C ... ... ... ...
                                   ... ... ...)
                                (assoc' ... ... ...)) @
                           internal_paths_rew_r
                             (C
                              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (...) (...),
                              bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x') (...) ⟧)
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (...) (...) (...)
                                (...) · (... · ...))
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...
                              · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...
                              · (... · ...))
                             (λ p : C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                              p = ... · ...)
                             (internal_paths_rew_r
                                (C ⟦ ..., ... ⟧)
                                (... · ...)
                                (... · ...)
                                (λ ..., ...)
                                (internal_paths_rew_r
                                   ... ... ... ... ...
                                   ...)
                                (assoc ... ... ...))
                             (assoc
                                (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                   T ... ... ... ...)
                                (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                   T ... ... ... ...)
                                (... · ...))))
                       (assoc'
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr2 x0)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                                (pr11 x') (pr11 f)))
                          (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                             (pr2 x0))
                          (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr11 x')
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0)
                                (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                              · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T (pr21 x') (pr2 x0)
                                  (pr2 x') (pr2 f)))))
                    (assoc'
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                               (pr21 x') (pr21 f)))

                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f))
                       (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                          (pr2 x'))))
                 ((pr12 assnat) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                    (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0) (pr11 f)))
              (assoc
                 (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                 (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                       (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                    (pr11 f))
                 (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x0)
                       (pr2 x0))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                       (pr2 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                       (pr21 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                         (pr2 f)))))
           (associators_equiv_subproof C T ass)
           (λ x0 : associator_nat_leftwhisker ass
                   × associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
                     × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
                         ass,
            let X :=
              λ (X Y : UU) (H : isaprop X)
              (H0 : isaprop Y) (x1 x' : X × Y),
              pr1 (isapropdirprod X Y H H0 x1 x') in
            X (associator_nat_leftwhisker ass)
              (associator_nat_rightwhisker ass
               × associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass)
              (impred_isaprop
                 (λ t : C,
                  ∏ (y z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                  ass t y z
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T y z')
                      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T y
                         z z' h) =
                  leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T t y) z z'
                    h · ass t y z')
                 (λ t : C,
                  impred_isaprop
                    (λ t0 : C,
                     ∏ (z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
                     ass t t0 z
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T t
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T t0 z)
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T t0 z')
                         (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T t0 z z' h) =
                     leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t t0) z
                       z' h · ass t t0 z')
                    (λ t0 : C,
                     impred_isaprop
                       (λ t1 : C,
                        ∏ (z' : C) (h : C ⟦ t1, z' ⟧),
                        ass t t0 t1
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T t ... ... ... =
                        leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          ... t1 z' h · ass t t0 z')
                       (λ t1 : C,
                        impred_isaprop
                          (λ t2 : C, ∏ ..., ...)
                          (λ t2 : C,
                           impred_isaprop ... ...)))))
              (isapropdirprod
                 (associator_nat_rightwhisker ass)
                 (associator_nat_leftrightwhisker ass)
                 (impred_isaprop
                    (λ t : C,
                     ∏ (x' y z : C) (f : C ⟦ t, x' ⟧),
                     ass t y z
                     · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)
                         t x' f =
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t y)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T x' y)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          y t x' f) · ass x' y z)
                    (λ t : C,
                     impred_isaprop
                       (λ t0 : C,
                        ∏ (y z : C) (f : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧),

                            T (...) t t0 f =

                          z (...) (...) (...)
                        · ass t0 y z)

                          (λ t1 : C,
                           ∏ (z : C) (f : ...),
                           ... = ...)
                          (λ t1 : C,
                           impred_isaprop (...) (...)))))
                 (impred_isaprop
                    (λ t : C,
                     ∏ (y y' z : C) (g : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧),

                         (bifunctor_on_objects T y' z)

                            T z y y' g) =

                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t y)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T t y')
                       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          t y y' g) · ass t y' z)
                    (λ t : C,
                     impred_isaprop
                       (λ t0 : C,
                        ∏ (y' z : C)

                        rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T

                        impred_isaprop
                          (λ t1 : C,
                           ∏ (z : C) (g : ...),
                           ... = ...)
                          (λ t1 : C,
                           impred_isaprop (...) (...))))))

                 (λ (x1 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
                  (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x1, x' ⟧),
                  internal_paths_rew_r
                    (C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T

                         (pr2 x1),

                         (bifunctor_on_objects T

                       (bifunctor_on_objects T

                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T ... ... ... ...)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                         (pr2 x1) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                         (pr2 x') = p)
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1))
                            (pr2 x1),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1)) ⟧)
                       (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1)
                          (pr2 x1)
                        · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T

                               (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                            (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                            (pr11 f))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x1)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
