                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x1))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x1) (pr11 x1)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x1)
                            (pr2 x1))
                       (λ p : C
                              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T ... ...)
                                  (pr2 x1),
                              bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x')
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T ... ...) ⟧,
                        rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (...) (...) (...) (...)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (...) (...) (...) (...)
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                            (pr2 x') =
                        p
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x')
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               ... ...)
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               ... ...) (... · ...))
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          (C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...) (pr2 x1),
                           bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x')
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...) ⟧)
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (...) (...) (...) (...)
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (...) (...) (...)
                               (...)
                           · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                               (pr2 x'))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr2 x1)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...) (... · ...)
                           · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...
                              · ass ... ... ...))
                          (λ p : C
                                 ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T ... ...,
                                 bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T ... ... ⟧,
                           p =
                           ... · ...
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T ... ... ... ...)
                          (internal_paths_rew_r
                             (C
                              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...,
                              bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ... ⟧)
                             (... · ...
                              · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...)
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...
                              · (...))
                             (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                             (! (... @ ...))
                             (assoc' (...) (...) (...)))
                          (assoc'
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (...) (...) (...)
                                (...))
                             (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (...) (...) (...)
                                (...))
                             (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                                (...))))
                       ((pr12 x0) (pr11 x1) (pr11 x')
                          (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1) (pr11 f)))
                    (assoc
                       (ass (pr11 x1) (pr21 x1)
                          (pr2 x1))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                          (pr11 x1) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x1) (pr2 x1))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr2 x1) (pr21 x1)
                             (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr21 x') (pr2 x1)
                               (pr2 x') (pr2 f))))))
              x0)
           (λ y : is_nat_trans
                    (assoc_left
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T))
                    (assoc_right
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T))
                    (weq_iso
                       (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                        (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                        ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                          (pr2 xyz))
                       (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                                  (assoc_left
                                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                        T))
                                  (assoc_right
                                     (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                        T)))
                        (x0 y z : C),
                        nt ((x0,, y),, z))
                       (λ x0 : associator_data T,
                        idpath x0)
                       (λ y : nat_trans_data
                                (assoc_left
                                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                      T))
                                (assoc_right
                                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                      T)), idpath y)
                       ass),
            let X :=
              λ (P : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C → UU)
              (H : ∏ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C, isaprop (P t))
              (x0 x' : ∏ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C, P t),
              pr1 (impred_isaprop P H x0 x') in
            X
              (λ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
               ∏ (x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
               (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, x' ⟧),
               # (assoc_left
                    (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                       T)) f
               · weq_iso
                   (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                    (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                    ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                      (pr2 xyz))
                   (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                              (assoc_left
                                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                    T))
                              (assoc_right
                                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                    T)))
                    (x0 y0 z : C), nt ((x0,, y0),, z))
                   (λ x0 : associator_data T,
                    idpath x0)
                   (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                             (assoc_left
                                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                   T))
                             (assoc_right
                                (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                   T)), idpath y0) ass
                   x' =
               weq_iso
                 (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                  (xyz : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C),
                  ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
                 (λ (nt : nat_trans_data
                            (assoc_left
                               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                  T))
                            (assoc_right
                               (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                  T))) (x0 y0 z : C),
                  nt ((x0,, y0),, z))
                 (λ x0 : associator_data T, idpath x0)
                 (λ y0 : nat_trans_data
                           (assoc_left
                              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                 T))
                           (assoc_right
                              (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                                 T)), idpath y0) ass t
               · # (assoc_right
                      (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                         T)) f)
              (λ t : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
               impred_isaprop
                 (λ t0 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
                  ∏ f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                  # (assoc_left
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T)) f
                  · weq_iso
                      (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                       (xyz : (...) ⊠ C),
                       ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                         (pr2 xyz))
                      (λ (nt : nat_trans_data (...)
                                 (...)) (x0 y0 z : C),
                       nt (...,, z))
                      (λ x0 : associator_data T,
                       idpath x0)
                      (λ y0 : nat_trans_data (...)
                                (...), idpath y0) ass
                      t0 =
                  weq_iso
                    (λ (ass0 : associator_data T)
                     (xyz : (...) ⊠ C),
                     ass0 (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz)
                       (pr2 xyz))
                    (λ (nt : nat_trans_data (...)
                               (...)) (x0 y0 z : C),
                     nt (...,, z))
                    (λ x0 : associator_data T,
                     idpath x0)
                    (λ y0 : nat_trans_data (...) (...),
                     idpath y0) ass t
                  · # (assoc_right
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T)) f)
                 (λ t0 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
                  impred_isaprop
                    (λ t1 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                     # (assoc_left (...)) t1
                     · weq_iso
                         (λ (ass0 : ...) (xyz : ...),
                          ass0 ... ... ...)
                         (λ (nt : ...) (x0 y0 z : C),
                          nt ...)
                         (λ x0 : ..., idpath x0)
                         (λ y0 : ..., idpath y0) ass
                         t0 =
                     weq_iso
                       (λ (ass0 : ...) (xyz : ...),
                        ass0 ... ... ...)
                       (λ (nt : ...) (x0 y0 z : C),
                        nt ...)
                       (λ x0 : ..., idpath x0)
                       (λ y0 : ..., idpath y0) ass t
                     · # (assoc_right (...)) t1)
                    (λ t1 : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                     C
                       (assoc_left
                          (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                             T) t)
                       (assoc_right
                          (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                             T) t0)
                       (# (assoc_left ...) t1
                        · weq_iso (λ ... ..., ...)
                            (λ ... ..., ...)
                            (λ ..., ...) (λ ..., ...)
                            ass t0)
                       (weq_iso (λ ... ..., ...)
                          (λ ... ..., ...)
                          (λ ..., ...) (λ ..., ...)
                          ass t
                        · # (assoc_right ...) t1))))
              (λ (x0 x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
               (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (C
                  ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0)) (pr2 x0),
                  bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr21 x')
                       (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                 (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                  · (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                       (pr11 x0) (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr21 x') (pr2 x0)
                              (pr2 x') (pr2 f))))
                 (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                  · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)) (pr11 x0)
                      (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (pr11 x')
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f)
                       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                           (pr21 x') (pr2 x0) (pr2 x')
                           (pr2 f)))
                 (λ p : C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                            (pr2 x0),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧,
                  rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                    (pr2 x0)
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x0)
                       (pr21 x0))
                    (bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (pr21 x'))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0) (pr11 x')
                       (pr11 f)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                         (pr21 f))
                  · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                      (bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (pr11 x') (pr21 x')) (pr2 x0)
                      (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                  · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x') (pr2 x') =
                  p)
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (C
                     ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                         (pr2 x0),
                     bifunctor_on_objects T (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)) ⟧)
                    (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                     · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                         (pr11 x0) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x0)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x0))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                          (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                         (pr2 x0))
                    (λ p : C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                               (pr2 x0),
                           bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x')
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)) ⟧,
                     rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr2 x0)
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          ... ... ... ...
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T ... ... ... ...)
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                         (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                     · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                         (pr2 x') =
                     p
                     · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                         (pr11 x')
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                         (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (...) (pr21 x0)
                            (pr21 x') (pr21 f)
                          · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              T (pr21 x') (...) (...)
                              (...)))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (C
                        ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                            (pr2 x0),
                        bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr11 x')
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr21 x') (pr2 x')) ⟧)
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T ... ... ... ...
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T ... ... ... ...)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                            (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                            (pr2 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0)
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                          (bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr21 x0) (pr11 x0)
                             (pr11 x') (pr11 f)
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                               (pr21 x') (pr21 f))
                        · (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...) (pr2 x0)
                             (pr2 x') (pr2 f)
                           · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                               (pr2 x')))
                       (λ p : C
                              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T ... ...)
                                  (pr2 x0),
                              bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x')
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T ... ...) ⟧,
                        p =
                        rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (...) (...) (...) (...)
                        · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                            (...)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr11 x')
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               ... ...)
                            (bifunctor_on_objects T
                               ... ...) (... · ...))
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          (C
                           ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects T
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...) (pr2 x0),
                           bifunctor_on_objects T
                             (pr11 x')
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...) ⟧)
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (...) (...) (...) (...)
                           · ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                               (...)
                           · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                               T (pr11 x')
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...)
                               (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                  ... ...) (... · ...))
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr2 x0)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                ... ...)
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...)
                           · (ass ... ... ...
                              · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...))
                          (λ p : C
                                 ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects
                                     T ... ...,
                                 bifunctor_on_objects
                                   T ... ... ⟧,
                           rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T ... ... ... ... · (...) =
                           p)
                          (! (maponpaths (...) (...) @
                              cancel_precomposition C
                                ... ... ... ... ...
                                ... ... @
                              internal_paths_rew_r ...
                                ... ... ... ... ...))
                          (assoc'
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (...) (...) (...)
                                (...))
                             (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x0)
                                (...))
                             (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T (pr11 x') (...)
                                (...) (...))))
                       (assoc'
                          (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T (pr2 x0)
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0))
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                T ... ... ... ...
                              · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                  T ... ... ... ...))
                          (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                             T
                             (bifunctor_on_objects T
                                (pr11 x') (pr21 x'))
                             (pr2 x0) (pr2 x') (pr2 f))
                          (ass (pr11 x') (pr21 x')
                             (pr2 x'))))
                    ((pr12 (associators_equiv_subproof
                              C T ass y)) (pr11 x0)
                       (pr11 x') (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0)
                       (pr11 f)))
                 (assoc
                    (ass (pr11 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                       (pr11 x0) (pr11 x') (pr11 f))
                    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                       (pr11 x')
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x0) (pr2 x0))
                       (bifunctor_on_objects T
                          (pr21 x') (pr2 x'))
                       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
                          (pr2 x0) (pr21 x0) (pr21 x')
                          (pr21 f)
                        · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                            T (pr21 x') (pr2 x0)
                            (pr2 x') (pr2 f))))) y))
        ass x)
     (weq_iso
        (λ (assinv : associatorinv_data T)
         (xyz : precategory_binproduct_data
                  (precategory_binproduct_data C C) C),
         assinv (pr11 xyz) (pr21 xyz) (pr2 xyz))
        (λ (assinv : ∏
                     x0 : precategory_binproduct_data
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               C C) C,
                     C
                     ⟦ assoc_right
                         (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                            T) x0,
                     assoc_left
                       (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                          T) x0 ⟧) (x0 y z : C),
         assinv ((x0,, y),, z))
        (λ x0 : associatorinv_data T, idpath x0)
        (λ y : ∏
               x0 : precategory_binproduct_data
                      (precategory_binproduct_data C C)
                      C,
               C
               ⟦ assoc_right
                   (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat
                      T) x0,
               assoc_left
                 (bifunctor_to_functorfromproductcat T)
                 x0 ⟧, idpath y) assinv x))
 repeat (apply impred_isaprop ; intro) ; apply isaprop_is_inverse_in_precat.
  Defined.

  
moncats0 ≃ monoidal_cat

  
moncats0 ≃ monoidal_cat

    
∏ x : category,
monstruct0 x
≃ (∑ (tensor : x ⊠ x ⟶ x) (I : x)
   (λ' : left_unitor tensor I)
   (ρ' : right_unitor tensor I)
   (α' : associator tensor),
   triangle_eq tensor I λ' ρ' α'
   × pentagon_eq tensor α')

    
C: category
monstruct0 C
≃ (∑ (tensor : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (I : C)
   (λ' : left_unitor tensor I)
   (ρ' : right_unitor tensor I)
   (α' : associator tensor),
   triangle_eq tensor I λ' ρ' α'
   × pentagon_eq tensor α')

    
C: category
bifunctor C C C ≃ C ⊠ C ⟶ C
C: category
∏ x : bifunctor C C C,
(λ x0 : bifunctor C C C,
 ∑ (I : C) (lu : lunitor0 x0 I) (ru : runitor0 x0 I)
 (ass : associator0 x0),
 triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
 × pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)) x
≃ (λ y : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
   ∑ (I : C) (λ' : left_unitor y I)
   (ρ' : right_unitor y I) (α' : associator y),
   triangle_eq y I λ' ρ' α' × pentagon_eq y α') (?f x)

    
C: category
bifunctor C C C ≃ C ⊠ C ⟶ C
 apply bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat. 
C: category
∏ x : bifunctor C C C,
(λ x0 : bifunctor C C C,
 ∑ (I : C) (lu : lunitor0 x0 I) (ru : runitor0 x0 I)
 (ass : associator0 x0),
 triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
 × pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)) x
≃ (λ y : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
   ∑ (I : C) (λ' : left_unitor y I)
   (ρ' : right_unitor y I) (α' : associator y),
   triangle_eq y I λ' ρ' α' × pentagon_eq y α')
    (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C x)

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
(λ x : bifunctor C C C,
 ∑ (I : C) (lu : lunitor0 x I) (ru : runitor0 x I)
 (ass : associator0 x),
 triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
 × pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)) T
≃ (λ y : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
   ∑ (I : C) (λ' : left_unitor y I)
   (ρ' : right_unitor y I) (α' : associator y),
   triangle_eq y I λ' ρ' α' × pentagon_eq y α')
    (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
C ≃ C
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
∏ x : C,
(λ x0 : C,
 ∑ (lu : lunitor0 T x0) (ru : runitor0 T x0)
 (ass : associator0 T),
 triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
 × pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)) x
≃ (λ y : C,
   ∑
   (λ' : left_unitor
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C
              C T) y)
   (ρ' : right_unitor
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C
              C T) y)
   (α' : associator
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C
              C T)),
   triangle_eq
     (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T) y
     λ' ρ' α'
   × pentagon_eq
       (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
       α') (?f x)

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
C ≃ C
 apply idweq. 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
∏ x : C,
(λ x0 : C,
 ∑ (lu : lunitor0 T x0) (ru : runitor0 T x0)
 (ass : associator0 T),
 triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
 × pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)) x
≃ (λ y : C,
   ∑
   (λ' : left_unitor
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C
              C T) y)
   (ρ' : right_unitor
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C
              C T) y)
   (α' : associator
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C
              C T)),
   triangle_eq
     (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T) y
     λ' ρ' α'
   × pentagon_eq
       (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
       α') (idweq C x)

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
(λ x : C,
 ∑ (lu : lunitor0 T x) (ru : runitor0 T x)
 (ass : associator0 T),
 triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
 × pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)) I
≃ (λ y : C,
   ∑
   (λ' : left_unitor
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C
              C T) y)
   (ρ' : right_unitor
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C
              C T) y)
   (α' : associator
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C
              C T)),
   triangle_eq
     (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T) y
     λ' ρ' α'
   × pentagon_eq
       (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
       α') (idweq C I)

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lunitor0 T I
≃ left_unitor
    (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
    (idweq C I)
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
∏ x : lunitor0 T I,
(λ x0 : lunitor0 T I,
 ∑ (ru : runitor0 T I) (ass : associator0 T),
 triangle_identity (pr11 x0) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
 × pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)) x
≃ (λ y : left_unitor
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C
              C T) (idweq C I),
   ∑
   (ρ' : right_unitor
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C
              C T) (idweq C I))
   (α' : associator
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C
              C T)),
   triangle_eq
     (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
     (idweq C I) y ρ' α'
   × pentagon_eq
       (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
       α') (?f x)

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lunitor0 T I
≃ left_unitor
    (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
    (idweq C I)
 apply lunitors_equiv. 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
∏ x : lunitor0 T I,
(λ x0 : lunitor0 T I,
 ∑ (ru : runitor0 T I) (ass : associator0 T),
 triangle_identity (pr11 x0) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
 × pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)) x
≃ (λ y : left_unitor
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C
              C T) (idweq C I),
   ∑
   (ρ' : right_unitor
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C
              C T) (idweq C I))
   (α' : associator
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C
              C T)),
   triangle_eq
     (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
     (idweq C I) y ρ' α'
   × pentagon_eq
       (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
       α') (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) x)

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
(λ x : lunitor0 T I,
 ∑ (ru : runitor0 T I) (ass : associator0 T),
 triangle_identity (pr11 x) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
 × pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)) lu
≃ (λ y : left_unitor
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C
              C T) (idweq C I),
   ∑
   (ρ' : right_unitor
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C
              C T) (idweq C I))
   (α' : associator
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C
              C T)),
   triangle_eq
     (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
     (idweq C I) y ρ' α'
   × pentagon_eq
       (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
       α') (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) lu)

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
runitor0 T I
≃ right_unitor
    (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
    (idweq C I)
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
∏ x : runitor0 T I,
(λ x0 : runitor0 T I,
 ∑ ass : associator0 T,
 triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 x0) (pr11 ass)
 × pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)) x
≃ (λ y : right_unitor
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C
              C T) (idweq C I),
   ∑
   α' : associator
          (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C
             T),
   triangle_eq
     (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
     (idweq C I) (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) lu) y
     α'
   × pentagon_eq
       (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
       α') (?f x)

T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
runitor0 T I
≃ right_unitor
    (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
    (idweq C I)
 apply runitors_equiv.

T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
∏ x : runitor0 T I,
(λ x0 : runitor0 T I,
 ∑ ass : associator0 T,
 triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 x0) (pr11 ass)
 × pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)) x
≃ (λ y : right_unitor
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C
              C T) (idweq C I),
   ∑
   α' : associator
          (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C

   triangle_eq

       α') (runitors_equiv T (idweq C I) x)

T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
(λ x : runitor0 T I,
 ∑ ass : associator0 T,
 triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 x) (pr11 ass)
 × pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)) ru
≃ (λ y : right_unitor
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C

   ∑
   α' : associator

T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
∏ x : associator0 T,
(λ x0 : associator0 T,
 triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 x0)
 × pentagon_identity (pr11 x0)) x
≃ (λ y : associator
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C

   triangle_eq
     (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
     (idweq C I) (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) lu)
     (runitors_equiv T (idweq C I) ru) y
   × pentagon_eq
       (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
       y) (?f x)

T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
associator0 T
≃ associator
    (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
 apply associators_equiv. 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
∏ x : associator0 T,
(λ x0 : associator0 T,
 triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 x0)
 × pentagon_identity (pr11 x0)) x
≃ (λ y : associator
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C
              C T),
   triangle_eq
     (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
     (idweq C I) (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) lu)
     (runitors_equiv T (idweq C I) ru) y
   × pentagon_eq
       (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
       y) (associators_equiv T x)

T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
(λ x : associator0 T,
 triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 x)
 × pentagon_identity (pr11 x)) ass
≃ (λ y : associator
           (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C
              C T),
   triangle_eq
     (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
     (idweq C I) (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) lu)
     (runitors_equiv T (idweq C I) ru) y
   × pentagon_eq
       (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
       y) (associators_equiv T ass)

    (idweq C I) (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) lu)

    (associators_equiv T ass)

  (associators_equiv T ass)
→ triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)

  (triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass))

T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
→ triangle_eq
    (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)

    (runitors_equiv T (idweq C I) ru)
    (associators_equiv T ass)

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
ti: triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
x, y: C
# (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
  (pr1 (runitors_equiv T (idweq C I) ru) x #, id y) =
pr1 (associators_equiv T ass) ((x, idweq C I), y)
· # (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
    (id x #, pr1 (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) lu) y)

# (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
  (pr1 (runitors_equiv T (idweq C I) ru) x #, id y) =
?b
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
ti: triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
x, y: C
?b =
pr1 (associators_equiv T ass) ((x, idweq C I), y)
· # (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
    (id x #, pr1 (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) lu) y)
 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
ti: triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
x, y: C
# (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
  (pr1 (runitors_equiv T (idweq C I) ru) x #, id y) =
?b
 apply when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering. 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
ti: triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
x, y: C
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y
  (pr1
     (I_posttensor
        (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
        (idweq C I) x, y))
  (pr1 (functor_identity C x, y))
  (pr1
     (pr1 (runitors_equiv T (idweq C I) ru) x #, id y)) =
pr1 (associators_equiv T ass) ((x, idweq C I), y)
· # (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
    (id x #, pr1 (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) lu) y)

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
ti: triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
x, y: C
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y
  (pr1
     (I_posttensor
        (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
        (idweq C I) x, y))
  (pr1 (functor_identity C x, y))
  (pr1
     (pr1 (runitors_equiv T (idweq C I) ru) x #, id y)) =
?b
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
ti: triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
x, y: C
?b =
pr1 (associators_equiv T ass) ((x, idweq C I), y)
· # (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
    (id x #, pr1 (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) lu) y)

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
ti: triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
x, y: C
?b =
pr1 (associators_equiv T ass) ((x, idweq C I), y)
· # (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
    (id x #, pr1 (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) lu) y)
 apply maponpaths ; apply (! when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering _ _ _). 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
ti: triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)
x, y: C
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y
  (pr1
     (I_posttensor
        (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
        (idweq C I) x, y))
  (pr1 (functor_identity C x, y))
  (pr1
     (pr1 (runitors_equiv T (idweq C I) ru) x #, id y)) =
pr1 (associators_equiv T ass) ((x, idweq C I), y)
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T
    (pr1
       (pair_functor (functor_identity C)
          (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C
             T)
          (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
             ((x, idweq C I), y))))
    (pr2
       (pair_functor (functor_identity C)
          (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C
             T)
          (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
             ((x, idweq C I), y))))
    (pr2 (x, functor_identity C y))
    (pr2
       (id x
       #, pr1 (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) lu) y))

      apply (! ti x y).
    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
triangle_eq
  (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
  (idweq C I) (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) lu)
  (runitors_equiv T (idweq C I) ru)
  (associators_equiv T ass)
→ triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)

T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
isaprop
  (triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass))

     (runitors_equiv T (idweq C I) ru)
     (associators_equiv T ass))

T: bifunctor C C C
I: C

  (pentagon_eq
     (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
     (associators_equiv T ass))

    
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
triangle_eq
  (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
  (idweq C I) (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) lu)
  (runitors_equiv T (idweq C I) ru)
  (associators_equiv T ass)
→ triangle_identity (pr11 lu) (pr11 ru) (pr11 ass)

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
ti: triangle_eq
  (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
  (idweq C I) (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) lu)
  (runitors_equiv T (idweq C I) ru)
  (associators_equiv T ass)
x, y: C
(pr11 ass) x I y
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T I y) y ((pr11 lu) y) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x I) x ((pr11 ru) x)

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
ti: triangle_eq
  (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
  (idweq C I) (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) lu)
  (runitors_equiv T (idweq C I) ru)
  (associators_equiv T ass)
x, y: C
(pr11 ass) x I y
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T I y) y ((pr11 lu) y) =
pr1 (associators_equiv T ass) ((x, idweq C I), y)
· # (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
    (id x #, pr1 (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) lu) y)
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
ti: triangle_eq
  (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
  (idweq C I) (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) lu)
  (runitors_equiv T (idweq C I) ru)
  (associators_equiv T ass)
x, y: C
# (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
  (pr1 (runitors_equiv T (idweq C I) ru) x #, id y) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x I) x ((pr11 ru) x)

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
ti: triangle_eq
  (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
  (idweq C I) (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) lu)
  (runitors_equiv T (idweq C I) ru)
  (associators_equiv T ass)
x, y: C
(pr11 ass) x I y
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
    (bifunctor_on_objects T I y) y ((pr11 lu) y) =
pr1 (associators_equiv T ass) ((x, idweq C I), y)
· # (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
    (id x #, pr1 (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) lu) y)
 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
ti: triangle_eq
  (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
  (idweq C I) (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) lu)
  (runitors_equiv T (idweq C I) ru)
  (associators_equiv T ass)
x, y: C
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T x
  (bifunctor_on_objects T I y) y ((pr11 lu) y) =
# (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
  (id x #, pr1 (lunitors_equiv T (idweq C I) lu) y)

        apply (! when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering _ _ _).

  (runitors_equiv T (idweq C I) ru)
  (associators_equiv T ass)
x, y: C
# (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
  (pr1 (runitors_equiv T (idweq C I) ru) x #, id y) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T y
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x I) x ((pr11 ru) x)
 apply when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering.

ass: associator0 T
isaprop (pentagon_identity (pr11 ass))

C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
pi: pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
w, x, y, z: C
pr1 (associators_equiv T ass)
  ((bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T
      (w, x), y), z)
· pr1 (associators_equiv T ass)
    ((w, x),
    bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T
      (y, z)) =
# (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
  (pr1 (associators_equiv T ass) ((w, x), y) #, id z)
· pr1 (associators_equiv T ass)
    ((w,
     bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T
       (x, y)), z)
· # (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
    (id w
    #, pr1 (associators_equiv T ass) ((x, y), z))

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
pi: pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
w, x, y, z: C
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (bifunctor_on_objects T w x)
     y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T w
     (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)) ((pr11 ass) w x y)
· (pr11 ass) w (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T w
    (bifunctor_on_objects T
       (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z))
    ((pr11 ass) x y z) =
# (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
  (pr1 (associators_equiv T ass) ((w, x), y) #, id z)
· pr1 (associators_equiv T ass)
    ((w,
     bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T
       (x, y)), z)
· # (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
    (id w
    #, pr1 (associators_equiv T ass) ((x, y), z))

T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
pi: pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
w, x, y, z: C
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (bifunctor_on_objects T w x)
     y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T w
     (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)) ((pr11 ass) w x y)
· (pr11 ass) w (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T w
    (bifunctor_on_objects T
       (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z))
    ((pr11 ass) x y z) = ?b
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
pi: pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
w, x, y, z: C
?b =
# (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
  (pr1 (associators_equiv T ass) ((w, x), y) #, id z)
· pr1 (associators_equiv T ass)
    ((w,
     bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T
       (x, y)), z)

C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
pi: pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
w, x, y, z: C
?b =
# (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
  (pr1 (associators_equiv T ass) ((w, x), y) #, id z)
· pr1 (associators_equiv T ass)
    ((w,
     bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T
       (x, y)), z)
· # (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
    (id w
    #, pr1 (associators_equiv T ass) ((x, y), z))
 do 2 apply maponpaths_2 ; apply (! when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering _ _ _). 
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
pi: pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
w, x, y, z: C
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (bifunctor_on_objects T w x)
     y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T w
     (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)) ((pr11 ass) w x y)
· (pr11 ass) w (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T w
    (bifunctor_on_objects T
       (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z))
    ((pr11 ass) x y z) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T
  (pr2
     (assoc_left
        (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
        ((w, x), y), z))
  (pr1
     (assoc_left
        (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
        ((w, x), y), z))
  (pr1
     (assoc_right
        (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
        ((w, x), y), z))
  (pr1
     (pr1 (associators_equiv T ass) ((w, x), y)
     #, id z))
· pr1 (associators_equiv T ass)
    ((w,
     bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T
       (x, y)), z)
· # (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
    (id w
    #, pr1 (associators_equiv T ass) ((x, y), z))

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
pi: pentagon_identity (pr11 ass)
w, x, y, z: C
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T w
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)
     z)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T x
     (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)) ((pr11 ass) x y z) =
# (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
  (id w #, pr1 (associators_equiv T ass) ((x, y), z))

      apply (! when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering _ _ _).

C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
pi: pentagon_eq
  (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
  (associators_equiv T ass)
w, x, y, z: C
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (bifunctor_on_objects T w x)
     y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T w
     (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)) ((pr11 ass) w x y)
· (pr11 ass) w (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T w
    (bifunctor_on_objects T
       (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z))
    ((pr11 ass) x y z) =
(pr11 ass) (bifunctor_on_objects T w x) y z
· (pr11 ass) w x (bifunctor_on_objects T y z)

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
pi: pentagon_eq
  (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
  (associators_equiv T ass)
w, x, y, z: C
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (bifunctor_on_objects T w x)
     y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T w
     (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)) ((pr11 ass) w x y)
· (pr11 ass) w (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T w
    (bifunctor_on_objects T
       (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z))
    ((pr11 ass) x y z) =
# (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
  (pr1 (associators_equiv T ass) ((w, x), y) #, id z)
· pr1 (associators_equiv T ass)
    ((w,
     bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T
       (x, y)), z)
· # (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
    (id w
    #, pr1 (associators_equiv T ass) ((x, y), z))

      
C: category
T: bifunctor C C C
I: C
lu: lunitor0 T I
ru: runitor0 T I
ass: associator0 T
pi: pentagon_eq
  (bifunctor_equiv_functorfromproductcat C C C T)
  (associators_equiv T ass)
w, x, y, z: C
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms T z
  (bifunctor_on_objects T (bifunctor_on_objects T w x)
     y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T w
     (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)) ((pr11 ass) w x y)
· (pr11 ass) w (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms T w
    (bifunctor_on_objects T
       (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z)
    (bifunctor_on_objects T x
       (bifunctor_on_objects T y z))
    ((pr11 ass) x y z) =
functoronmorphisms1 T ((pr11 ass) w x y) (id z)
· (pr11 ass) w (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z
· functoronmorphisms1 T (id w) ((pr11 ass) x y z)

       (bifunctor_on_objects T x y) z)

  (bifunctor_on_objects T (bifunctor_on_objects T w x)
     y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects T w
     (bifunctor_on_objects T x y)) ((pr11 ass) w x y)

End EquivalenceMonoidalCategoriesReordered0WithUncurried.
